knowledge_base.description: Estética barroca real con sellos ceremoniales, tipografía Cinzel y ornamentos dorados. Atmósfera de baile de corte.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital Barroco Real inspirada en el Palacio de Versalles.">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0d2461">
  <title>Invitación Real · Palacio de Versalles</title>

  <!-- CDN externas -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Great+Vibes&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
       METÁFORA VISUAL:
       "El decreto real se revela dentro de un palacio vivo".
       La invitación no aparece como cajas lineales: se ensambla
       como una ceremonia teatral donde cortinas, sellos, molduras,
       espejos y pergaminos revelan la información por actos.
    ========================================================= */

    /* --- Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --gold: #d6a43a;
      --gold-bright: #f8d878;
      --ivory: #fff6df;
      --ivory-soft: #f5e7c8;
      --royal-blue: #0d2461;
      --royal-blue-deep: #07143d;
      --burgundy: #5a0f22;
      --burgundy-deep: #310713;
      --ink: #25180f;
      --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34);
      --soft-shadow: rgba(13, 20, 44, 0.22);
      --frame: clamp(14px, 2vw, 26px);
      --transition: 800ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
    }

    /* --- Reset Base --- */
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 20%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.22), transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--royal-blue-deep), var(--royal-blue) 42%, var(--burgundy-deep));
      color: var(--ivory);
      font-family: "Playfair Display", serif;
    }

    body.is-locked {
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    button,
    input,
    textarea {
      font-family: inherit;
    }

    /* --- Fondo Palacio Vivo --- */
    .palace-atmosphere {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -4;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .palace-atmosphere::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -18%;
      background:
        repeating-conic-gradient(
          from 45deg,
          rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.08) 0deg 8deg,
          transparent 8deg 18deg
        ),
        radial-gradient(circle at 15% 25%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.16), transparent 18%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 85% 18%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.14), transparent 19%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 85%, rgba(90, 15, 34, 0.6), transparent 42%);
      filter: blur(1px);
      animation: palaceBreath 16s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }

    .palace-atmosphere::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.09) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.08) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 84px 84px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 0%, transparent 74%);
      opacity: 0.42;
    }

    @keyframes palaceBreath {
      from {
        transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg);
      }

      to {
        transform: scale(1.08) rotate(2deg);
      }
    }

    /* --- Preloader Telón Real --- */
    .preloader {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 999;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      background: var(--burgundy-deep);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: opacity 900ms ease, visibility 900ms ease;
    }

    .preloader.is-hidden {
      opacity: 0;
      visibility: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .curtain {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      bottom: 0;
      width: 51%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 12%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.25), transparent 12%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(
          90deg,
          #390713 0 22px,
          #6b1027 22px 44px,
          #3b0714 44px 67px
        );
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      transition: transform 1500ms cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1);
    }

    .curtain-left {
      left: 0;
      border-right: 3px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.5);
    }

    .curtain-right {
      right: 0;
      border-left: 3px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.5);
    }

    .preloader.is-opening .curtain-left {
      transform: translateX(-105%) skewX(-5deg);
    }

    .preloader.is-opening .curtain-right {
      transform: translateX(105%) skewX(5deg);
    }

    .royal-loader-seal {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 4;
      width: min(270px, 72vw);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.12) 0 32%, transparent 33%),
        conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--gold), var(--ivory), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));
      box-shadow:
        0 0 0 12px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.14),
        0 0 70px rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.38);
      animation: sealPulse 2.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    .royal-loader-seal::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 12px;
      border-radius: inherit;
      background: var(--burgundy-deep);
      border: 2px dashed rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.72);
    }

    .royal-loader-seal::after {
      content: "Abrir el Gran Salón";
      position: absolute;
      width: 76%;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--ivory);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transform: translateY(72px);
    }

    .royal-loader-seal i {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 12vw, 5.8rem);
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45));
    }

    @keyframes sealPulse {
      0%,
      100% {
        transform: scale(1);
      }

      50% {
        transform: scale(1.04);
      }
    }

    /* --- Navegación Real --- */
    .royal-nav {
      position: fixed;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 20px;
      z-index: 60;
      width: min(720px, calc(100% - 32px));
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(130%);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 10px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.5);
      border-radius: 999px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(7, 20, 61, 0.92), rgba(49, 7, 19, 0.92)),
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.18), transparent 60%);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      transition: transform var(--transition);
    }

    .royal-nav.is-visible {
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
    }

    .royal-nav a {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 7px;
      padding: 10px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--ivory);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: background var(--transition), color var(--transition), transform var(--transition);
    }

    .royal-nav a:hover,
    .royal-nav a.is-active {
      color: var(--royal-blue-deep);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));
      transform: translateY(-3px);
    }

    /* --- Contenedor Principal --- */
    .invitation-shell {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: clamp(18px, 3vw, 42px);
    }

    .versailles-frame {
      position: fixed;
      inset: var(--frame);
      z-index: -1;
      pointer-events: none;
      border: 2px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.74);
      outline: 1px solid rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.34);
      outline-offset: -10px;
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.08),
        inset 0 0 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }

    .versailles-frame::before,
    .versailles-frame::after {
      content: "♛";
      position: absolute;
      width: 64px;
      height: 64px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-size: 2.1rem;
      background: var(--royal-blue-deep);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.74);
      border-radius: 50%;
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.28);
    }

    .versailles-frame::before {
      top: -32px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
    }

    .versailles-frame::after {
      bottom: -32px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(180deg);
    }

    section {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: clamp(74px, 10vw, 130px) 0;
      isolation: isolate;
    }

    .ornament-title {
      font-family: "Great Vibes", cursive;
      font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 12vw, 10rem);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.84;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      text-shadow:
        0 4px 0 rgba(80, 47, 6, 0.7),
        0 18px 38px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
    }

    .section-kicker {
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: clamp(0.72rem, 2vw, 0.95rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.32em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .section-heading {
      margin-top: 12px;
      color: var(--ivory);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5.2rem);
      line-height: 0.92;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      text-shadow: 0 14px 34px var(--shadow);
    }

    .royal-copy {
      max-width: 700px;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.88);
      font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.8vw, 1.28rem);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    /* --- Revelado No Lineal --- */
    [data-reveal] {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(28px) scale(0.98);
      filter: blur(10px);
      transition:
        opacity 1100ms ease,
        transform 1100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        filter 1100ms ease;
    }

    [data-reveal].is-visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      filter: blur(0);
    }

    [data-reveal="seal"] {
      transform: rotate(-18deg) scale(0.7);
      transform-origin: center;
    }

    [data-reveal="seal"].is-visible {
      transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1);
    }

    [data-reveal="mirror"] {
      clip-path: ellipse(0% 12% at 50% 50%);
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }

    [data-reveal="mirror"].is-visible {
      clip-path: ellipse(74% 100% at 50% 50%);
      transform: scale(1);
    }

    [data-reveal="fold"] {
      transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(28deg) translateY(40px);
      transform-origin: top;
    }

    [data-reveal="fold"].is-visible {
      transform: perspective(900px) rotateX(0deg) translateY(0);
    }

    /* --- Hero / Gran Salón --- */
    .hero {
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-stage {
      position: relative;
      width: min(1180px, 100%);
      min-height: min(780px, 82vh);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: clamp(28px, 5vw, 74px);
    }

    .hero-stage::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 2%;
      z-index: -1;
      border-radius: 46% 46% 10% 10% / 18% 18% 8% 8%;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.2), transparent 18% 82%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.2)),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.26), transparent 42%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.12), rgba(13, 36, 97, 0.7));
      border: 2px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.55);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 80px rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.13),
        0 28px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36);
    }

    .hero-stage::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 10% 5%;
      z-index: -1;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.16), transparent 50%),
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 8%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.28) 8% 8.4%, transparent 8.4% 91.6%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.28) 91.6% 92%, transparent 92%);
      mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black 18%, black 78%, transparent);
    }

    .hero-content {
      width: min(880px, 100%);
      text-align: center;
    }

    .royal-emblem {
      width: clamp(96px, 16vw, 150px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      margin: 0 auto 24px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle, var(--royal-blue-deep) 0 54%, transparent 55%),
        conic-gradient(var(--gold), var(--ivory), var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));
      box-shadow:
        0 0 0 10px rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.1),
        0 20px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 8vw, 4.4rem);
    }

    .hero-subtitle {
      margin: 20px auto 0;
      max-width: 680px;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.88);
      font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
      line-height: 1.7;
    }

    .names-decree {
      position: relative;
      margin: clamp(28px, 6vw, 48px) auto 0;
      width: min(720px, 100%);
      padding: clamp(24px, 4vw, 42px);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.95), rgba(245, 231, 200, 0.88)),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.28), transparent 60%);
      color: var(--ink);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.8);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.15),
        0 24px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
      clip-path: polygon(5% 0, 95% 0, 100% 10%, 100% 90%, 95% 100%, 5% 100%, 0 90%, 0 10%);
    }

    .names-decree::before,
    .names-decree::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 10%;
      right: 10%;
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
    }

    .names-decree::before {
      top: 16px;
    }

    .names-decree::after {
      bottom: 16px;
    }

    .couple-names {
      font-family: "Great Vibes", cursive;
      font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 11vw, 7rem);
      line-height: 0.92;
      color: var(--burgundy);
    }

    .couple-names span {
      display: block;
    }

    .couple-names small {
      display: block;
      margin: 8px 0 4px;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.5rem);
      letter-spacing: 0.24em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .hero-date {
      margin-top: 18px;
      color: var(--royal-blue);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.28rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .hero-actions {
      margin-top: clamp(26px, 4vw, 40px);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 14px;
    }

    .royal-button {
      position: relative;
      isolation: isolate;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 10px;
      min-height: 52px;
      padding: 14px 22px;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 0;
      clip-path: polygon(12px 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 50%, calc(100% - 12px) 100%, 12px 100%, 0 50%);
      color: var(--royal-blue-deep);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      cursor: pointer;
      box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
      transition: transform var(--transition), filter var(--transition);
    }

    .royal-button:hover {
      transform: translateY(-5px) rotate(-1deg);
      filter: brightness(1.08);
    }

    .royal-button.secondary {
      color: var(--ivory);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--burgundy), var(--royal-blue-deep));
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.55);
    }

    /* --- Acto Ceremonia --- */
    .ceremony-grid {
      width: min(1100px, 100%);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.9fr 1.1fr;
      gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 72px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .antique-mirror {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 600px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: clamp(26px, 5vw, 48px);
      border-radius: 48% 48% 8% 8% / 22% 22% 8% 8%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 20%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.36), transparent 36%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.24), rgba(13, 36, 97, 0.52)),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.16), transparent, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.16));
      border: clamp(10px, 2vw, 18px) ridge rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.86);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 60px rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.2),
        0 34px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
    }

    .antique-mirror::before {
      content: "❦";
      position: absolute;
      top: -38px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 100px;
      height: 76px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-size: 4rem;
      text-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36);
    }

    .mirror-card {
      width: 100%;
      padding: clamp(24px, 5vw, 46px);
      text-align: center;
      background: rgba(7, 20, 61, 0.72);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.3);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
    }

    .mirror-card .time {
      margin-top: 16px;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 7vw, 5.5rem);
      font-weight: 900;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .mirror-card .place {
      margin-top: 20px;
      color: var(--ivory);
      font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 3vw, 2rem);
      line-height: 1.35;
    }

    .ceremony-content {
      display: grid;
      gap: 24px;
    }

    .royal-panel {
      position: relative;
      padding: clamp(26px, 4vw, 48px);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.96), rgba(245, 231, 200, 0.88));
      color: var(--ink);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.78);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.12),
        0 26px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }

    .royal-panel::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 14px;
      pointer-events: none;
      border: 1px solid rgba(90, 15, 34, 0.2);
    }

    .royal-panel h3 {
      color: var(--burgundy);
      font-family: "Great Vibes", cursive;
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 7vw, 5.4rem);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.9;
    }

    .royal-panel p {
      margin-top: 18px;
      color: rgba(37, 24, 15, 0.84);
      font-size: 1.08rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    /* --- Acto Banquete --- */
    .banquet {
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .banquet-orbit {
      width: min(1120px, 100%);
      min-height: 720px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }

    .banquet-center {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 3;
      width: min(560px, 100%);
      padding: clamp(28px, 4vw, 52px);
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--ink);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.35), transparent 42%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--ivory), var(--ivory-soft));
      border-radius: 50% 50% 18% 18% / 18% 18% 8% 8%;
      border: 2px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.8);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 9px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.16),
        0 35px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.36);
    }

    .banquet-center h2 {
      color: var(--burgundy);
    }

    .banquet-center p {
      margin-top: 16px;
      color: rgba(37, 24, 15, 0.78);
      font-size: 1.08rem;
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    .orbit-item {
      position: absolute;
      width: clamp(180px, 22vw, 270px);
      padding: 22px;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--ivory);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(90, 15, 34, 0.92), rgba(7, 20, 61, 0.9)),
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.18), transparent 56%);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.62);
      box-shadow: 0 22px 55px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
      transform: translate(var(--x), var(--y)) rotate(var(--r));
      transition: transform var(--transition), opacity var(--transition), filter var(--transition);
    }

    .orbit-item:hover {
      transform: translate(var(--x), var(--y)) rotate(0deg) scale(1.06);
      filter: brightness(1.1);
    }

    .orbit-item i {
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-size: 2rem;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .orbit-item h3 {
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .orbit-item p {
      margin-top: 10px;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.84);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    .orbit-one {
      --x: -390px;
      --y: -210px;
      --r: -8deg;
    }

    .orbit-two {
      --x: 380px;
      --y: -190px;
      --r: 8deg;
    }

    .orbit-three {
      --x: -360px;
      --y: 230px;
      --r: 7deg;
    }

    .orbit-four {
      --x: 370px;
      --y: 240px;
      --r: -7deg;
    }

    /* --- Acto Código de Vestimenta --- */
    .attire-layout {
      width: min(1120px, 100%);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 64px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .attire-cards {
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
    }

    .attire-card {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
      gap: 18px;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 20px;
      background: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.08);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.42);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 32px rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.05);
    }

    .attire-card span {
      width: 72px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-size: 2rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(90, 15, 34, 0.58);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.4);
    }

    .attire-card h3 {
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .attire-card p {
      margin-top: 6px;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.83);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    .royal-swatches {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 540px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }

    .swatch {
      position: absolute;
      width: clamp(170px, 23vw, 260px);
      aspect-ratio: 0.72;
      border: 2px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.62);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 12px rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.1),
        0 24px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
      transition: transform var(--transition);
    }

    .swatch:hover {
      transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.05) !important;
      z-index: 4;
    }

    .swatch.gold {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6f4a0a, var(--gold-bright), #9b6a17);
      transform: translate(-120px, -88px) rotate(-12deg);
    }

    .swatch.blue {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #031138, var(--royal-blue), #1f4da5);
      transform: translate(92px, -36px) rotate(9deg);
    }

    .swatch.burgundy {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #26040e, var(--burgundy), #8c1738);
      transform: translate(-20px, 108px) rotate(-3deg);
    }

    .swatch.ivory {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c9b487, var(--ivory), #f2dca8);
      transform: translate(138px, 128px) rotate(14deg);
    }

    /* --- Confirmación RSVP --- */
    .rsvp-layout {
      width: min(1100px, 100%);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.95fr 1.05fr;
      gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 72px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .rsvp-form {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      gap: 16px;
      padding: clamp(26px, 4vw, 46px);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.96), rgba(245, 231, 200, 0.9));
      color: var(--ink);
      border: 1px solid rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.8);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.12),
        0 30px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34);
    }

    .form-row {
      display: grid;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .form-row label {
      color: var(--burgundy);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .form-row input,
    .form-row textarea,
    .form-row select {
      width: 100%;
      min-height: 52px;
      padding: 12px 14px;
      color: var(--ink);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);
      border: 1px solid rgba(90, 15, 34, 0.22);
      outline: none;
      font-size: 1rem;
      transition: border-color var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition);
    }

    .form-row textarea {
      min-height: 110px;
      resize: vertical;
    }

    .form-row input:focus,
    .form-row textarea:focus,
    .form-row select:focus {
      border-color: var(--gold);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(214, 164, 58, 0.18);
    }

    .rsvp-message {
      min-height: 24px;
      color: var(--burgundy);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .seal-result {
      min-height: 420px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .wax-seal {
      width: min(360px, 76vw);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 48% 52% 50% 46%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.22), transparent 14%),
        radial-gradient(circle, #8c1738, var(--burgundy) 55%, #2c0510);
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      box-shadow:
        inset -18px -18px 42px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35),
        inset 10px 10px 30px rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.1),
        0 28px 70px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
      transform: rotate(-7deg);
    }

    .wax-seal-content {
      width: 74%;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px dashed rgba(248, 216, 120, 0.72);
      padding: 26px;
    }

    .wax-seal h3 {
      font-family: "Great Vibes", cursive;
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 8vw, 4.5rem);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.9;
    }

    .wax-seal p {
      margin-top: 10px;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.8);
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    footer {
      padding: 56px 20px 118px;
      text-align: center;
      color: rgba(255, 246, 223, 0.76);
      font-family: "Cinzel", serif;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* --- Animación Decretos Ensamblados --- */
    .glyph-spark {
      position: fixed;
      z-index: 20;
      pointer-events: none;
      color: var(--gold-bright);
      font-family: "Great Vibes", cursive;
      font-size: 2rem;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.6);
      animation: glyphRise 1100ms ease forwards;
    }

    @keyframes glyphRise {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(-50%, -20%) scale(0.5) rotate(-12deg);
      }

      30% {
        opacity: 1;
      }

      100% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(-50%, -180%) scale(1.4) rotate(12deg);
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Tablet --- */
    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .ceremony-grid,
      .attire-layout,
      .rsvp-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .antique-mirror {
        min-height: 520px;
      }

      .banquet-orbit {
        min-height: auto;
        display: grid;
        gap: 18px;
      }

      .banquet-center,
      .orbit-item {
        position: relative;
        width: min(620px, 100%);
        transform: none !important;
      }

      .orbit-item:hover {
        transform: scale(1.02) !important;
      }

      .royal-swatches {
        min-height: 460px;
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Mobile --- */
    @media (max-width: 680px) {
      :root {
        --frame: 10px;
      }

      .invitation-shell {
        padding: 16px;
      }

      section {
        padding: 78px 0;
      }

      .royal-nav {
        bottom: 12px;
        width: calc(100% - 18px);
        justify-content: flex-start;
        overflow-x: auto;
        border-radius: 18px;
      }

      .royal-nav a {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        padding: 10px 12px;
        font-size: 0.66rem;
      }

      .royal-nav a span {
        display: none;
      }

      .hero-stage {
        min-height: 760px;
        padding: 22px;
      }

      .names-decree {
        clip-path: polygon(4% 0, 96% 0, 100% 6%, 100% 94%, 96% 100%, 4% 100%, 0 94%, 0 6%);
      }

      .couple-names {
        font-size: clamp(3rem, 17vw, 4.8rem);
      }

      .hero-actions {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
      }

      .royal-button {
        width: 100%;
      }

      .antique-mirror {
        min-height: 430px;
        border-width: 10px;
      }

      .attire-card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .attire-card span {
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .royal-swatches {
        min-height: 380px;
      }

      .swatch {
        width: 150px;
      }

      .swatch.gold {
        transform: translate(-74px, -74px) rotate(-12deg);
      }

      .swatch.blue {
        transform: translate(64px, -30px) rotate(9deg);
      }

      .swatch.burgundy {
        transform: translate(-58px, 96px) rotate(-3deg);
      }

      .swatch.ivory {
        transform: translate(74px, 110px) rotate(14deg);
      }

      footer {
        padding-bottom: 100px;
      }
    }

    /* --- Accesibilidad Movimiento Reducido --- */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
        animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body class="is-locked">
  <!-- Preloader majestuoso con telón digital -->
  <div class="preloader" id="preloader" aria-label="Cargando invitación real">
    <div class="curtain curtain-left"></div>
    <div class="curtain curtain-right"></div>
    <div class="royal-loader-seal" id="openInvitation" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Abrir invitación">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fondo decorativo -->
  <div class="palace-atmosphere" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  <div class="versailles-frame" aria-hidden="true"></div>

  <!-- Navegación interna SPA -->
  <nav class="royal-nav" id="royalNav" aria-label="Navegación de la invitación">
    <a href="#inicio" class="is-active"><i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i><span>Inicio</span></a>
    <a href="#ceremonia"><i class="fa-solid fa-church"></i><span>Ceremonia</span></a>
    <a href="#banquete"><i class="fa-solid fa-champagne-glasses"></i><span>Banquete</span></a>
    <a href="#vestimenta"><i class="fa-solid fa-gem"></i><span>Vestimenta</span></a>
    <a href="#rsvp"><i class="fa-solid fa-feather"></i><span>RSVP</span></a>
  </nav>

  <div class="invitation-shell">
    <header class="hero" id="inicio">
      <section aria-labelledby="heroTitle">
        <div class="hero-stage">
          <div class="hero-content">
            <div class="royal-emblem" data-reveal="seal">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="section-kicker" data-reveal="">Por decreto de amor</p>

            <h1 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1" class="ornament-title" id="heroTitle" data-reveal="">
              Gran Baile Real
            </h1>

            <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2" class="hero-subtitle" data-reveal="">
              En el resplandor de los salones dorados, bajo la gracia de una noche irrepetible,
              se convoca a celebrar la unión de dos corazones.
            </p>

            <div class="names-decree" data-reveal="fold">
              <div class="couple-names">
                <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4">Isabella</span>
                <small>&</small>
                <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-5">Santiago</span>
              </div>
              <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="hero-date">Sábado · 21 de Septiembre · 2026</p>
            </div>

            <div class="hero-actions" data-reveal="">
              <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-1" href="#ceremonia" class="royal-button">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-scroll"></i>
                Ver decreto
              </a>
              <button data-gemini-id="portada-boton-1" class="royal-button secondary" id="summonGlyphs" type="button">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i>
                Invocar sello
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Sección Ceremonia -->
      <section id="ceremonia" aria-labelledby="ceremonyTitle">
        <div class="ceremony-grid">
          <div class="antique-mirror" data-reveal="mirror">
            <div class="mirror-card">
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-1" class="section-kicker">Acto Primero</p>
              <h2 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-1" class="section-heading" id="ceremonyTitle">Ceremonia</h2>
              <div class="time">18:30</div>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-2" class="place">
                Capilla del Gran Palacio<br>
                Salón de los Espejos
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="ceremony-content">
            <article class="royal-panel" data-reveal="fold">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-2">La Promesa</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-3">
                Las puertas se abrirán con puntualidad cortesana. Cada invitado será recibido
                entre molduras doradas, música de cámara y una atmósfera creada para presenciar
                el instante en que dos historias se convierten en una sola.
              </p>
            </article>

            <article class="royal-panel" data-reveal="fold">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-3">Ubicación</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-4">
                Palacio Real de Versalles · Jardines del Ala Este<br>
                Entrada por la Galería Imperial. Servicio de valet disponible desde las 17:45.
              </p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Sección Banquete -->
      <section class="banquet" id="banquete" aria-labelledby="banquetTitle">
        <div class="banquet-orbit">
          <article class="orbit-item orbit-one" data-reveal="">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-music"></i>
            <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-2">Orquesta</h3>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-1">Vals ceremonial, cuerdas barrocas y gran apertura de salón.</p>
          </article>

          <article id="inferred-itinerario-7" class="orbit-item orbit-two" data-reveal="">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-utensils"></i>
            <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-3">Banquete</h3>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-2">Menú de tres tiempos inspirado en cenas reales del siglo XVIII.</p>
          </article>

          <article class="banquet-center" data-reveal="seal">
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-3" class="section-kicker">Acto Segundo</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-1" class="section-heading" id="banquetTitle">Recepción</h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-4">
              Después de la ceremonia, la celebración continuará con una cena majestuosa,
              brindis solemne y baile bajo candelabros dorados.
            </p>
          </article>

          <article class="orbit-item orbit-three" data-reveal="">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-camera-retro"></i>
            <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-4">Retratos</h3>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-5">Estación fotográfica con marco antiguo y composición editorial.</p>
          </article>

          <article class="orbit-item orbit-four" data-reveal="">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-moon"></i>
            <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-5">Gran Baile</h3>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-6">La pista se abrirá con una pieza especial a las 21:30.</p>
          </article>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Sección Vestimenta -->
      <section id="vestimenta" aria-labelledby="attireTitle">
        <div class="attire-layout">
          <div data-reveal="">
            <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-1" class="section-kicker">Acto Tercero</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="vestimenta-titulo-1" class="section-heading" id="attireTitle">Etiqueta Real</h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-2" class="royal-copy">
              La noche pide presencia ceremonial: texturas nobles, siluetas elegantes
              y colores que dialoguen con el oro, el marfil, el azul rey y el borgoña profundo.
            </p>

            <div class="attire-cards">
              <article class="attire-card" data-reveal="fold">
                <span data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-5"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-tie"></i></span>
                <div>
                  <h3 data-gemini-id="vestimenta-titulo-2">Caballeros</h3>
                  <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-3">Traje formal oscuro, smoking o conjunto ceremonial en tonos profundos.</p>
                </div>
              </article>

              <article class="attire-card" data-reveal="fold">
                <span data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-6"><i class="fa-solid fa-person-dress"></i></span>
                <div>
                  <h3 data-gemini-id="vestimenta-titulo-3">Damas</h3>
                  <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-4">Vestido largo, piezas satinadas, detalles dorados o accesorios de gala.</p>
                </div>
              </article>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="royal-swatches" data-reveal="mirror" aria-label="Paleta de colores sugerida">
            <div class="swatch gold" title="Oro ducado"></div>
            <div class="swatch blue" title="Azul rey"></div>
            <div class="swatch burgundy" title="Borgoña profundo"></div>
            <div class="swatch ivory" title="Blanco marfil"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Sección RSVP -->
      <section id="rsvp" aria-labelledby="rsvpTitle">
        <div class="rsvp-layout">
          <div data-reveal="">
            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="section-kicker">Acto Final</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1" class="section-heading" id="rsvpTitle">Confirmación</h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2" class="royal-copy">
              Tu presencia será parte del decreto. Confirma asistencia y deja un mensaje
              para que sea integrado al libro ceremonial de los invitados.
            </p>

            <div class="seal-result" data-reveal="seal">
              <div class="wax-seal">
                <div class="wax-seal-content">
                  <div>
                    <h3 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-2">RSVP</h3>
                    <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-3">Respuesta solicitada antes del 10 de septiembre.</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <form class="rsvp-form" id="rsvpForm" data-reveal="fold">
            <div class="form-row">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-1" for="guestName">Nombre del invitado</label>
              <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-2" type="text" id="guestName" name="guestName" placeholder="Escribe tu nombre completo" required>
            </div>

            <div class="form-row">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-2" for="guestCount">Número de asistentes</label>
              <select id="guestCount" name="guestCount" required>
                <option value="">Seleccionar</option>
                <option value="1">1 asistente</option>
                <option value="2">2 asistentes</option>
                <option value="3">3 asistentes</option>
                <option value="4">4 asistentes</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div class="form-row">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-3" for="attendance">Respuesta</label>
              <select id="attendance" name="attendance" required>
                <option value="">Seleccionar</option>
                <option value="confirmado">Confirmo con honor</option>
                <option value="pendiente">Responderé pronto</option>
                <option value="no-asiste">No podré asistir</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div class="form-row">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-4" for="message">Mensaje ceremonial</label>
              <textarea data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-1" id="message" name="message" placeholder="Escribe un deseo para los anfitriones"></textarea>
            </div>

            <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="royal-button" type="submit">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-feather-pointed"></i>
              Sellar respuesta
            </button>

            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-4" class="rsvp-message" id="rsvpMessage" aria-live="polite"></p>
          </form>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>

    <footer>
      Invitación digital barroca · Palacio de Versalles · Una noche escrita en oro
    </footer>
  </div>

  <script>
    /* =========================================================
       JS: Interactividad SPA, preloader, revelados y formulario
    ========================================================= */

    // --- Utilidades DOM ---
    const $ = (selector, scope = document) => scope.querySelector(selector);
    const $$ = (selector, scope = document) => Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll(selector));

    // --- Preloader con telón teatral ---
    const preloader = $("#preloader");
    const openInvitation = $("#openInvitation");
    const royalNav = $("#royalNav");

    const openCurtain = () => {
      preloader.classList.add("is-opening");

      window.setTimeout(() => {
        preloader.classList.add("is-hidden");
        document.body.classList.remove("is-locked");
        royalNav.classList.add("is-visible");
      }, 1380);
    };

    openInvitation.addEventListener("click", openCurtain);

    openInvitation.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
        event.preventDefault();
        openCurtain();
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener("load", () => {
      window.setTimeout(openCurtain, 1300);
    });

    // --- Revelado No Lineal con Intersection Observer ---
    const revealItems = $$("[data-reveal]");

    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

          const element = entry.target;
          const delay = revealItems.indexOf(element) % 5;

          window.setTimeout(() => {
            element.classList.add("is-visible");
          }, delay * 130);

          revealObserver.unobserve(element);
        });
      },
      {
        threshold: 0.22,
        rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
      }
    );

    revealItems.forEach((item) => revealObserver.observe(item));

    // --- Navegación Activa por Sección ---
    const sections = $$("header, main section");
    const navLinks = $$(".royal-nav a");

    const navObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

          const id = entry.target.getAttribute("id");

          navLinks.forEach((link) => {
            link.classList.toggle("is-active", link.getAttribute("href") === `#${id}`);
          });
        });
      },
      {
        threshold: 0.46
      }
    );

    sections.forEach((section) => navObserver.observe(section));

    // --- Microinteracción: Glifos Barrocos desde el Sello ---
    const summonGlyphs = $("#summonGlyphs");
    const glyphs = ["♛", "❦", "✦", "♜", "✧", "❧"];

    const createGlyph = (x, y) => {
      const glyph = document.createElement("span");
      glyph.className = "glyph-spark";
      glyph.textContent = glyphs[Math.floor(Math.random() * glyphs.length)];
      glyph.style.left = `${x + (Math.random() * 90 - 45)}px`;
      glyph.style.top = `${y + (Math.random() * 50 - 25)}px`;
      glyph.style.animationDelay = `${Math.random() * 260}ms`;

      document.body.appendChild(glyph);

      glyph.addEventListener("animationend", () => {
        glyph.remove();
      });
    };

    summonGlyphs.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      const rect = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();
      const originX = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
      const originY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;

      for (let i = 0; i < 18; i += 1) {
        createGlyph(originX, originY);
      }
    });

    // --- Formulario RSVP con Validación Ligera ---
    const rsvpForm = $("#rsvpForm");
    const rsvpMessage = $("#rsvpMessage");

    rsvpForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();

      const formData = new FormData(rsvpForm);
      const guestName = String(formData.get("guestName")).trim();
      const guestCount = String(formData.get("guestCount")).trim();
      const attendance = String(formData.get("attendance")).trim();

      if (!guestName || !guestCount || !attendance) {
        rsvpMessage.textContent = "Falta completar un campo del decreto.";
        return;
      }

      const attendanceLabels = {
        "confirmado": "ha confirmado con honor",
        "pendiente": "responderá pronto",
        "no-asiste": "no podrá asistir"
      };

      rsvpMessage.textContent = `${guestName} ${attendanceLabels[attendance]}. El sello real ha sido colocado.`;

      const rect = rsvpForm.getBoundingClientRect();
      for (let i = 0; i < 12; i += 1) {
        createGlyph(rect.left + rect.width / 2, rect.top + 70);
      }

      rsvpForm.reset();
    });

    // --- Ensamble visual controlado por scroll ---
    let lastKnownScroll = 0;
    let ticking = false;

    const animatePalaceFrame = () => {
      const scrollRatio = Math.min(window.scrollY / Math.max(document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight, 1), 1);
      const frame = $(".versailles-frame");

      frame.style.transform = `scale(${1 - scrollRatio * 0.018})`;
      frame.style.filter = `brightness(${1 + scrollRatio * 0.18})`;

      ticking = false;
    };

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
      lastKnownScroll = window.scrollY;

      if (!ticking) {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(animatePalaceFrame);
        ticking = true;
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética boho chic con tonos terracota, tipografía Cormorant Garamond y elementos botánicos. Atmósfera de desierto al atardecer.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital Boho Chic Desierto Atardecer">
  <title>Invitación Boho Chic · Desierto Atardecer</title>

  <!-- CDN externas -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Marcellus&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
       METÁFORA VISUAL:
       "Un santuario de arena que se arma con el viento".
       La información aparece como capas textiles, dunas y arcos
       que se desplazan, se pliegan y se sellan con una acción final.
    ========================================================= */

    /* --- Reset y Variables --- */
    :root {
      --sand: #f2dfc7;
      --sun-clay: #c8784f;
      --burnt: #8d4f38;
      --terracotta: #b66346;
      --rose-dust: #d9a795;
      --pampas: #ead7b8;
      --linen: #fff5e8;
      --espresso: #3b251d;
      --date: #6d4432;
      --sage: #9c9676;
      --ochre: #d6a65f;
      --shadow: rgba(59, 37, 29, .22);
      --soft-shadow: rgba(59, 37, 29, .12);
      --radius-xl: 42px;
      --radius-md: 24px;
      --transition-silk: cubic-bezier(.18, .82, .24, 1);
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      color: var(--espresso);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, rgba(216, 147, 105, .38), transparent 26%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 84% 18%, rgba(245, 204, 153, .45), transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(155deg, #f7e7d0 0%, #f0cda4 36%, #cc7d58 72%, #7a4533 100%);
    }

    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -3;
      pointer-events: none;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(255,255,255,.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 32px 32px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black 0 48%, transparent 76%);
    }

    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -2;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: .42;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(
          112deg,
          rgba(255,255,255,.11) 0 1px,
          transparent 1px 9px
        );
      mix-blend-mode: soft-light;
    }

    img {
      display: block;
      max-width: 100%;
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    button {
      border: 0;
      font: inherit;
      color: inherit;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: transparent;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: var(--burnt);
      color: var(--linen);
    }

    /* --- Utilidades Generales --- */
    .page {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 100vh;
      isolation: isolate;
    }

    .section-label {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: .7rem;
      font-size: .76rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: .24em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--date);
    }

    .section-label::before,
    .section-label::after {
      content: "";
      width: 34px;
      height: 1px;
      background: currentColor;
      transform-origin: center;
    }

    .serif {
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
    }

    .marcellus {
      font-family: "Marcellus", serif;
    }

    .grain-card {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 245, 232, .45);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 245, 232, .78), rgba(234, 215, 184, .42)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(95deg, rgba(141, 79, 56, .06) 0 2px, transparent 2px 10px);
      box-shadow: 0 24px 70px var(--soft-shadow);
    }

    .grain-card::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: .18;
      background-image:
        radial-gradient(circle, rgba(59,37,29,.22) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 10px 10px;
      mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    }

    /* --- Navegación --- */
    .desert-nav {
      position: fixed;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 22px;
      z-index: 30;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: .35rem;
      width: min(92vw, 620px);
      padding: .5rem;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 245, 232, .48);
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(83, 47, 34, .72);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(42, 24, 17, .2);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
    }

    .desert-nav a {
      flex: 1;
      position: relative;
      padding: .78rem .72rem;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: rgba(255, 245, 232, .78);
      font-size: .75rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      text-align: center;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: color .45s var(--transition-silk), transform .45s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .desert-nav a::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 8px;
      z-index: -1;
      border-radius: inherit;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pampas), var(--rose-dust));
      transform: scaleX(0);
      transform-origin: left center;
      transition: transform .55s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .desert-nav a:hover,
    .desert-nav a.active {
      color: var(--espresso);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    .desert-nav a:hover::before,
    .desert-nav a.active::before {
      transform: scaleX(1);
    }

    /* --- Elementos Decorativos Orgánicos --- */
    .sun-disc {
      position: fixed;
      top: 7vh;
      right: 8vw;
      z-index: -1;
      width: clamp(170px, 22vw, 330px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 42% 34%, #ffd9a6 0 12%, #d78a5b 38%, #8e4b37 70%);
      box-shadow: 0 0 90px rgba(199, 120, 79, .35);
      opacity: .52;
      filter: blur(.2px);
      transform: translateY(calc(var(--scroll, 0) * .08px));
    }

    .woven-rug {
      position: fixed;
      left: -9vw;
      bottom: -26vh;
      z-index: -1;
      width: min(70vw, 760px);
      height: 52vh;
      transform: rotate(-9deg) translateY(calc(var(--scroll, 0) * -.04px));
      border-radius: 46% 54% 42% 58%;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(79, 41, 30, .18) 0 12px, rgba(255,245,232,.08) 12px 18px, rgba(188, 93, 66, .22) 18px 29px),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 13px, rgba(255,245,232,.18) 13px 14px),
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(141, 79, 56, .52), rgba(216, 166, 95, .24));
      opacity: .55;
      filter: blur(.2px);
    }

    .pampas-field {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -1;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .pampas-stem {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -70px;
      width: 2px;
      height: var(--h);
      background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(93, 58, 41, .45), rgba(255, 245, 232, .14));
      transform: translateX(var(--x)) rotate(var(--r));
      transform-origin: bottom;
      opacity: .55;
      animation: stemBreath var(--d) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }

    .pampas-stem::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      top: -22px;
      left: 50%;
      width: var(--w);
      height: calc(var(--w) * 1.9);
      border-radius: 50% 50% 45% 45%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 15%, rgba(255,245,232,.82), transparent 42%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(78deg, rgba(234,215,184,.86) 0 2px, rgba(176,132,91,.2) 2px 3px, transparent 3px 6px);
      filter: blur(.15px);
      transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(calc(var(--r) * -.38));
      box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(59,37,29,.09);
    }

    @keyframes stemBreath {
      from {
        rotate: -1.5deg;
      }

      to {
        rotate: 1.8deg;
      }
    }

    /* --- Hero --- */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.05fr) minmax(320px, .95fr);
      align-items: center;
      gap: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 6rem);
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 5.5rem);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-copy {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      max-width: 760px;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-grid;
      grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
      gap: .8rem;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
      color: var(--date);
      font-size: .78rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .25em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .eyebrow span:last-child {
      display: block;
      width: 110px;
      height: 1px;
      background: currentColor;
    }

    .hero h1 {
      max-width: 720px;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(4.6rem, 11vw, 11.5rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .78;
      letter-spacing: -.065em;
      color: var(--espresso);
    }

    .hero h1 .name {
      display: block;
      transform: translateX(clamp(1rem, 6vw, 5rem));
      color: var(--burnt);
      font-style: italic;
    }

    .hero-date {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      align-items: center;
      gap: .9rem;
      margin: 2rem 0 1.6rem;
      font-family: "Marcellus", serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .date-stamp {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      min-width: 78px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50% 50% 48% 52%;
      color: var(--linen);
      background: var(--espresso);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 34px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
    }

    .hero-text {
      max-width: 570px;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.15rem);
      line-height: 1.9;
      color: rgba(59, 37, 29, .82);
    }

    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 1rem;
      margin-top: 2.1rem;
    }

    .sand-button {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: .7rem;
      min-height: 54px;
      padding: 0 1.35rem;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--linen);
      font-size: .82rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .13em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      background: var(--espresso);
      box-shadow: 0 20px 44px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
      transition: transform .45s var(--transition-silk), box-shadow .45s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .sand-button::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -40% -20%;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(98deg, transparent 0 11px, rgba(255,245,232,.18) 11px 12px);
      transform: translateX(-35%) rotate(8deg);
      transition: transform .7s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .sand-button span,
    .sand-button i {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .sand-button:hover {
      transform: translateY(-4px) rotate(-.5deg);
      box-shadow: 0 28px 54px rgba(59,37,29,.24);
    }

    .sand-button:hover::before {
      transform: translateX(18%) rotate(8deg);
    }

    .sand-button.alt {
      color: var(--espresso);
      background: rgba(255, 245, 232, .68);
      border: 1px solid rgba(59,37,29,.14);
    }

    .hero-altar {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 560px;
    }

    .arch-frame {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 6% 5% auto auto;
      width: min(88%, 480px);
      height: min(74vh, 640px);
      border-radius: 48% 48% 28px 28px;
      padding: 1.1rem;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,245,232,.92), rgba(224,178,133,.44)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(141,79,56,.12) 0 2px, transparent 2px 8px);
      box-shadow: 0 34px 80px rgba(59,37,29,.22);
      transform: rotate(2.4deg);
    }

    .arch-frame::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 18px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(141,79,56,.22);
      border-radius: inherit;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .photo-portal {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 46% 46% 22px 22px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(rgba(59,37,29,.05), rgba(59,37,29,.12)),
        url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1511285560929-80b456fea0bc?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1100&q=80") center/cover;
      filter: saturate(.9) contrast(.98);
    }

    .photo-portal::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        linear-gradient(20deg, rgba(141,79,56,.35), transparent 44%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 16%, rgba(255,228,186,.36), transparent 34%);
      mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    }

    .floating-rug {
      position: absolute;
      left: -2%;
      bottom: 8%;
      z-index: 3;
      width: 58%;
      min-height: 156px;
      padding: 1.4rem;
      border-radius: 34px 34px 90px 34px;
      color: var(--linen);
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,245,232,.18) 0 7px, transparent 7px 12px),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #7d3f32, #bf6546 64%, #d6a65f);
      box-shadow: 0 22px 44px rgba(59,37,29,.24);
      transform: rotate(-7deg);
    }

    .floating-rug small {
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: .55rem;
      font-size: .68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: .78;
    }

    .floating-rug strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.8rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .9;
    }

    .clay-moon {
      position: absolute;
      top: 1%;
      left: 0;
      width: 150px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 36% 30%, #f7d2a5 0 18%, #b66346 62%, #7c3f30 100%);
      box-shadow: inset -18px -20px 32px rgba(59,37,29,.18), 0 24px 60px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
      animation: clayOrbit 9s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }

    @keyframes clayOrbit {
      from {
        transform: translateY(0) rotate(-9deg);
      }

      to {
        transform: translateY(28px) rotate(7deg);
      }
    }

    /* --- Secciones Base --- */
    main {
      position: relative;
    }

    .panel {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
      padding: clamp(5rem, 8vw, 8rem) clamp(1.4rem, 5vw, 5rem);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .reveal-weave {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(70px) rotateX(18deg) scale(.96);
      transform-origin: 50% 100%;
      filter: blur(10px);
      transition:
        opacity .9s var(--transition-silk),
        transform 1.05s var(--transition-silk),
        filter 1s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .reveal-weave.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) rotateX(0) scale(1);
      filter: blur(0);
    }

    /* --- Historia / Datos --- */
    .details-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, .85fr) minmax(320px, 1.15fr);
      gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
      align-items: center;
      width: min(1180px, 100%);
    }

    .story-card {
      min-height: 540px;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    }

    .story-card h2 {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 8vw, 7rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .78;
      letter-spacing: -.055em;
      color: var(--burnt);
    }

    .story-card h2 span {
      display: block;
      color: var(--espresso);
      font-style: italic;
      transform: translateX(12%);
    }

    .story-card p {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      margin-top: 2rem;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.95;
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.82);
    }

    .arch-stack {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 620px;
    }

    .info-arch {
      position: absolute;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      width: min(74vw, 360px);
      height: 430px;
      padding: 2rem;
      border-radius: 50% 50% 28px 28px;
      box-shadow: 0 24px 54px rgba(59,37,29,.15);
      transition: transform .75s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .info-arch:nth-child(1) {
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      z-index: 3;
      color: var(--linen);
      background:
        linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(59,37,29,.22), rgba(59,37,29,.74)),
        url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1529636798458-92182e662485?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80") center/cover;
      transform: rotate(-5deg);
    }

    .info-arch:nth-child(2) {
      top: 90px;
      right: 0;
      z-index: 2;
      color: var(--espresso);
      background:
        linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,245,232,.72), rgba(216,166,95,.32)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(141,79,56,.12) 0 1px, transparent 1px 8px);
      transform: rotate(5deg);
    }

    .info-arch:nth-child(3) {
      left: 12%;
      bottom: 0;
      z-index: 4;
      color: var(--linen);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(126,65,47,.96), rgba(190,100,70,.82)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,245,232,.12) 0 2px, transparent 2px 10px);
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
    }

    .info-arch:hover {
      transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(0deg) scale(1.02);
    }

    .info-arch small {
      margin-bottom: .6rem;
      font-size: .72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: .75;
    }

    .info-arch strong {
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .88;
    }

    .info-arch p {
      margin-top: .8rem;
      font-size: .92rem;
      line-height: 1.65;
      opacity: .86;
    }

    /* --- Itinerario --- */
    .timeline-wrap {
      width: min(1100px, 100%);
      text-align: center;
    }

    .timeline-wrap h2 {
      margin: 1rem auto 3rem;
      max-width: 760px;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 7rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .88;
      letter-spacing: -.05em;
    }

    .woven-timeline {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 1rem;
      text-align: left;
    }

    .woven-timeline::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      top: 74px;
      left: 6%;
      right: 6%;
      height: 18px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--terracotta) 0 18px, var(--ochre) 18px 28px, var(--pampas) 28px 42px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(59,37,29,.16);
      transform: rotate(-1deg);
    }

    .timeline-knot {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      min-height: 360px;
      padding: 1.35rem;
      border-radius: 999px 999px 30px 30px;
      background: rgba(255,245,232,.52);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,245,232,.46);
      box-shadow: 0 20px 48px rgba(59,37,29,.12);
      transform: translateY(var(--lift));
      transition: transform .6s var(--transition-silk), background .6s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .timeline-knot:hover {
      transform: translateY(calc(var(--lift) - 18px));
      background: rgba(255,245,232,.72);
    }

    .knot-orb {
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: 96px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      margin: 0 auto 1.2rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--linen);
      font-family: "Marcellus", serif;
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 25%, var(--rose-dust), var(--burnt) 70%);
      box-shadow: inset -10px -12px 24px rgba(59,37,29,.2), 0 18px 36px rgba(59,37,29,.16);
    }

    .timeline-knot h3 {
      margin-bottom: .8rem;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      line-height: .9;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .timeline-knot p {
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.78);
      font-size: .95rem;
      line-height: 1.7;
      text-align: center;
    }

    /* --- Galería No Lineal --- */
    .gallery {
      width: min(1180px, 100%);
    }

    .gallery-head {
      display: flex;
      align-items: end;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 2rem;
      margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }

    .gallery-head h2 {
      max-width: 640px;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6.6rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .82;
      letter-spacing: -.05em;
    }

    .gallery-head p {
      max-width: 330px;
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.72);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    .memory-mosaic {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr .85fr 1.15fr;
      grid-template-rows: 260px 150px 260px;
      gap: 1rem;
      min-height: 680px;
    }

    .memory-tile {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 10px solid rgba(255,245,232,.58);
      background: var(--pampas);
      box-shadow: 0 24px 54px rgba(59,37,29,.14);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition:
        transform .7s var(--transition-silk),
        border-radius .7s var(--transition-silk),
        filter .7s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .memory-tile img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      filter: sepia(.14) saturate(.85) contrast(.97);
      transform: scale(1.08);
      transition: transform .9s var(--transition-silk), filter .9s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .memory-tile::after {
      content: attr(data-caption);
      position: absolute;
      left: 1rem;
      right: 1rem;
      bottom: 1rem;
      padding: .9rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--linen);
      font-size: .78rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .13em;
      text-align: center;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      background: rgba(59,37,29,.58);
      transform: translateY(130%);
      transition: transform .55s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .memory-tile:hover img,
    .memory-tile.unfolded img {
      transform: scale(1);
      filter: sepia(.04) saturate(1) contrast(1);
    }

    .memory-tile:hover::after,
    .memory-tile.unfolded::after {
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .memory-tile:nth-child(1) {
      grid-column: 1 / 2;
      grid-row: 1 / 3;
      border-radius: 48% 48% 24px 24px;
      transform: rotate(-2deg);
    }

    .memory-tile:nth-child(2) {
      grid-column: 2 / 4;
      grid-row: 1 / 2;
      border-radius: 28px 130px 28px 28px;
      transform: rotate(1deg);
    }

    .memory-tile:nth-child(3) {
      grid-column: 2 / 3;
      grid-row: 2 / 4;
      border-radius: 999px 999px 32px 32px;
      transform: rotate(3deg);
    }

    .memory-tile:nth-child(4) {
      grid-column: 3 / 4;
      grid-row: 2 / 4;
      border-radius: 28px 28px 50% 50%;
      transform: rotate(-1.7deg);
    }

    .memory-tile.unfolded {
      z-index: 7;
      transform: scale(1.045) rotate(0deg);
      border-radius: 42px;
    }

    /* --- Ubicación --- */
    .place-card {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: .95fr 1.05fr;
      gap: 2rem;
      align-items: stretch;
      width: min(1120px, 100%);
      padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.35rem);
      border-radius: 52px;
    }

    .map-ritual {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 520px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-radius: 42px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(rgba(59,37,29,.12), rgba(59,37,29,.28)),
        url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500530855697-b586d89ba3ee?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1100&q=80") center/cover;
    }

    .map-ritual::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 10%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,245,232,.56);
      border-radius: 50% 50% 30px 30px;
    }

    .route-thread {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .route-thread path {
      fill: none;
      stroke: var(--linen);
      stroke-width: 4;
      stroke-linecap: round;
      stroke-dasharray: 720;
      stroke-dashoffset: 720;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 16px rgba(59,37,29,.35));
      transition: stroke-dashoffset 1.8s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .map-ritual.visible .route-thread path {
      stroke-dashoffset: 0;
    }

    .pin {
      position: absolute;
      left: 55%;
      top: 48%;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: 72px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 6px;
      color: var(--linen);
      background: var(--burnt);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 34px rgba(59,37,29,.34);
      transform: rotate(-45deg) scale(.7);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity .8s .7s var(--transition-silk), transform .8s .7s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .pin i {
      transform: rotate(45deg);
      font-size: 1.4rem;
    }

    .map-ritual.visible .pin {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: rotate(-45deg) scale(1);
    }

    .place-copy {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 4rem);
    }

    .place-copy h2 {
      margin: 1rem 0 1.4rem;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 6.8vw, 6.4rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .84;
      letter-spacing: -.05em;
    }

    .place-copy p {
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.78);
      font-size: 1.03rem;
      line-height: 1.9;
    }

    .place-list {
      display: grid;
      gap: 1rem;
      margin: 2rem 0;
    }

    .place-item {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 48px 1fr;
      gap: 1rem;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 1rem;
      border-radius: 22px;
      background: rgba(255,245,232,.44);
      border: 1px solid rgba(59,37,29,.08);
    }

    .place-item i {
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: 48px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--linen);
      background: var(--terracotta);
    }

    .place-item strong {
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: .18rem;
      font-family: "Marcellus", serif;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
    }

    .place-item span {
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.68);
      font-size: .93rem;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    /* --- RSVP como Resolución --- */
    .rsvp-stage {
      width: min(980px, 100%);
      text-align: center;
    }

    .rsvp-stage h2 {
      margin: 1rem auto 1rem;
      max-width: 820px;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7.5rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .8;
      letter-spacing: -.055em;
    }

    .rsvp-stage > p {
      max-width: 620px;
      margin: 0 auto 2rem;
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.76);
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.9;
    }

    .seal-box {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      min-height: 540px;
      margin-top: 2rem;
    }

    .textile-scroll {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(86vw, 720px);
      min-height: 330px;
      border-radius: 42px;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(141,79,56,.09) 0 2px, transparent 2px 12px),
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,245,232,.92), rgba(234,215,184,.72));
      box-shadow: 0 28px 70px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
      transform: rotate(-2deg);
      transition: transform 1s var(--transition-silk), filter 1s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .textile-scroll::before,
    .textile-scroll::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      top: 24px;
      bottom: 24px;
      width: 18px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--burnt) 0 14px, var(--ochre) 14px 22px, var(--pampas) 22px 32px);
      opacity: .7;
    }

    .textile-scroll::before {
      left: 24px;
    }

    .textile-scroll::after {
      right: 24px;
    }

    .seal-orbit {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 4;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: min(78vw, 360px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
