        conic-gradient(from var(--angle, 0deg), #8d4f38, #d6a65f, #ead7b8, #c8784f, #8d4f38);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 16px rgba(255,245,232,.38),
        inset 0 0 0 18px rgba(59,37,29,.08),
        0 34px 80px rgba(59,37,29,.22);
      user-select: none;
      touch-action: none;
      transition: transform .6s var(--transition-silk), opacity .6s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .seal-orbit::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 42px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%, rgba(255,245,232,.95), transparent 22%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #bb6547, #7b3f31);
      box-shadow: inset -18px -20px 32px rgba(59,37,29,.26);
    }

    .seal-orbit::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 82px;
      border: 1px dashed rgba(255,245,232,.56);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: slowTurn 14s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes slowTurn {
      to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }

    .seal-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 5;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      width: 54%;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--linen);
      text-align: center;
    }

    .seal-content i {
      margin-bottom: .7rem;
      font-size: 2rem;
    }

    .seal-content strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      line-height: .9;
    }

    .seal-content small {
      display: block;
      margin-top: .65rem;
      font-size: .62rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      opacity: .8;
    }

    .seal-instructions {
      position: absolute;
      z-index: 6;
      bottom: 26px;
      left: 50%;
      width: min(90vw, 540px);
      padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      color: var(--linen);
      background: rgba(59,37,29,.72);
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: .8rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
    }

    .confirmation-message {
      position: absolute;
      z-index: 7;
      width: min(88vw, 620px);
      padding: 2rem;
      border-radius: 36px;
      color: var(--espresso);
      background: rgba(255,245,232,.92);
      box-shadow: 0 28px 80px rgba(59,37,29,.18);
      transform: translateY(40px) scale(.92);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition:
        opacity .9s var(--transition-silk),
        transform .9s var(--transition-silk);
    }

    .confirmation-message h3 {
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 6vw, 4.8rem);
      font-weight: 500;
      line-height: .86;
      color: var(--burnt);
    }

    .confirmation-message p {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      color: rgba(59,37,29,.72);
      line-height: 1.8;
    }

    .page.confirmed .seal-orbit {
      transform: scale(.72) rotate(24deg);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .page.confirmed .textile-scroll {
      transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.04);
      filter: saturate(1.08);
    }

    .page.confirmed .confirmation-message {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
    }

    .page.confirmed .seal-instructions {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(18px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .settled-petal {
      position: fixed;
      z-index: 40;
      width: 10px;
      height: 20px;
      border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 8px;
      background: var(--pampas);
      pointer-events: none;
      animation: petalSettle 1.2s var(--transition-silk) forwards;
    }

    @keyframes petalSettle {
      0% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg) scale(.3);
      }

      30% {
        opacity: 1;
      }

      100% {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(var(--tx), var(--ty)) rotate(var(--rot)) scale(1);
      }
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    footer {
      padding: 3rem 1.5rem 7rem;
      color: rgba(255,245,232,.8);
      text-align: center;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(59,37,29,.72));
    }

    footer p {
      font-size: .8rem;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* --- Animaciones de Entrada Fragmentada --- */
    .split-word {
      display: inline-block;
      overflow: hidden;
      vertical-align: top;
    }

    .split-word span {
      display: inline-block;
      transform: translateY(115%) rotate(8deg);
      animation: wordRise .9s var(--transition-silk) forwards;
      animation-delay: calc(var(--i) * 90ms);
    }

    @keyframes wordRise {
      to {
        transform: translateY(0) rotate(0);
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive --- */
    @media (max-width: 1020px) {
      .hero,
      .details-grid,
      .place-card {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .hero {
        padding-bottom: 7rem;
      }

      .hero-altar {
        min-height: 620px;
      }

      .arch-frame {
        left: 50%;
        right: auto;
        transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(2deg);
      }

      .clay-moon {
        left: 9%;
      }

      .woven-timeline {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      }

      .woven-timeline::before {
        display: none;
      }

      .timeline-knot {
        min-height: 300px;
        transform: none;
      }

      .timeline-knot:hover {
        transform: translateY(-12px);
      }

      .gallery-head {
        align-items: start;
        flex-direction: column;
      }

      .memory-mosaic {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 220px);
        min-height: auto;
      }

      .memory-tile:nth-child(1),
      .memory-tile:nth-child(2),
      .memory-tile:nth-child(3),
      .memory-tile:nth-child(4) {
        grid-column: auto;
        grid-row: auto;
      }

      .place-card {
        padding: .9rem;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 720px) {
      .desert-nav {
        gap: .15rem;
        width: calc(100vw - 20px);
        bottom: 10px;
      }

      .desert-nav a {
        padding: .7rem .25rem;
        font-size: .62rem;
        letter-spacing: .04em;
      }

      .hero {
        min-height: auto;
        padding: 2rem 1.15rem 6.8rem;
      }

      .hero h1 {
        font-size: clamp(4.4rem, 23vw, 7.4rem);
      }

      .hero h1 .name {
        transform: translateX(0);
      }

      .hero-actions {
        flex-direction: column;
      }

      .sand-button {
        width: 100%;
      }

      .hero-altar {
        min-height: 520px;
      }

      .arch-frame {
        width: 92%;
        height: 500px;
      }

      .floating-rug {
        left: 0;
        bottom: 3%;
        width: 76%;
      }

      .clay-moon {
        width: 112px;
      }

      .panel {
        min-height: auto;
        padding: 5rem 1.1rem;
      }

      .story-card {
        min-height: auto;
        padding: 2rem;
      }

      .arch-stack {
        min-height: 850px;
      }

      .info-arch {
        position: relative;
        top: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
        right: auto !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        width: 100%;
        height: 300px;
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
        transform: rotate(0deg) !important;
      }

      .woven-timeline {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .timeline-knot {
        border-radius: 42px;
      }

      .memory-mosaic {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 260px);
      }

      .memory-tile:nth-child(n) {
        border-radius: 36px;
        transform: rotate(0);
      }

      .map-ritual {
        min-height: 380px;
      }

      .place-copy {
        padding: 1.4rem;
      }

      .seal-box {
        min-height: 500px;
      }

      .seal-orbit {
        width: min(82vw, 300px);
      }

      .seal-content strong {
        font-size: 1.8rem;
      }

      .seal-instructions {
        border-radius: 28px;
        font-size: .68rem;
        line-height: 1.55;
      }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
        animation-duration: .01ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        transition-duration: .01ms !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <div class="page" id="page">
    <div class="sun-disc" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="woven-rug" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <nav class="desert-nav" aria-label="Navegación principal">
      <a href="#inicio" class="active">Inicio</a>
      <a href="#historia">Detalles</a>
      <a href="#ritual">Ritual</a>
      <a href="#lugar">Lugar</a>
      <a href="#rsvp">RSVP</a>
    </nav>

    <header class="hero" id="inicio">
      <div class="pampas-field" aria-hidden="true">
        <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2" class="pampas-stem" style="--x:8vw;--h:360px;--w:54px;--r:-16deg;--d:5.8s;"></span>
        <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="pampas-stem" style="--x:15vw;--h:430px;--w:70px;--r:-8deg;--d:6.4s;"></span>
        <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4" class="pampas-stem" style="--x:82vw;--h:420px;--w:68px;--r:11deg;--d:7s;"></span>
        <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-5" class="pampas-stem" style="--x:92vw;--h:330px;--w:50px;--r:18deg;--d:6.2s;"></span>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-copy">
        <div class="eyebrow">
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-6">Desierto Atardecer</span>
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-7"></span>
        </div>

        <h1 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1" class="js-split">
          Amara
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-8" class="name">& Elian</span>
        </h1>

        <div class="hero-date">
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-9" class="date-stamp">18</span>
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-10">Octubre · 2026</span>
          <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-11">18:30 hrs</span>
        </div>

        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="hero-text">
          Bajo un cielo color terracota, entre pampas, flores secas y alfombras antiguas,
          celebraremos una noche íntima donde cada detalle se acomoda como arena movida por el viento.
        </p>

        <div class="hero-actions">
          <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-1" href="#historia" class="sand-button">
            <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-12">Descubrir invitación</span>
            <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-down-long"></i>
          </a>

          <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-2" href="#rsvp" class="sand-button alt">
            <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-13">Sellar asistencia</span>
            <i class="fa-solid fa-fingerprint"></i>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-altar" aria-label="Fotografía principal de la celebración">
        <div class="clay-moon" aria-hidden="true"></div>

        <div class="arch-frame">
          <div class="photo-portal"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="floating-rug">
          <small>Una noche para recordar</small>
          <strong>Donde el amor encuentra su propio oasis.</strong>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <section class="panel" id="historia">
        <div class="details-grid">
          <article id="inferred-galeria-2" class="story-card grain-card reveal-weave">
            <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-3" class="section-label">Invitación</span>

            <h2 data-gemini-id="galeria-titulo-1">
              El viento
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-4">nos reúne</span>
            </h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-1">
              Esta celebración nace como un pequeño santuario boho: arcos suaves, texturas tejidas,
              flores preservadas y luz de atardecer. Ven con el corazón ligero, listo para brindar,
              bailar y dejar que la noche se despliegue sin prisa.
            </p>
          </article>

          <div class="arch-stack reveal-weave">
            <article class="info-arch">
              <small>Ceremonia</small>
              <strong>18:30</strong>
              <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-1">Recibiremos el atardecer con una ceremonia breve, cálida y simbólica.</p>
            </article>

            <article id="inferred-vestimenta-4" class="info-arch">
              <small>Código de vestimenta</small>
              <strong>Desert elegant</strong>
              <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-1">Tonos arena, arcilla, lino, café, oliva suave o cobre apagado.</p>
            </article>

            <article class="info-arch">
              <small>Mesa de regalos</small>
              <strong>Lluvia de sobres</strong>
              <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-2">Tu presencia es lo más valioso. Si deseas obsequiarnos algo, será recibido con cariño.</p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section class="panel" id="ritual">
        <div class="timeline-wrap">
          <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-5" class="section-label reveal-weave">Ritual de la noche</span>

          <h2 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-1" class="reveal-weave">
            La celebración se teje en cuatro momentos.
          </h2>

          <div class="woven-timeline">
            <article class="timeline-knot reveal-weave" style="--lift:26px;">
              <div class="knot-orb">01</div>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-2">Bienvenida</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-1">Coctel suave, música acústica y primer encuentro entre luz dorada y flores secas.</p>
            </article>

            <article class="timeline-knot reveal-weave" style="--lift:-12px;">
              <div class="knot-orb">02</div>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-3">Ceremonia</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-2">Un arco de pampas será el punto donde las promesas toman forma.</p>
            </article>

            <article class="timeline-knot reveal-weave" style="--lift:34px;">
              <div class="knot-orb">03</div>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-4">Cena</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-3">Sabores cálidos, mesa compartida y detalles inspirados en un oasis nocturno.</p>
            </article>

            <article class="timeline-knot reveal-weave" style="--lift:-4px;">
              <div class="knot-orb">04</div>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-5">Fiesta</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-4">La alfombra se vuelve pista y la noche termina entre risas, brindis y baile.</p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section class="panel" id="galeria">
        <div class="gallery">
          <div class="gallery-head">
            <div>
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-5" class="section-label reveal-weave">Texturas vivas</span>
              <h2 data-gemini-id="galeria-titulo-2" class="reveal-weave">Toca los recuerdos para desplegarlos.</h2>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-2" class="reveal-weave">
              Cada imagen se comporta como un fragmento de tela: al tocarla,
              abandona su pliegue y revela su intención.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="memory-mosaic reveal-weave">
            <figure class="memory-tile" data-caption="Pampas al viento">
              <img data-gemini-id="galeria-imagen-1" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1520854221256-17451cc331bf?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80" alt="Arreglo boho con pampas grass">
            </figure>

            <figure class="memory-tile" data-caption="Mesa terracota">
              <img data-gemini-id="galeria-imagen-2" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519225421980-715cb0215aed?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80" alt="Mesa elegante para celebración">
            </figure>

            <figure class="memory-tile" data-caption="Arco ceremonial">
              <img data-gemini-id="galeria-imagen-3" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1606216794074-735e91aa2c92?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80" alt="Ceremonia con decoración boho">
            </figure>

            <figure class="memory-tile" data-caption="Atardecer íntimo">
              <img data-gemini-id="galeria-imagen-4" src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1492684223066-81342ee5ff30?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1000&q=80" alt="Celebración al atardecer">
            </figure>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <section class="panel" id="lugar">
        <article id="inferred-ubicacion-13" class="place-card grain-card reveal-weave">
          <div class="map-ritual" id="mapRitual" aria-label="Referencia visual del lugar">
            <svg class="route-thread" viewBox="0 0 600 520" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
              <path d="M55 420 C130 330 180 350 220 260 S335 170 390 225 470 280 535 120" />
            </svg>

            <div class="pin">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="place-copy">
            <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-2" class="section-label">Lugar</span>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-1">Oasis Terraza</h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-1">
              Un espacio abierto, cálido y rodeado de texturas naturales. La ubicación exacta puede reemplazarse por
              el enlace de Google Maps de tu evento.
            </p>

            <div class="place-list">
              <div class="place-item">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-map-location-dot"></i>

                <div>
                  <strong>Dirección</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-3">Camino del Atardecer #184, Zona Campestre</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="place-item">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-clock"></i>

                <div>
                  <strong>Recepción</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-4">Te recomendamos llegar 20 minutos antes de la ceremonia.</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="place-item">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-sun"></i>

                <div>
                  <strong>Ambiente</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-5">Celebración al aire libre con clima cálido por la tarde y fresco por la noche.</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <a data-gemini-id="ubicacion-enlace-1" href="https://www.google.com/maps" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="sand-button">
              <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-6">Abrir mapa</span>
              <i class="fa-solid fa-route"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
        </article>
      </section>

      <section class="panel" id="rsvp">
        <div class="rsvp-stage">
          <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-3" class="section-label reveal-weave">Confirmación</span>

          <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1" class="reveal-weave">
            Sella tu lugar en nuestro santuario.
          </h2>

          <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="reveal-weave">
            No hay formulario. Gira el sello de arcilla hasta completar el círculo:
            la invitación quedará marcada como confirmada en este navegador.
          </p>

          <div class="seal-box reveal-weave">
            <div class="textile-scroll" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="seal-orbit" id="sealOrbit" type="button" aria-label="Gira el sello para confirmar asistencia">
              <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-4" class="seal-content">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-hand-sparkles"></i>
                <strong>Girar<br>sello</strong>
                <small>RSVP</small>
              </span>
            </button>

            <div class="seal-instructions" id="sealInstructions">
              Mantén presionado y arrastra en círculo hasta sellar tu asistencia
            </div>

            <div class="confirmation-message" id="confirmationMessage" role="status" aria-live="polite">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-2">Asistencia sellada</h3>

              <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2">
                El tejido está completo. Gracias por formar parte de esta noche:
                tu confirmación quedó guardada como un pequeño amuleto digital.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>

    <footer id="inferred-detalles-15">
      <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-1">Amara & Elian · 18 Octubre 2026 · Desierto Atardecer</p>
    </footer>
  </div>

  <script>
    // =========================================================
    // --- Estado General ---
    // =========================================================
    const page = document.getElementById("page");
    const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".desert-nav a");
    const revealItems = document.querySelectorAll(".reveal-weave");
    const mapRitual = document.getElementById("mapRitual");
    const sealOrbit = document.getElementById("sealOrbit");
    const memoryTiles = document.querySelectorAll(".memory-tile");

    // =========================================================
    // --- Texto Hero Ensamblado por Fragmentos ---
    // =========================================================
    function splitHeroTitle() {
      const splitTargets = document.querySelectorAll(".js-split");

      splitTargets.forEach(target => {
        const nodes = [...target.childNodes];

        target.innerHTML = "";

        nodes.forEach(node => {
          if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
            const words = node.textContent.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);

            words.forEach((word, index) => {
              const wrapper = document.createElement("span");
              wrapper.className = "split-word";
              wrapper.innerHTML = `<span style="--i:${index}">${word}</span>`;

              target.appendChild(wrapper);
              target.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
            });
          }

          if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
            const clone = node.cloneNode(false);
            const words = node.textContent.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);

            words.forEach((word, index) => {
              const wrapper = document.createElement("span");
              wrapper.className = "split-word";
              wrapper.innerHTML = `<span style="--i:${index + 2}">${word}</span>`;

              clone.appendChild(wrapper);
              clone.appendChild(document.createTextNode(" "));
            });

            target.appendChild(clone);
          }
        });
      });
    }

    splitHeroTitle();

    // =========================================================
    // --- Scroll, Revelado No Lineal y Navegación Activa ---
    // =========================================================
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("visible");

          if (entry.target.id === "mapRitual") {
            entry.target.classList.add("visible");
          }
        }
      });
    }, {
      threshold: 0.22,
      rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
    });

    revealItems.forEach(item => observer.observe(item));

    if (mapRitual) {
      observer.observe(mapRitual);
    }

    const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

        navLinks.forEach(link => {
          const href = link.getAttribute("href");
          link.classList.toggle("active", href === `#${entry.target.id}`);
        });
      });
    }, {
      threshold: 0.45
    });

    document.querySelectorAll("header[id], section[id]").forEach(section => {
      sectionObserver.observe(section);
    });

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--scroll", window.scrollY);
    }, { passive: true });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Galería: Pliegues de Tela Interactivos ---
    // =========================================================
    memoryTiles.forEach(tile => {
      tile.addEventListener("click", () => {
        memoryTiles.forEach(otherTile => {
          if (otherTile !== tile) {
            otherTile.classList.remove("unfolded");
          }
        });

        tile.classList.toggle("unfolded");
      });
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- RSVP: Confirmación como Resolución Física/Digital ---
    // =========================================================
    let isDraggingSeal = false;
    let lastAngle = 0;
    let accumulatedRotation = 0;
    let currentVisualAngle = 0;

    function getCenter(element) {
      const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();

      return {
        x: rect.left + rect.width / 2,
        y: rect.top + rect.height / 2
      };
    }

    function getPointerAngle(event, center) {
      const pointer = event.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;

      return Math.atan2(
        pointer.clientY - center.y,
        pointer.clientX - center.x
      ) * 180 / Math.PI;
    }

    function normalizeDelta(delta) {
      if (delta > 180) return delta - 360;
      if (delta < -180) return delta + 360;

      return delta;
    }

    function startSealDrag(event) {
      if (page.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      isDraggingSeal = true;
      sealOrbit.setPointerCapture?.(event.pointerId);

      lastAngle = getPointerAngle(event, getCenter(sealOrbit));
      sealOrbit.style.transition = "none";
    }

    function moveSealDrag(event) {
      if (!isDraggingSeal || page.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      const center = getCenter(sealOrbit);
      const angle = getPointerAngle(event, center);
      const delta = normalizeDelta(angle - lastAngle);

      accumulatedRotation += Math.abs(delta);
      currentVisualAngle += delta;
      lastAngle = angle;

      sealOrbit.style.transform = `rotate(${currentVisualAngle}deg)`;
      sealOrbit.style.setProperty("--angle", `${currentVisualAngle}deg`);

      const progress = Math.min(accumulatedRotation / 540, 1);

      sealOrbit.style.boxShadow = `
        inset 0 0 0 ${16 + progress * 12}px rgba(255,245,232,.38),
        inset 0 0 0 ${18 + progress * 12}px rgba(59,37,29,.08),
        0 ${34 + progress * 12}px ${80 + progress * 20}px rgba(59,37,29,.24)
      `;

      if (accumulatedRotation >= 540) {
        confirmAttendance(event);
      }
    }

    function endSealDrag() {
      isDraggingSeal = false;

      if (!page.classList.contains("confirmed")) {
        sealOrbit.style.transition = "transform .6s cubic-bezier(.18, .82, .24, 1)";
      }
    }

    function confirmAttendance(event) {
      if (page.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      page.classList.add("confirmed");
      localStorage.setItem("boho-rsvp-confirmed", "true");

      createPetalBurst(event);
      navigator.vibrate?.([40, 60, 80]);
    }

    function createPetalBurst(event) {
      const pointer = event?.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;
      const originX = pointer?.clientX || window.innerWidth / 2;
      const originY = pointer?.clientY || window.innerHeight / 2;

      for (let i = 0; i < 34; i++) {
        const petal = document.createElement("span");
        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        const distance = 90 + Math.random() * 260;

        petal.className = "settled-petal";
        petal.style.left = `${originX}px`;
        petal.style.top = `${originY}px`;
        petal.style.setProperty("--tx", `${Math.cos(angle) * distance}px`);
        petal.style.setProperty("--ty", `${Math.sin(angle) * distance}px`);
        petal.style.setProperty("--rot", `${Math.random() * 480 - 240}deg`);
        petal.style.background = Math.random() > .5 ? "var(--pampas)" : "var(--rose-dust)";

        document.body.appendChild(petal);
        petal.addEventListener("animationend", () => petal.remove());
      }
    }

    if (localStorage.getItem("boho-rsvp-confirmed") === "true") {
      page.classList.add("confirmed");
    }

    sealOrbit.addEventListener("pointerdown", startSealDrag);
    window.addEventListener("pointermove", moveSealDrag);
    window.addEventListener("pointerup", endSealDrag);
    window.addEventListener("pointercancel", endSealDrag);

    sealOrbit.addEventListener("keydown", event => {
      if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
        event.preventDefault();
        confirmAttendance(event);
      }
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Microinteracción de Arcos Según Posición del Cursor ---
    // =========================================================
    const arches = document.querySelectorAll(".info-arch, .arch-frame");

    window.addEventListener("pointermove", event => {
      const x = (event.clientX / window.innerWidth - .5) * 2;
      const y = (event.clientY / window.innerHeight - .5) * 2;

      arches.forEach((arch, index) => {
        const depth = (index + 1) * 3;
        arch.style.translate = `${x * depth}px ${y * depth}px`;
      });
    }, { passive: true });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Suavizado Manual para Compatibilidad ---
    // =========================================================
    navLinks.forEach(link => {
      link.addEventListener("click", event => {
        const targetId = link.getAttribute("href");
        const target = document.querySelector(targetId);

        if (!target) return;

        event.preventDefault();

        target.scrollIntoView({
          behavior: "smooth",
          block: "start"
        });
      });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética minimalismo japandi con tonos papel, tipografía Noto Serif JP y espacios en blanco. Atmósfera de kintsugi silencioso.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital estilo Minimalismo Japandi con experiencia interactiva SPA.">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#f4efe7">
  <title>Invitación Japandi | Ana & Hiro</title>

  <!-- Google Fonts -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Noto+Serif+JP:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    /* ==========================================================
       METÁFORA VISUAL:
       "Kintsugi Silencioso"
       La invitación se ensambla como piezas de papel artesanal
       que se acomodan con calma. La información aparece como
       grietas terracota que revelan significado.
    ========================================================== */

    /* --- Reset Base --- */
    *,
    *::before,
    *::after {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      background: #f4efe7;
    }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      color: #242321;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 15% 10%, rgba(190, 121, 82, 0.08), transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f2ea 0%, #eee7dd 48%, #e8e1d6 100%);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 0;
      opacity: 0.22;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.032) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.024) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 42px 42px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black, transparent 78%);
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    button,
    input,
    textarea {
      font: inherit;
    }

    button {
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      background: none;
    }

    img {
      max-width: 100%;
      display: block;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: #c6886e;
      color: #fffaf2;
    }

    /* --- Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --paper: #f7f2ea;
      --paper-deep: #eee7dd;
      --sand: #d9cbb8;
      --cement: #a9a49b;
      --charcoal: #242321;
      --charcoal-soft: #3a3834;
      --terracotta: #bd7e65;
      --terracotta-soft: #d8a08b;
      --off-white: #fffaf2;
      --bamboo: #79836a;

      --serif: "Noto Serif JP", serif;
      --sans: "Inter", sans-serif;

      --radius-large: 38px;
      --radius-medium: 24px;
      --radius-small: 14px;

      --shadow-soft: 0 34px 90px rgba(41, 37, 31, 0.11);
      --shadow-paper: 0 18px 60px rgba(41, 37, 31, 0.075);
      --max-width: 1180px;
    }

    /* --- Utilidades --- */
    .page-shell {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .section {
      min-height: 100vh;
      width: 100%;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: 112px 24px;
      position: relative;
      isolation: isolate;
    }

    .section-inner {
      width: min(100%, var(--max-width));
      margin-inline: auto;
      position: relative;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      font-size: 0.74rem;
      line-height: 1;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      color: #726c62;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    .eyebrow::before {
      content: "";
      width: 34px;
      height: 1px;
      background: currentColor;
      opacity: 0.45;
    }

    .section-title {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 7vw, 6.8rem);
      line-height: 0.98;
      letter-spacing: -0.075em;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--charcoal);
    }

    .section-copy {
      color: #686157;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.18rem);
      line-height: 1.9;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .japanese-mark {
      writing-mode: vertical-rl;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      letter-spacing: 0.26em;
      color: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.22);
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      user-select: none;
    }

    /* --- Navegación SPA --- */
    .nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 22px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      z-index: 50;
      width: min(calc(100% - 32px), 820px);
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .nav-panel {
      pointer-events: auto;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(247, 242, 234, 0.84);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
      box-shadow: 0 14px 50px rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
      backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
    }

    .nav a {
      position: relative;
      padding: 11px 15px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #675f55;
      letter-spacing: 0.03em;
      transition: color 420ms ease, background-color 420ms ease;
    }

    .nav a:hover,
    .nav a.active {
      color: var(--charcoal);
      background: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.055);
    }

    .menu-toggle {
      display: none;
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.92);
      color: var(--off-white);
      place-items: center;
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    }

    /* --- Hero: Ensamble de Papel Ajustado --- */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100svh;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 80px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .hero-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 0.9fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: clamp(32px, 5vw, 72px);
    }

    .hero-copy {
      position: relative;
      padding-left: clamp(0px, 4vw, 56px);
    }

    .hero-date {
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .hero-title {
      position: relative;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(4rem, 13vw, 12.4rem);
      line-height: 0.78;
      letter-spacing: -0.105em;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--charcoal);
    }

    .hero-title span {
      display: block;
      transform-origin: left center;
    }

    .hero-title .amp {
      color: var(--terracotta);
      font-size: 0.58em;
      margin-left: 0.15em;
      opacity: 0.88;
    }

    .hero-subtitle {
      width: min(100%, 440px);
      margin-top: 38px;
      color: #6d675e;
      font-size: 1.04rem;
      line-height: 1.9;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .hero-actions {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 18px;
      margin-top: 42px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .primary-btn {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 15px 24px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--charcoal);
      color: var(--off-white);
      font-size: 0.84rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: transform 420ms ease, background-color 420ms ease;
    }

    .primary-btn::after {
      content: "";
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--terracotta-soft);
      transition: transform 420ms ease;
    }

    .primary-btn:hover {
      transform: translateY(-3px);
      background: #11100f;
    }

    .primary-btn:hover::after {
      transform: scale(1.8);
    }

    .text-link {
      color: #5b554d;
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .text-link::before {
      content: "";
      width: 28px;
      height: 1px;
      background: currentColor;
      opacity: 0.45;
    }

    .paper-composition {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 560px;
      width: min(100%, 560px);
      margin-inline: auto;
    }

    .paper-piece {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.92), rgba(236, 226, 212, 0.9)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.025) 0 1px, transparent 1px 12px);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.09);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-paper);
      overflow: hidden;
      transform-origin: center;
    }

    .paper-piece::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 16px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.04);
      border-radius: calc(var(--radius-large) - 12px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .paper-piece.main {
      width: min(78vw, 410px);
      height: 500px;
      right: 7%;
      top: 10px;
      transform: rotate(-2deg);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: 36px;
    }

    .paper-piece.offset {
      width: 260px;
      height: 340px;
      left: 0;
      bottom: 20px;
      transform: rotate(7deg);
      background:
        linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(229, 215, 198, 0.94), rgba(247, 242, 234, 0.9)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.026) 0 1px, transparent 1px 10px);
    }

    .paper-piece.thin {
      width: 118px;
      height: 440px;
      right: 0;
      bottom: 26px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      transform: rotate(4deg);
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.26), rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.82));
    }

    .enso {
      width: min(82%, 300px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.26);
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }

    .enso::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 23%;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.42);
      border-left-color: transparent;
      transform: rotate(-28deg);
    }

    .enso::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 38%;
      height: 1px;
      background: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.34);
      transform: rotate(-38deg);
    }

    .enso-text {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.3;
      color: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.82);
    }

    .enso-text small {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--sans);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      font-size: 0.62rem;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      color: #827a70;
    }

    .enso-text strong {
      display: block;
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem);
      color: rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.74);
      font-weight: 300;
      letter-spacing: -0.06em;
    }

    .bamboo {
      position: absolute;
      width: 1px;
      height: 210px;
      background: rgba(121, 131, 106, 0.36);
      transform-origin: bottom center;
    }

    .bamboo::before,
    .bamboo::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 64px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 100% 0;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(121, 131, 106, 0.34);
      transform-origin: left center;
    }

    .bamboo::before {
      top: 42px;
      left: 0;
      transform: rotate(-28deg);
    }

    .bamboo::after {
      top: 104px;
      left: 0;
      transform: rotate(18deg);
    }

    .bamboo.one {
      left: 42px;
      top: 78px;
      transform: rotate(-8deg);
    }

    .bamboo.two {
      right: 74px;
      bottom: 58px;
      height: 250px;
      transform: rotate(7deg);
    }

    .scroll-hint {
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 30px;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      gap: 11px;
      color: #898176;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    }

    .scroll-hint::after {
      content: "";
      width: 1px;
      height: 48px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.35), transparent);
      animation: quietDrop 2.6s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    /* --- Sección Historia Ajustada: sin sobreposición --- */
    .story {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.46) 18%, transparent 88%);
    }

    .story-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.8fr 1.2fr;
      gap: clamp(42px, 7vw, 96px);
      align-items: start;
    }

    .story-text {
      max-width: 480px;
      position: sticky;
      top: 130px;
    }

    .story-text .section-title {
      margin-top: 18px;
    }

    .story-text .section-copy {
      margin-top: 28px;
    }

    .fragment-stage {
      min-height: auto;
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      gap: 28px;
      padding-top: 12px;
    }

    .fragment-card {
      position: relative;
      width: min(100%, 520px);
      padding: clamp(28px, 4vw, 42px);
      border-radius: var(--radius-medium);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.92), rgba(230, 220, 206, 0.82)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.026) 0 1px, transparent 1px 14px);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.09);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-paper);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .fragment-card::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 34px;
      right: 34px;
      bottom: 26px;
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        transparent,
        rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.35),
        transparent
      );
    }

    .fragment-card:nth-child(1),
    .fragment-card:nth-child(2),
    .fragment-card:nth-child(3) {
      top: auto;
      left: auto;
      right: auto;
      bottom: auto;
    }

    .fragment-card:nth-child(1) {
      justify-self: start;
      transform: rotate(-1.8deg);
    }

    .fragment-card:nth-child(2) {
      justify-self: end;
      transform: rotate(1.4deg);
    }

    .fragment-card:nth-child(3) {
      justify-self: center;
      transform: rotate(-0.8deg);
    }

    .fragment-card h3 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
      font-weight: 300;
      letter-spacing: -0.07em;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      color: var(--charcoal);
    }

    .fragment-card p {
      color: #69635a;
      line-height: 1.8;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: clamp(0.98rem, 1.5vw, 1.08rem);
      max-width: 360px;
    }

    .kintsugi-line {
      position: absolute;
      width: 180px;
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.78), transparent);
      transform-origin: left center;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .kintsugi-line.one {
      top: 31%;
      left: 43%;
      transform: rotate(6deg);
    }

    .kintsugi-line.two {
      bottom: 30%;
      left: 32%;
      transform: rotate(-9deg);
    }

    /* --- Sección Detalles: Calendario Ensamblado --- */
    .details {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
    }

    .details-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.95fr 1.05fr;
      gap: clamp(40px, 7vw, 88px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .date-object {
      position: relative;
      width: min(100%, 520px);
      aspect-ratio: 1 / 1.05;
      border-radius: 42% 58% 48% 52%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 65% 22%, rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.12), transparent 30%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.72), rgba(221, 209, 194, 0.58));
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .date-object::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 72%;
      height: 72%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.09);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    .date-object::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 34px;
      border-radius: 40% 60% 55% 45%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.22);
    }

    .date-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .date-content .day {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(5rem, 13vw, 11rem);
      line-height: 0.82;
      letter-spacing: -0.12em;
      color: var(--charcoal);
      font-weight: 300;
      margin-right: 0.08em;
    }

    .date-content .month {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 20px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.28em;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #6f685f;
    }

    .details-panel {
      display: grid;
      gap: 18px;
    }

    .detail-item {
      padding: 28px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-medium);
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.58);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.07);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
      gap: 24px;
      align-items: center;
      transition: transform 420ms ease, background-color 420ms ease, opacity 320ms ease;
    }

    .detail-item:hover {
      transform: translateX(-8px);
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.8);
    }

    .detail-label {
      color: #8a8277;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    }

    .detail-value {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.28rem, 2.3vw, 2rem);
      line-height: 1.25;
      letter-spacing: -0.045em;
      color: var(--charcoal-soft);
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* --- Sección Ubicación: Mapa Abstracto --- */
    .location {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
    }

    .location-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.88fr 1.12fr;
      gap: clamp(40px, 7vw, 88px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .location-copy {
      max-width: 460px;
    }

    .location-copy .section-title {
      margin-top: 18px;
      margin-bottom: 30px;
    }

    .map-object {
      min-height: 520px;
      position: relative;
      border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(236, 226, 212, 0.6), rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.72)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.026) 0 1px, transparent 1px 28px),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.02) 0 1px, transparent 1px 28px);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .map-path {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        linear-gradient(115deg, transparent 18%, rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.58) 18.2%, rgba(190, 126, 101, 0.58) 18.55%, transparent 18.8%),
        linear-gradient(35deg, transparent 47%, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.22) 47.2%, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.22) 47.45%, transparent 47.8%),
        linear-gradient(145deg, transparent 66%, rgba(121, 131, 106, 0.34) 66.2%, rgba(121, 131, 106, 0.34) 66.45%, transparent 66.8%);
      opacity: 0.85;
    }

    .map-pin {
      position: absolute;
      left: 58%;
      top: 46%;
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--charcoal);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 14px rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
    }

    .map-card {
      position: absolute;
      right: 34px;
      bottom: 34px;
      width: min(calc(100% - 68px), 360px);
      padding: 28px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-medium);
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.78);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
    }

    .map-card span {
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: #81796e;
    }

    .map-card strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      line-height: 1.25;
      letter-spacing: -0.05em;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .map-card p {
      margin-top: 14px;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: #6b645b;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    /* --- Sección Itinerario: Láminas Horizontales --- */
    .timeline {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .timeline-head {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      gap: 32px;
      align-items: end;
      margin-bottom: 58px;
    }

    .timeline-head .section-title {
      max-width: 680px;
    }

    .timeline-head .section-copy {
      max-width: 340px;
    }

    .timeline-track {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(210px, 1fr));
      gap: 18px;
    }

    .time-slice {
      min-height: 320px;
      padding: 30px;
      border-radius: 999px 999px var(--radius-large) var(--radius-large);
      background:
        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.82), rgba(226, 215, 201, 0.62));
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.075);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      transition: transform 560ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
    }

    .time-slice:hover {
      transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(-1deg);
    }

    .time-slice::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: 24px;
      width: 1px;
      height: 120px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.2), transparent);
    }

    .time-slice .time {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 2.7rem;
      letter-spacing: -0.08em;
      line-height: 1;
      color: var(--charcoal);
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .time-slice h3 {
      margin-top: 18px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--charcoal-soft);
    }

    .time-slice p {
      margin-top: 14px;
      color: #726b61;
      line-height: 1.7;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: 0.94rem;
    }

    /* --- Sección Dress Code --- */
    .dress {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
    }

    .dress-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.95fr 1.05fr;
      gap: clamp(38px, 7vw, 88px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .fabric-stack {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 500px;
    }

    .fabric {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.075);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-paper);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .fabric::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 0 1px, transparent 1px 11px);
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .fabric.one {
      width: 76%;
      height: 360px;
      left: 6%;
      top: 20px;
      background: #e3d5c2;
      transform: rotate(-6deg);
    }

    .fabric.two {
      width: 62%;
      height: 330px;
      right: 0;
      top: 108px;
      background: #bcb4a9;
      transform: rotate(5deg);
    }

    .fabric.three {
      width: 52%;
      height: 290px;
      left: 24%;
      bottom: 0;
      background: #bd7e65;
      transform: rotate(-2deg);
      opacity: 0.78;
    }

    .dress-card {
      padding: clamp(32px, 6vw, 70px);
      border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.62);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.075);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
    }

    .dress-card .section-title {
      margin: 18px 0 30px;
    }

    .palette {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 34px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .swatch {
      width: 54px;
      height: 54px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.12);
    }

    .swatch:nth-child(1) { background: #f7f2ea; }
    .swatch:nth-child(2) { background: #d9cbb8; }
    .swatch:nth-child(3) { background: #a9a49b; }
    .swatch:nth-child(4) { background: #bd7e65; }
    .swatch:nth-child(5) { background: #242321; }

    /* --- Sección RSVP --- */
    .rsvp {
      min-height: auto;
      padding-top: 120px;
      padding-bottom: 120px;
    }

    .rsvp-layout {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 0.86fr 1.14fr;
      gap: clamp(40px, 7vw, 88px);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .rsvp-intro .section-title {
      margin: 18px 0 30px;
    }

    .rsvp-form {
      padding: clamp(30px, 5vw, 56px);
      border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.78), rgba(235, 225, 211, 0.68));
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.08);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);
      display: grid;
      gap: 24px;
    }

    .field {
      position: relative;
    }

    .field label {
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      color: #7a7268;
    }

    .field input,
    .field textarea {
      width: 100%;
      border: none;
      outline: none;
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.58);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.18);
      padding: 16px 2px;
      color: var(--charcoal);
      transition: border-color 320ms ease, background-color 320ms ease;
    }

    .field textarea {
      min-height: 112px;
      resize: vertical;
    }

    .field input:focus,
    .field textarea:focus {
      border-color: var(--terracotta);
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.9);
    }

    .attendance {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .choice {
      position: relative;
    }

    .choice input {
      position: absolute;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .choice span {
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      min-height: 54px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(36, 35, 33, 0.12);
      color: #5f584f;
      transition: background-color 360ms ease, color 360ms ease, transform 360ms ease;
    }

    .choice input:checked + span {
      background: var(--charcoal);
      color: var(--off-white);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    .form-message {
      min-height: 24px;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: var(--terracotta);
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    .footer {
      padding: 60px 24px 80px;
      text-align: center;
      color: #777064;
      position: relative;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .footer-symbol {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      color: var(--terracotta);
      margin-bottom: 14px;
    }

    .footer p {
      font-size: 0.88rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    }

    /* --- Animaciones de Revelado --- */
    [data-reveal] {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(34px) scale(0.98);
      filter: blur(8px);
      transition:
        opacity 900ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        transform 1100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        filter 900ms ease;
    }

    [data-reveal].visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      filter: blur(0);
    }

    [data-paper] {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(50px) rotate(var(--r, 0deg)) scale(0.92);
      clip-path: polygon(8% 0, 100% 5%, 94% 100%, 0 92%);
      transition:
        opacity 1200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        transform 1400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        clip-path 1400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
      transition-delay: var(--d, 0ms);
    }

    [data-paper].visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) rotate(var(--r, 0deg)) scale(1);
      clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
    }

    [data-crack] {
      transform: scaleX(0);
      opacity: 0;
      transition:
        transform 1400ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
        opacity 700ms ease;
      transition-delay: var(--d, 220ms);
    }

    [data-crack].visible {
      transform: scaleX(1);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .hero-title span {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-34px) skewX(-7deg);
      animation: nameAssemble 1100ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) forwards;
    }

    .hero-title span:nth-child(2) {
      animation-delay: 160ms;
    }

    .hero-title span:nth-child(3) {
      animation-delay: 320ms;
    }

    @keyframes nameAssemble {
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0) skewX(0);
      }
    }

    @keyframes quietDrop {
      0%, 100% {
        transform: scaleY(0.35);
        opacity: 0.38;
      }

      50% {
        transform: scaleY(1);
        opacity: 0.95;
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Tablet Ajustado --- */
    @media (max-width: 980px) {
      .section {
        padding: 92px 20px;
      }

      .hero-grid,
      .story-layout,
      .details-layout,
      .location-layout,
      .dress-layout,
      .rsvp-layout {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .story-layout {
        gap: 46px;
      }

      .story-text {
        position: relative;
        top: auto;
        max-width: 720px;
      }

      .hero-copy {
        padding-left: 0;
      }

      .paper-composition {
        min-height: 500px;
        order: -1;
      }

      .paper-piece.main {
        right: 12%;
        height: 450px;
      }

      .paper-piece.offset {
        width: 230px;
        height: 300px;
      }

      .paper-piece.thin {
        height: 390px;
      }

      .fragment-stage {
        gap: 24px;
      }

      .fragment-card {
        width: min(100%, 620px);
      }

      .fragment-card:nth-child(1),
      .fragment-card:nth-child(2),
      .fragment-card:nth-child(3) {
        justify-self: stretch;
      }

      .kintsugi-line {
        display: none;
      }

      .date-object {
        width: min(100%, 480px);
        justify-self: center;
      }

      .location-copy {
        max-width: 720px;
      }

      .timeline-head {
        display: grid;
      }

      .timeline-track {
        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      }

      .fabric-stack {
        min-height: 480px;
        order: -1;
      }

      .rsvp-intro {
        max-width: 720px;
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Mobile Ajustado --- */
    @media (max-width: 720px) {
      .nav {
        top: 14px;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        padding-right: 14px;
      }

      .menu-toggle {
        display: grid;
      }

      .nav-panel {
        position: absolute;
        top: 54px;
        right: 14px;
        width: min(280px, calc(100vw - 28px));
        border-radius: 26px;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
        padding: 12px;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.96);
        pointer-events: none;
        transition: opacity 360ms ease, transform 360ms ease;
      }

      .nav.open .nav-panel {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
        pointer-events: auto;
      }

      .nav a {
        padding: 14px 16px;
      }

      .section {
        min-height: auto;
        padding: 78px 18px;
      }

      .hero {
        min-height: auto;
        padding-top: 84px;
        padding-bottom: 64px;
      }

      .hero-title {
        font-size: clamp(4.2rem, 24vw, 7.4rem);
      }

      .hero-subtitle {
        margin-top: 26px;
      }

      .hero-actions {
        align-items: stretch;
        flex-direction: column;
      }

      .primary-btn,
      .text-link {
        justify-content: center;
      }

      .paper-composition {
        min-height: 390px;
        width: min(100%, 390px);
      }

      .paper-piece.main {
        width: min(86vw, 310px);
        height: 350px;
        right: 8%;
        top: 0;
        padding: 24px;
      }

      .paper-piece.offset {
        width: 185px;
        height: 235px;
        left: 0;
        bottom: 12px;
      }

      .paper-piece.thin {
        width: 76px;
        height: 310px;
        right: 4px;
        bottom: 22px;
      }

      .enso {
        width: min(82%, 230px);
      }

      .bamboo.one {
        left: 22px;
        top: 48px;
      }

      .bamboo.two {
        right: 40px;
        bottom: 28px;
      }

      .scroll-hint {
        display: none;
      }

      .story {
        padding-top: 82px;
        padding-bottom: 82px;
      }

      .story-layout {
        gap: 34px;
      }

      .story-text .section-copy {
        margin-top: 22px;
      }

      .fragment-stage {
        display: grid;
        gap: 20px;
        padding-top: 0;
      }

      .fragment-card {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 28px;
        transform: none !important;
      }

      .fragment-card h3 {
        font-size: clamp(2rem, 14vw, 3.4rem);
        margin-bottom: 14px;
      }

      .fragment-card p {
        max-width: none;
        font-size: 0.98rem;
        line-height: 1.75;
      }

      .details,
      .location,
      .timeline,
      .dress,
      .rsvp {
        padding-top: 82px;
        padding-bottom: 82px;
      }

      .details-panel {
        gap: 14px;
      }

      .detail-item {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: 12px;
        padding: 24px;
      }

      .date-object {
        width: min(100%, 360px);
      }

      .date-content .day {
        font-size: clamp(4.8rem, 28vw, 7.4rem);
      }

      .map-object {
        min-height: 460px;
      }

      .map-card {
        right: 20px;
        bottom: 20px;
        width: calc(100% - 40px);
        padding: 24px;
      }

      .timeline-track {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .time-slice {
        min-height: 250px;
        border-radius: var(--radius-large);
      }

      .fabric-stack {
        min-height: 390px;
      }

      .fabric.one {
        height: 300px;
      }

      .fabric.two {
        height: 270px;
        top: 88px;
      }

      .fabric.three {
        height: 240px;
      }

      .attendance {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .japanese-mark {
        display: none;
      }
    }

    /* --- Preferencia de Movimiento Reducido --- */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
        transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;
      }

      [data-reveal],
      [data-paper],
      [data-crack] {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: none;
        filter: none;
        clip-path: none;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <!-- --- Navegación Principal --- -->
  <nav class="nav" id="mainNav" aria-label="Navegación de invitación">
    <button class="menu-toggle" id="menuToggle" type="button" aria-label="Abrir menú">
      MENÚ
    </button>

    <div class="nav-panel">
      <a href="#inicio" class="active">Inicio</a>
      <a href="#historia">Historia</a>
      <a href="#detalles">Detalles</a>
      <a href="#ubicacion">Lugar</a>
      <a href="#itinerario">Momentos</a>
      <a href="#codigo">Código</a>
      <a href="#rsvp">RSVP</a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="page-shell">
    <!-- --- Hero --- -->
    <header class="section hero" id="inicio">
      <div class="section-inner hero-grid">
        <div class="hero-copy">
          <div class="eyebrow hero-date" data-reveal="">
            Veinticuatro de noviembre · 2026
          </div>

          <h1 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1" class="hero-title" aria-label="Ana y Hiro">
            <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2">Ana</span>
            <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="amp">&</span>
            <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4">Hiro</span>
          </h1>

          <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="hero-subtitle" data-reveal="">
            Dos caminos tranquilos se encuentran en una ceremonia íntima,
            rodeada de madera clara, silencio amable y luz de tarde.
          </p>

          <div class="hero-actions" data-reveal="">
            <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-1" href="#rsvp" class="primary-btn">Confirmar asistencia</a>
            <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-2" href="#detalles" class="text-link">Ver detalles</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="paper-composition" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="paper-piece main" data-paper="" style="--r: -2deg; --d: 100ms;">
            <div class="enso">
              <div class="enso-text">
                <small>Ceremonia</small>
                <strong>16:30</strong>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="paper-piece offset" data-paper="" style="--r: 7deg; --d: 240ms;"></div>
          <div class="paper-piece thin" data-paper="" style="--r: 4deg; --d: 380ms;"></div>

          <div class="bamboo one"></div>
          <div class="bamboo two"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="scroll-hint">Respira</div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- --- Historia --- -->
      <section class="section story" id="historia">
        <div class="section-inner story-layout">
          <div class="story-text">
            <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-3" class="eyebrow" data-reveal="">Historia</span>

            <h2 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-1" class="section-title" data-reveal="">
              Lo simple también permanece.
            </h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-1" class="section-copy" data-reveal="">
              Esta invitación no se despliega como una página común:
              se arma como una composición de papel. Cada fragmento aparece
              cuando la mirada lo alcanza, como si la memoria acomodara sus
              piezas con calma.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="fragment-stage">
            <article id="inferred-ubicacion-2" class="fragment-card" data-paper="" style="--r: -1.8deg; --d: 0ms;">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-2">Primero</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-1">
                Una conversación breve, café tibio y la sensación discreta
                de haber encontrado un lugar conocido.
              </p>
            </article>

            <div class="kintsugi-line one" data-crack=""></div>

            <article class="fragment-card" data-paper="" style="--r: 1.4deg; --d: 180ms;">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-2">Después</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-2">
                Los días se volvieron rituales pequeños: caminar sin prisa,
                cocinar juntos, mirar la lluvia desde la ventana.
              </p>
            </article>

            <div class="kintsugi-line two" data-crack=""></div>

            <article id="inferred-detalles-4" class="fragment-card" data-paper="" style="--r: -0.8deg; --d: 320ms;">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="detalles-titulo-1">Ahora</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-1">
                Celebramos el inicio de una casa emocional: clara, cálida,
                imperfecta y profundamente nuestra.
              </p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- --- Detalles del Evento --- -->
      <section class="section details" id="detalles">
        <div class="section-inner details-layout">
          <div class="date-object" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg;">
            <div class="date-content">
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-2" class="day">24</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-3" class="month">Noviembre · 2026</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="details-panel">
            <div class="eyebrow" data-reveal="">
              Detalles
            </div>

            <article class="detail-item" data-reveal="">
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-4" class="detail-label">Ceremonia</span>
              <strong class="detail-value">16:30 hrs</strong>
            </article>

            <article class="detail-item" data-reveal="">
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-5" class="detail-label">Recepción</span>
              <strong class="detail-value">18:00 hrs</strong>
            </article>

            <article id="inferred-ubicacion-8" class="detail-item" data-reveal="">
              <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-4" class="detail-label">Lugar</span>
              <strong class="detail-value">Casa Nara · Jardín privado</strong>
            </article>

            <article class="detail-item" data-reveal="">
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-6" class="detail-label">Formato</span>
              <strong class="detail-value">Ceremonia íntima al atardecer</strong>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- --- Ubicación --- -->
      <section class="section location" id="ubicacion">
        <div class="section-inner location-layout">
          <div class="location-copy">
            <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-5" class="eyebrow" data-reveal="">Ubicación</span>

            <h2 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-1" class="section-title" data-reveal="">
              Un jardín en pausa.
            </h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-2" class="section-copy" data-reveal="">
              El espacio fue elegido por su quietud: muros neutros, árboles
              ligeros y una arquitectura que deja entrar la luz sin pedir
              protagonismo.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="map-object" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg;">
            <div class="map-path"></div>
            <div class="map-pin"></div>

            <div class="map-card">
              <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-6">Dirección</span>
              <strong>Casa Nara, Jardín Privado</strong>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-3">
                Av. de los Cedros 128, Col. Jardines del Valle,
                Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas.
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="japanese-mark" style="position: absolute; left: 28px; top: 30px;">
              静かな場所
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- --- Itinerario --- -->
      <section class="section timeline" id="itinerario">
        <div class="section-inner">
          <div class="timeline-head">
            <div>
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-6" class="eyebrow" data-reveal="">Momentos</span>

              <h2 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-1" class="section-title" data-reveal="">
                El día se abrirá despacio.
              </h2>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-1" class="section-copy" data-reveal="">
              Un ritmo sereno para disfrutar cada instante sin correr.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="timeline-track">
            <article class="time-slice" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg; --d: 0ms;">
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-7" class="time">16:00</span>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-2">Bienvenida</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-2">
                Recepción de invitados con té frío, agua herbal y música suave.
              </p>
            </article>

            <article class="time-slice" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg; --d: 120ms;">
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-8" class="time">16:30</span>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-3">Ceremonia</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-3">
                Votos en jardín bajo una estructura sencilla de madera clara.
              </p>
            </article>

            <article class="time-slice" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg; --d: 240ms;">
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-9" class="time">18:00</span>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-4">Cena</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-4">
                Mesa compartida, sabores ligeros y brindis íntimo.
              </p>
            </article>

            <article class="time-slice" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg; --d: 360ms;">
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-10" class="time">20:00</span>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-5">Celebración</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-5">
                Música, postres y una noche cálida entre personas queridas.
              </p>
            </article>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- --- Dress Code --- -->
      <section class="section dress" id="codigo">
        <div class="section-inner dress-layout">
          <div class="fabric-stack" aria-hidden="true">
            <div class="fabric one" data-paper="" style="--r: -6deg; --d: 0ms;"></div>
            <div class="fabric two" data-paper="" style="--r: 5deg; --d: 160ms;"></div>
            <div class="fabric three" data-paper="" style="--r: -2deg; --d: 320ms;"></div>
          </div>

          <article id="inferred-galeria-17" class="dress-card" data-reveal="">
            <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-2" class="eyebrow">Código</span>

            <h2 data-gemini-id="galeria-titulo-1" class="section-title">
              Tonos suaves, presencia tranquila.
            </h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-1" class="section-copy">
              Sugerimos prendas en lino, algodón, fibras naturales o texturas
              mate. Evitar colores intensos para conservar la atmósfera serena
              del espacio.
            </p>

            <div class="palette" aria-label="Paleta sugerida">
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-3" class="swatch" title="Blanco roto"></span>
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-4" class="swatch" title="Beige arena"></span>
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-5" class="swatch" title="Gris cemento"></span>
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-6" class="swatch" title="Terracota pálido"></span>
              <span data-gemini-id="galeria-texto-7" class="swatch" title="Negro carbón"></span>
            </div>
          </article>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- --- RSVP --- -->
