      <section class="section rsvp" id="rsvp">
        <div class="section-inner rsvp-layout">
          <div class="rsvp-intro">
            <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-3" class="eyebrow" data-reveal="">RSVP</span>

            <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1" class="section-title" data-reveal="">
              Confirma con calma.
            </h2>

            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="section-copy" data-reveal="">
              Tu presencia es parte esencial de este día. Por favor confirma
              antes del 10 de noviembre para preparar cada detalle con cuidado.
            </p>
          </div>

          <form class="rsvp-form" id="rsvpForm" data-paper="" style="--r: 0deg;">
            <div class="field">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-1" for="guestName">Nombre completo</label>
              <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-2" type="text" id="guestName" name="guestName" placeholder="Escribe tu nombre" required>
            </div>

            <div class="field">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-2">Asistencia</label>

              <div class="attendance">
                <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-3" class="choice">
                  <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-3" type="radio" name="attendance" value="Sí asistiré" required>
                  <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-4">Sí asistiré</span>
                </label>

                <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-4" class="choice">
                  <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-4" type="radio" name="attendance" value="No podré asistir">
                  <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-5">No podré asistir</span>
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="field">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-5" for="guests">Número de invitados</label>
              <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-5" type="number" id="guests" name="guests" min="1" max="4" placeholder="1" required>
            </div>

            <div class="field">
              <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-6" for="message">Mensaje opcional</label>
              <textarea data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-1" id="message" name="message" placeholder="Comparte una nota para los novios"></textarea>
            </div>

            <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="primary-btn" type="submit">
              Enviar confirmación
            </button>

            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2" class="form-message" id="formMessage" aria-live="polite"></p>
          </form>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>

    <!-- --- Footer --- -->
    <footer class="footer">
      <div class="footer-symbol">結</div>
      <p>Ana & Hiro · Una celebración sencilla, cálida y memorable.</p>
    </footer>
  </div>

  <script>
    // ==========================================================
    // JavaScript SPA
    // Interactividad, navegación, revelados y micro-respuestas.
    // ==========================================================

    // --- Variables Globales ---
    const nav = document.getElementById("mainNav");
    const menuToggle = document.getElementById("menuToggle");
    const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".nav a");
    const revealItems = document.querySelectorAll("[data-reveal], [data-paper], [data-crack]");
    const sections = document.querySelectorAll("header[id], section[id]");
    const rsvpForm = document.getElementById("rsvpForm");
    const formMessage = document.getElementById("formMessage");

    // --- Lógica del Menú Mobile ---
    menuToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
      nav.classList.toggle("open");

      const isOpen = nav.classList.contains("open");

      menuToggle.textContent = isOpen ? "CERRAR" : "MENÚ";
      menuToggle.setAttribute("aria-label", isOpen ? "Cerrar menú" : "Abrir menú");
    });

    navLinks.forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener("click", () => {
        nav.classList.remove("open");
        menuToggle.textContent = "MENÚ";
        menuToggle.setAttribute("aria-label", "Abrir menú");
      });
    });

    // --- Scroll Suave Controlado ---
    navLinks.forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();

        const targetSelector = link.getAttribute("href");
        const targetSection = document.querySelector(targetSelector);

        if (!targetSection) return;

        targetSection.scrollIntoView({
          behavior: "smooth",
          block: "start"
        });
      });
    });

    // --- Revelado No Lineal por Intersección ---
    const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

          const element = entry.target;
          const siblings = [...element.parentElement.children];
          const index = siblings.indexOf(element);

          element.style.transitionDelay =
            element.style.getPropertyValue("--d") || `${Math.max(index, 0) * 90}ms`;

          element.classList.add("visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(element);
        });
      },
      {
        threshold: 0.18,
        rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
      }
    );

    revealItems.forEach((item) => revealObserver.observe(item));

    // --- Estado Activo de Navegación ---
    const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;

          const currentId = entry.target.getAttribute("id");

          navLinks.forEach((link) => {
            const isActive = link.getAttribute("href") === `#${currentId}`;
            link.classList.toggle("active", isActive);
          });
        });
      },
      {
        threshold: 0.42
      }
    );

    sections.forEach((section) => sectionObserver.observe(section));

    // --- Movimiento Orgánico Discreto con Pointer ---
    const paperComposition = document.querySelector(".paper-composition");
    const paperPieces = document.querySelectorAll(".paper-piece, .fabric");

    window.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) return;
      if (window.innerWidth < 900) return;

      const x = (event.clientX / window.innerWidth - 0.5) * 2;
      const y = (event.clientY / window.innerHeight - 0.5) * 2;

      paperPieces.forEach((piece, index) => {
        const depth = (index + 1) * 3;
        piece.style.translate = `${x * depth}px ${y * depth}px`;
      });
    });

    if (paperComposition) {
      paperComposition.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
        paperPieces.forEach((piece) => {
          piece.style.translate = "0 0";
        });
      });
    }

    // --- Ensamble Sutil de Detalles al Hover ---
    const detailItems = document.querySelectorAll(".detail-item");

    detailItems.forEach((item) => {
      item.addEventListener("pointerenter", () => {
        detailItems.forEach((otherItem) => {
          if (otherItem !== item) {
            otherItem.style.opacity = "0.58";
          }
        });
      });

      item.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
        detailItems.forEach((otherItem) => {
          otherItem.style.opacity = "1";
        });
      });
    });

    // --- Validación RSVP ---
    rsvpForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();

      const formData = new FormData(rsvpForm);

      const guestName = String(formData.get("guestName") || "").trim();
      const attendance = String(formData.get("attendance") || "").trim();
      const guests = String(formData.get("guests") || "").trim();

      if (!guestName || !attendance || !guests) {
        formMessage.textContent = "Por favor completa los campos principales antes de enviar.";
        return;
      }

      formMessage.textContent =
        `Gracias, ${guestName}. Tu respuesta fue guardada simbólicamente en esta invitación.`;

      rsvpForm.reset();

      const confirmationPetal = document.createElement("span");

      confirmationPetal.textContent = "◦";
      confirmationPetal.style.position = "fixed";
      confirmationPetal.style.left = "50%";
      confirmationPetal.style.top = "50%";
      confirmationPetal.style.zIndex = "100";
      confirmationPetal.style.color = "#bd7e65";
      confirmationPetal.style.fontSize = "5rem";
      confirmationPetal.style.pointerEvents = "none";
      confirmationPetal.style.transform = "translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.4)";
      confirmationPetal.style.opacity = "0";
      confirmationPetal.style.transition =
        "transform 900ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), opacity 900ms ease";

      document.body.appendChild(confirmationPetal);

      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        confirmationPetal.style.opacity = "1";
        confirmationPetal.style.transform = "translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.4)";
      });

      setTimeout(() => {
        confirmationPetal.style.opacity = "0";
        confirmationPetal.style.transform = "translate(-50%, -50%) scale(2)";
      }, 850);

      setTimeout(() => {
        confirmationPetal.remove();
      }, 1800);
    });

    // --- Cierre de Menú con Escape ---
    document.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (event.key !== "Escape") return;

      nav.classList.remove("open");
      menuToggle.textContent = "MENÚ";
      menuToggle.setAttribute("aria-label", "Abrir menú");
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética tropical playero con tonos lino, tipografía orgánica y elementos de marea. Atmósfera de destino playa.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital tropical elegante tipo SPA con experiencia interactiva y confirmación RSVP no convencional.">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#e9dbc3">

  <!-- --- CDN Externas --- -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

  <title>Invitación Digital · Marea de Lino</title>

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
       METÁFORA VISUAL
       "Marea de Lino": la invitación se comporta como una tela
       tropical tensada por la brisa. La información se revela como
       fibras, marcas de agua y placas que emergen de la orilla.
       ========================================================= */

    /* --- Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --sand: #e9dbc3;
      --linen: #f7f1e8;
      --linen-dark: #d7c5aa;
      --ink: #24312c;
      --palm: #1d5f4f;
      --palm-deep: #123b34;
      --sea: #8ab9af;
      --sea-soft: #c9ded7;
      --coral: #c9795e;
      --gold: #b99462;
      --white: #fffaf2;
      --shadow: rgba(36, 49, 44, 0.18);
      --soft-shadow: rgba(36, 49, 44, 0.08);
      --panel: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.74);
      --radius-xl: 36px;
      --radius-lg: 26px;
      --radius-md: 18px;
      --transition-soft: 900ms cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1);
      --transition-snap: 620ms cubic-bezier(.2, .9, .16, 1);
      --current-stage: 0;
      --wind-x: 0px;
      --wind-y: 0px;
      --seal-x: 0px;
      --seal-y: 0px;
    }

    /* --- Reset Base --- */
    *,
    *::before,
    *::after {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      background: var(--sand);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow: hidden;
      font-family: "Manrope", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
      color: var(--ink);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 18% 12%, rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.86), transparent 28%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 84%, rgba(138, 185, 175, 0.34), transparent 30%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #efe2cd 0%, #f8f0e3 42%, #d9c3a2 100%);
      cursor: default;
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    button {
      font: inherit;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: var(--palm);
      color: var(--white);
    }

    /* --- Textura de Lino Procedural --- */
    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0.38;
      background-image:
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(36,49,44,.055) 0 1px, transparent 1px 5px),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,250,242,.48) 0 1px, transparent 1px 6px),
        repeating-linear-gradient(35deg, rgba(185,148,98,.05) 0 1px, transparent 1px 14px);
      mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    }

    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: -20%;
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at calc(40% + var(--wind-x)) calc(35% + var(--wind-y)), rgba(255,255,255,.45), transparent 35%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at calc(70% - var(--wind-x)) calc(72% - var(--wind-y)), rgba(29,95,79,.13), transparent 32%);
      filter: blur(16px);
      transform: translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * .4), calc(var(--wind-y) * .4), 0);
      transition: transform 420ms ease;
    }

    /* --- Layout SPA --- */
    .invitation-shell {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      width: 100vw;
      height: 100vh;
      isolation: isolate;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .sr-only {
      position: absolute;
      width: 1px;
      height: 1px;
      padding: 0;
      margin: -1px;
      overflow: hidden;
      clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
      white-space: nowrap;
      border: 0;
    }

    /* --- Header / Navegación Sensorial --- */
    .site-header {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0 0 auto 0;
      z-index: 30;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: clamp(18px, 3vw, 34px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .brand-mark {
      pointer-events: auto;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
    }

    .brand-mark::before {
      content: "";
      width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--gold) 0 3px, transparent 4px),
        conic-gradient(from 30deg, var(--palm), var(--sea), var(--gold), var(--palm));
      mask: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 9px, #000 10px);
      opacity: .85;
    }

    .stage-nav {
      pointer-events: auto;
      display: flex;
      gap: 10px;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255, 250, 242, .52);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(36,49,44,.08);
      backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
    }

    .stage-dot {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(29,95,79,.26);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: width var(--transition-snap), background var(--transition-snap), transform var(--transition-snap);
    }

    .stage-dot.active {
      width: 36px;
      background: var(--palm);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    .stage-dot:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid var(--coral);
      outline-offset: 4px;
    }

    /* --- Fondo Botánico: Hojas por Silueta CSS --- */
    .botanical-field {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -1;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .leaf {
      position: absolute;
      width: clamp(180px, 22vw, 340px);
      height: clamp(360px, 44vw, 680px);
      opacity: .16;
      background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--palm-deep), var(--palm));
      transform-origin: 50% 80%;
      filter: blur(.15px);
      clip-path: path("M106 2 C45 67 11 155 18 251 C24 347 84 425 132 515 C177 417 248 351 256 246 C263 145 204 54 106 2 Z");
    }

    .leaf::before,
    .leaf::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 10% 45% 8% 48%;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.42);
      border-radius: 999px;
      transform: rotate(2deg);
    }

    .leaf::after {
      inset: 12% 15% 8% 18%;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0 23px, rgba(255,250,242,.32) 24px 26px, transparent 27px 52px);
      border-radius: 0;
      transform: none;
      mix-blend-mode: screen;
    }

    .leaf-1 {
      left: -7%;
      bottom: -32%;
      transform: rotate(-23deg) translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * -.7), calc(var(--wind-y) * .4), 0);
    }

    .leaf-2 {
      right: -9%;
      top: -28%;
      transform: rotate(154deg) scale(.88) translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * .5), calc(var(--wind-y) * -.4), 0);
      opacity: .13;
    }

    .leaf-3 {
      right: 10%;
      bottom: -45%;
      transform: rotate(19deg) scale(.68) translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * .3), calc(var(--wind-y) * .2), 0);
      opacity: .1;
    }

    .monstera {
      position: absolute;
      width: clamp(230px, 26vw, 440px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      left: 62%;
      top: 16%;
      opacity: .095;
      background: var(--palm);
      border-radius: 46% 54% 50% 50%;
      transform: rotate(-14deg) translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * -.4), calc(var(--wind-y) * -.2), 0);
      clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 62% 12%, 74% 5%, 78% 22%, 95% 24%, 83% 39%, 100% 51%, 81% 60%, 92% 79%, 70% 74%, 64% 100%, 50% 79%, 36% 100%, 30% 74%, 8% 79%, 19% 60%, 0 51%, 17% 39%, 5% 24%, 22% 22%, 26% 5%, 38% 12%);
    }

    .monstera::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 8% 47%;
      background: var(--linen);
      border-radius: 999px;
      opacity: .72;
    }

    /* --- Marea / Sistema de Revelado --- */
    .tide-system {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      perspective: 1400px;
    }

    .tide-loom {
      position: relative;
      width: min(1180px, calc(100vw - 34px));
      height: min(760px, calc(100vh - 112px));
      min-height: 560px;
      margin-top: 42px;
      border-radius: clamp(28px, 5vw, 62px);
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,250,242,.7), rgba(255,250,242,.24)),
        radial-gradient(circle at 10% 10%, rgba(255,250,242,.68), transparent 34%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 92% 88%, rgba(138,185,175,.32), transparent 30%);
      box-shadow:
        0 38px 120px rgba(36,49,44,.14),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.58);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .tide-loom::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -8%;
      background:
        linear-gradient(115deg, transparent 0 26%, rgba(255,250,242,.44) 28%, transparent 31% 59%, rgba(255,250,242,.26) 61%, transparent 65%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36,49,44,.04) 0 1px, transparent 1px 20px);
      transform: translateX(calc((var(--current-stage) - 2) * -5%)) rotate(-2deg);
      transition: transform var(--transition-soft);
      opacity: .72;
    }

    .shoreline {
      position: absolute;
      left: -10%;
      right: -10%;
      bottom: -26%;
      height: 52%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 18% 0%, rgba(255,250,242,.72), transparent 42%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 22%, rgba(138,185,175,.48), transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(201,222,215,.58), rgba(138,185,175,.78));
      border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0 / 36% 36% 0 0;
      transform:
        translate3d(calc(var(--wind-x) * .15), calc(var(--current-stage) * -4.2%), 70px)
        rotateX(54deg)
        scaleX(1.06);
      transition: transform var(--transition-soft);
      filter: saturate(1.04);
    }

    .shoreline::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 8% 8% auto;
      height: 12px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,250,242,.8), transparent),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 32px, rgba(255,250,242,.9) 33px 38px, transparent 39px 74px);
      border-radius: 999px;
      opacity: calc(.26 + var(--current-stage) * .1);
      transform: translateX(calc(var(--wind-x) * .8));
    }

    .tide-ring {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(58vw, 520px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      top: 50%;
      translate: -50% -50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(29,95,79,.15);
      opacity: .9;
      transform:
        rotate(calc(var(--current-stage) * 13deg))
        scale(calc(.82 + var(--current-stage) * .035));
      transition: transform var(--transition-soft);
    }

    .tide-ring::before,
    .tide-ring::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 9%;
      border-radius: inherit;
      border: 1px dashed rgba(185,148,98,.36);
    }

    .tide-ring::after {
      inset: 21%;
      border-style: solid;
      border-color: rgba(201,121,94,.18);
    }

    /* --- Escenas no Lineales --- */
    .stage {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: clamp(24px, 5vw, 76px);
      padding: clamp(28px, 6vw, 78px);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transform:
        translate3d(
          calc((var(--stage-index) - var(--current-stage)) * 9%),
          calc((var(--stage-index) - var(--current-stage)) * -3%),
          0
        )
        rotateZ(calc((var(--stage-index) - var(--current-stage)) * 2.4deg))
        scale(.94);
      filter: blur(10px);
      transition:
        opacity var(--transition-soft),
        transform var(--transition-soft),
        filter var(--transition-soft);
    }

    .stage.active {
      opacity: 1;
      pointer-events: auto;
      transform: translate3d(0, 0, 110px) rotateZ(0) scale(1);
      filter: blur(0);
    }

    .stage.exiting {
      opacity: .12;
      filter: blur(18px);
    }

    .stage-copy {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 3;
      max-width: 520px;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
      color: var(--coral);
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: .77rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: .22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transform: translateY(14px);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 740ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 740ms ease;
      transition-delay: 120ms;
    }

    .eyebrow::before {
      content: "";
      width: 42px;
      height: 1px;
      background: currentColor;
    }

    .active .eyebrow {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .title {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 9vw, 8.6rem);
      line-height: .84;
      letter-spacing: -.075em;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
    }

    .title span {
      display: inline-block;
      transform: translateY(110%) rotate(7deg);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 1000ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 700ms ease;
    }

    .active .title span:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 160ms; }
    .active .title span:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 260ms; }
    .active .title span:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 360ms; }

    .active .title span {
      transform: translateY(0) rotate(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .lead {
      margin: clamp(18px, 3vw, 28px) 0 0;
      max-width: 44ch;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.18rem);
      line-height: 1.75;
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.78);
      transform: translateY(18px);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 800ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 800ms ease;
      transition-delay: 420ms;
    }

    .active .lead {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .visual-card {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 380px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
      background:
        linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,250,242,.78), rgba(255,250,242,.32)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(36,49,44,.035) 0 1px, transparent 1px 18px);
      box-shadow:
        0 34px 90px rgba(36,49,44,.13),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7);
      overflow: hidden;
      transform: translateY(34px) rotate(-2deg);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 980ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 780ms ease;
      transition-delay: 260ms;
    }

    .active .visual-card {
      transform: translateY(0) rotate(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .visual-card::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 18px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(29,95,79,.13);
      border-radius: calc(var(--radius-xl) - 12px);
    }

    /* --- Stage 1: Portada --- */
    .date-knot {
      position: absolute;
      right: clamp(24px, 4vw, 44px);
      top: clamp(24px, 4vw, 44px);
      width: clamp(120px, 14vw, 168px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--white) 0 40%, transparent 41%),
        conic-gradient(from 0deg, var(--gold), var(--sea), var(--coral), var(--gold));
      color: var(--palm-deep);
      box-shadow: 0 24px 60px var(--soft-shadow);
      transform: rotate(calc(var(--current-stage) * 12deg));
      transition: transform var(--transition-soft);
    }

    .date-knot strong {
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 4vw, 4.2rem);
      letter-spacing: -.08em;
      line-height: .8;
    }

    .date-knot small {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 6px;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: .68rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .folded-name {
      position: absolute;
      left: clamp(22px, 4vw, 48px);
      bottom: clamp(28px, 5vw, 58px);
      right: 28px;
    }

    .names {
      margin: 0;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 5.9rem);
      line-height: .9;
      letter-spacing: -.07em;
      color: var(--palm);
    }

    .names em {
      display: block;
      font-style: normal;
      color: var(--coral);
      font-size: .42em;
      letter-spacing: .28em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin: .34em 0;
    }

    .palm-ribs {
      position: absolute;
      inset: auto -8% -18% auto;
      width: 76%;
      height: 76%;
      background:
        repeating-conic-gradient(from -28deg at 18% 88%, rgba(29,95,79,.28) 0 2deg, transparent 2deg 9deg);
      clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 100% 0, 74% 100%);
      opacity: .48;
    }

    /* --- Stage 2: Detalles --- */
    .detail-map {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
      gap: 14px;
      padding: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px);
      align-content: end;
    }

    .detail-tile {
      min-height: 132px;
      padding: 22px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.62);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(36,49,44,.07);
      transform: translateY(24px) scale(.96);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 760ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 760ms ease;
    }

    .active .detail-tile:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 260ms; }
    .active .detail-tile:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 360ms; }
    .active .detail-tile:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 460ms; }
    .active .detail-tile:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 560ms; }

    .active .detail-tile {
      transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .detail-tile i {
      color: var(--coral);
      font-size: 1.35rem;
    }

    .detail-tile span {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 16px;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: .72rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.54);
    }

    .detail-tile strong {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 7px;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.22rem);
      line-height: 1.3;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
    }

    /* --- Stage 3: Itinerario Ensamblado --- */
    .woven-timeline {
      position: relative;
      padding: clamp(30px, 4vw, 46px);
      display: grid;
      align-content: center;
      gap: 20px;
    }

    .timeline-strand {
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 92px 1fr;
      gap: 18px;
      align-items: center;
      transform: translateX(calc(var(--dir) * 54px));
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 820ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 820ms ease;
    }

    .active .timeline-strand:nth-child(1) { transition-delay: 240ms; }
    .active .timeline-strand:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 370ms; }
    .active .timeline-strand:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 500ms; }
    .active .timeline-strand:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 630ms; }

    .active .timeline-strand {
      transform: translateX(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .timeline-strand time {
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      min-height: 72px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: var(--palm);
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -.03em;
      box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(29,95,79,.2);
    }

    .timeline-strand div {
      padding: 20px 22px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.62);
      border: 1px solid rgba(36,49,44,.075);
    }

    .timeline-strand strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
    }

    .timeline-strand small {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 6px;
      line-height: 1.55;
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.68);
    }

    /* --- Stage 4: Código de Vestimenta --- */
    .palette-orbit {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }

    .orbit-core {
      width: clamp(170px, 22vw, 270px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--linen) 0 24%, transparent 25%),
        conic-gradient(var(--palm), var(--sea), var(--gold), var(--coral), var(--palm));
      box-shadow: 0 34px 78px rgba(36,49,44,.16);
      transform: rotate(calc(var(--current-stage) * 18deg));
      transition: transform var(--transition-soft);
    }

    .orbit-note {
      position: absolute;
      width: clamp(118px, 15vw, 168px);
      padding: 18px;
      border-radius: 28px;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.72);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 52px var(--soft-shadow);
      text-align: center;
      font-size: .86rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
      transform:
        rotate(var(--a))
        translateY(clamp(-155px, -17vw, -210px))
        rotate(calc(var(--a) * -1))
        scale(.82);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 840ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 840ms ease;
    }

    .active .orbit-note {
      opacity: 1;
      transform:
        rotate(var(--a))
        translateY(clamp(-175px, -20vw, -250px))
        rotate(calc(var(--a) * -1))
        scale(1);
    }

    .active .orbit-note:nth-child(2) { transition-delay: 260ms; }
    .active .orbit-note:nth-child(3) { transition-delay: 380ms; }
    .active .orbit-note:nth-child(4) { transition-delay: 500ms; }
    .active .orbit-note:nth-child(5) { transition-delay: 620ms; }

    /* --- Stage 5: RSVP como Resolución --- */
    .rsvp-stage {
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, .92fr) minmax(320px, 1.08fr);
    }

    .seal-area {
      position: relative;
      min-height: 430px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 78%, rgba(138,185,175,.4), transparent 34%),
        linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(255,250,242,.76), rgba(233,219,195,.42));
      box-shadow:
        0 34px 90px rgba(36,49,44,.13),
        inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(36,49,44,.06);
      overflow: hidden;
      transform: translateY(34px) rotate(2deg);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 980ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 780ms ease;
      transition-delay: 260ms;
      touch-action: none;
    }

    .active .seal-area {
      transform: translateY(0) rotate(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .seal-area::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 42px;
      width: min(74%, 430px);
      height: 120px;
      translate: -50% 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(29,95,79,.28), transparent 68%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 22px, rgba(255,250,242,.34) 23px 27px, transparent 28px 52px);
      opacity: .9;
    }

    .seal-area::after {
      content: "arrastra el sol hasta la orilla";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 66px;
      translate: -50% 0;
      width: max-content;
      max-width: calc(100% - 44px);
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.68);
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.64);
      font-size: .73rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: .16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: opacity var(--transition-snap), transform var(--transition-snap);
    }

    .confirmed .seal-area::after {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(16px);
    }

    .sun-seal {
      position: absolute;
      left: calc(50% + var(--seal-x));
      top: calc(34% + var(--seal-y));
      translate: -50% -50%;
      width: clamp(112px, 16vw, 160px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
      cursor: grab;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 42% 38%, #fff8dc 0 12%, transparent 13%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, #eecf8c 0 40%, transparent 41%),
        conic-gradient(from 12deg, var(--gold), #e8c67f, var(--coral), var(--gold));
      box-shadow:
        0 26px 65px rgba(185,148,98,.35),
        inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.7);
      transition:
        box-shadow var(--transition-snap),
        transform var(--transition-snap),
        left var(--transition-snap),
        top var(--transition-snap);
    }

    .sun-seal:active {
      cursor: grabbing;
      transform: scale(.96);
    }

    .sun-seal span {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 18px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.7);
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: .72rem;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: .14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      line-height: 1.2;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .confirmed .sun-seal {
      left: 50%;
      top: calc(100% - 102px);
      cursor: default;
      transform: scale(1.06);
      box-shadow:
        0 14px 44px rgba(185,148,98,.28),
        0 0 0 18px rgba(201,121,94,.08),
        0 0 0 38px rgba(138,185,175,.11);
    }

    .resolution-message {
      position: absolute;
      inset: auto 28px 26px;
      padding: 22px;
      border-radius: 24px;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.78);
      text-align: center;
      transform: translateY(26px);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: transform 760ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), opacity 760ms ease;
    }

    .confirmed .resolution-message {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .resolution-message strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2vw, 1.65rem);
      letter-spacing: -.04em;
      color: var(--palm-deep);
    }

    .resolution-message small {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 8px;
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.66);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    /* --- Controles Inferiores --- */
    .tide-controls {
      position: fixed;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: clamp(18px, 3vw, 32px);
      translate: -50% 0;
      z-index: 35;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      padding: 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(255,250,242,.62);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 54px rgba(36,49,44,.12);
    }

    .control-btn {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--palm-deep);
      color: var(--white);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform var(--transition-snap), background var(--transition-snap);
    }

    .control-btn:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.04);
      background: var(--palm);
    }

    .control-btn:disabled {
      opacity: .35;
      cursor: not-allowed;
      transform: none;
    }

    .tide-progress {
      width: clamp(150px, 22vw, 260px);
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(36,49,44,.12);
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .tide-progress span {
      display: block;
      height: 100%;
      width: calc((var(--current-stage) + 1) / 5 * 100%);
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--palm), var(--sea), var(--gold));
      border-radius: inherit;
      transition: width var(--transition-soft);
    }

    .gesture-hint {
      position: fixed;
      right: clamp(18px, 3vw, 34px);
      bottom: clamp(84px, 9vw, 104px);
      z-index: 28;
      writing-mode: vertical-rl;
      color: rgba(36,49,44,.48);
      font-size: .72rem;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: .16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* --- Footer Semántico Oculto Visualmente en SPA --- */
    .site-footer {
      position: fixed;
      left: 24px;
      bottom: 24px;
      z-index: 1;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* --- Estado Confirmado Global --- */
    body.confirmed .brand-mark::before {
      animation: settledSeal 1400ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both;
    }

    @keyframes settledSeal {
      0% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0); }
      35% { transform: scale(1.18) rotate(18deg); }
      100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(360deg); }
    }

    /* --- Accesibilidad / Reducción de Movimiento --- */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
        transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Tablet --- */
    @media (max-width: 920px) {
      html,
      body {
        overflow: auto;
      }

      body {
        min-height: auto;
      }

      .invitation-shell {
        height: auto;
        min-height: 100vh;
        overflow: visible;
        padding: 88px 16px 112px;
      }

      .site-header {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(233,219,195,.94), rgba(233,219,195,0));
      }

      .tide-system {
        position: relative;
        display: block;
        perspective: none;
      }

      .tide-loom {
        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
        min-height: unset;
        margin: 0;
        overflow: visible;
        background: transparent;
        box-shadow: none;
      }

      .tide-loom::before,
      .shoreline,
      .tide-ring {
        display: none;
      }

      .stage {
        position: relative;
        inset: auto;
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: 24px;
        margin: 0 0 24px;
        padding: 24px;
        min-height: auto;
        opacity: 1;
        pointer-events: auto;
        transform: none;
        filter: none;
        border-radius: 34px;
        background: rgba(255,250,242,.54);
        box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(36,49,44,.09);
      }

      .stage:not(.active) {
        opacity: .72;
      }

      .title span,
      .eyebrow,
      .lead,
      .visual-card,
      .detail-tile,
      .timeline-strand,
      .orbit-note,
      .seal-area {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: none;
      }

      .visual-card,
      .seal-area {
        min-height: 360px;
      }

      .rsvp-stage {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .tide-controls,
      .gesture-hint,
      .stage-nav {
        display: none;
      }

      .site-footer {
        position: relative;
        left: auto;
        bottom: auto;
        opacity: 1;
        pointer-events: auto;
        padding: 20px 0 0;
        text-align: center;
        color: rgba(36,49,44,.54);
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Móvil --- */
    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .site-header {
        padding: 18px;
      }

      .brand-mark {
        font-size: .64rem;
        letter-spacing: .12em;
      }

      .stage {
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 28px;
      }

      .title {
        font-size: clamp(3rem, 18vw, 5rem);
      }

      .detail-map {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        padding: 20px;
      }

      .timeline-strand {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .timeline-strand time {
        width: 94px;
      }

      .orbit-note {
        position: relative;
        width: auto;
        transform: none !important;
        margin: 8px;
      }

      .palette-orbit {
        position: relative;
        display: grid;
        gap: 10px;
        padding: 26px;
      }

      .orbit-core {
        width: 160px;
        margin: 0 auto 16px;
      }

      .date-knot {
        width: 116px;
      }

      .seal-area::after {
        font-size: .62rem;
        letter-spacing: .1em;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <div class="invitation-shell" id="app">
    <!-- --- Decoración Botánica --- -->
    <div class="botanical-field" aria-hidden="true">
      <span class="leaf leaf-1"></span>
      <span class="leaf leaf-2"></span>
      <span class="leaf leaf-3"></span>
      <span class="monstera"></span>
    </div>

    <!-- --- Header --- -->
    <header class="site-header">
      <a class="brand-mark" href="#inicio" aria-label="Ir al inicio de la invitación">
        Marea de Lino
      </a>

      <nav class="stage-nav" aria-label="Navegación de la invitación">
        <button class="stage-dot active" type="button" data-stage-target="0" aria-label="Ver portada"></button>
        <button class="stage-dot" type="button" data-stage-target="1" aria-label="Ver detalles"></button>
        <button class="stage-dot" type="button" data-stage-target="2" aria-label="Ver itinerario"></button>
        <button class="stage-dot" type="button" data-stage-target="3" aria-label="Ver código de vestimenta"></button>
        <button class="stage-dot" type="button" data-stage-target="4" aria-label="Confirmar asistencia"></button>
      </nav>
    </header>

    <!-- --- Contenido Principal SPA --- -->
    <main class="tide-system">
      <section class="tide-loom" aria-live="polite">
        <div class="shoreline" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        <div class="tide-ring" aria-hidden="true"></div>

        <!-- --- Sección Hero --- -->
        <article class="stage active" id="inicio" data-stage="0" style="--stage-index: 0;">
          <div class="stage-copy">
            <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Destino playa · tropical elegante</p>
            <h1 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1" class="title" aria-label="Una celebración junto al mar">
              <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4">Una</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-5">celebración</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-6">junto al mar</span>
            </h1>
            <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2" class="lead">
              Hay días que no se cuentan: se sienten como sal en la piel, lino fresco
              y una mesa larga bajo palmas. Te esperamos para compartir una noche cálida,
              íntima y luminosa.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="visual-card" aria-label="Tarjeta principal de la invitación">
            <div class="date-knot">
              <div>
                <strong>22</strong>
                <small>Agosto</small>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="palm-ribs" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <div class="folded-name">
              <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="names">
                Valeria
                <em>&</em>
                Mateo
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>

        <!-- --- Sección Detalles --- -->
        <article class="stage" id="detalles" data-stage="1" style="--stage-index: 1;">
          <div class="stage-copy">
            <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-1" class="eyebrow">La orilla se abre</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="detalles-titulo-1" class="title">
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-3">Detalles</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-4">que</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-5">emergen</span>
            </h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-2" class="lead">
              La información aparece como marcas suaves sobre la tela: sin prisa,
              sin ruido, como una marea que revela el camino correcto.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="visual-card detail-map">
            <div class="detail-tile">
              <i class="fa-regular fa-calendar"></i>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-6">Fecha</span>
              <strong>Sábado 22 de agosto</strong>
            </div>

            <div class="detail-tile">
              <i class="fa-regular fa-clock"></i>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-7">Hora</span>
              <strong>5:30 PM · Atardecer</strong>
            </div>

            <div class="detail-tile">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-8">Lugar</span>
              <strong>Casa Arena Blanca, Playa Escondida</strong>
            </div>

            <div class="detail-tile">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-champagne-glasses"></i>
              <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-9">Celebración</span>
              <strong>Ceremonia, cena y brindis frente al mar</strong>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>

        <!-- --- Sección Itinerario --- -->
        <article class="stage" id="itinerario" data-stage="2" style="--stage-index: 2;">
          <div class="stage-copy">
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Fibras de tiempo</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-1" class="title">
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-3">La</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-4">noche</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-5">tejida</span>
            </h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-2" class="lead">
              Cada momento se ensambla como una hebra de lino: breve, preciso,
              cálido. El recorrido no baja en línea recta; se cruza y se acomoda.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="visual-card woven-timeline">
            <div class="timeline-strand" style="--dir: -1;">
              <time datetime="17:30">5:30</time>
              <div>
                <strong>Recepción fresca</strong>
                <small>Agua de coco, bienvenida y primeras fotos con luz dorada.</small>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="timeline-strand" style="--dir: 1;">
              <time datetime="18:15">6:15</time>
              <div>
                <strong>Ceremonia frente al mar</strong>
                <small>Palmas, lino, arena clara y una pausa para escuchar la marea.</small>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="timeline-strand" style="--dir: -1;">
              <time datetime="19:30">7:30</time>
              <div>
                <strong>Cena tropical elegante</strong>
                <small>Sabores de costa, mesa compartida y brindis bajo luces cálidas.</small>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="timeline-strand" style="--dir: 1;">
              <time datetime="21:00">9:00</time>
              <div>
                <strong>Música junto a la orilla</strong>
                <small>Una celebración íntima, luminosa y con pies cerca de la arena.</small>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>

        <!-- --- Sección Dress Code --- -->
        <article class="stage" id="vestimenta" data-stage="3" style="--stage-index: 3;">
          <div class="stage-copy">
            <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Paleta respirable</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="vestimenta-titulo-1" class="title">
              <span data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-3">Lino</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-4">sal</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-5">palma</span>
            </h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-2" class="lead">
              Viste tonos naturales, fibras ligeras y siluetas limpias.
              La elegancia aquí no brilla: respira.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="visual-card palette-orbit">
            <div class="orbit-core" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="orbit-note" style="--a: 0deg;">Lino crudo</div>
            <div class="orbit-note" style="--a: 90deg;">Verde palma</div>
            <div class="orbit-note" style="--a: 180deg;">Arena cálida</div>
            <div class="orbit-note" style="--a: 270deg;">Coral suave</div>
          </div>
        </article>

        <!-- --- Sección RSVP / Resolución --- -->
        <article class="stage rsvp-stage" id="confirmacion" data-stage="4" style="--stage-index: 4;">
          <div class="stage-copy">
            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Resolución final</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1" class="title">
              <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-3">Sella</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-4">la</span>
              <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-5">orilla</span>
            </h2>
            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2" class="lead">
              No hay formulario. Para confirmar, toma el sol y llévalo hasta la marca
              de agua. Cuando toque la orilla, la invitación quedará sellada.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div class="seal-area" id="sealArea" aria-label="Área interactiva para confirmar asistencia">
            <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="sun-seal" id="sunSeal" type="button" aria-label="Arrastra para confirmar asistencia">
              <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-6">Confirmar asistencia</span>
            </button>

            <div class="resolution-message" role="status">
              <strong>Asistencia confirmada</strong>
              <small>
                La marea guardó tu respuesta en este navegador. Nos vemos junto al mar.
              </small>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
      </section>
    </main>

    <!-- --- Controles SPA --- -->
    <aside class="tide-controls" aria-label="Controles de avance">
      <button class="control-btn" id="prevStage" type="button" aria-label="Sección anterior">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i>
      </button>

      <div class="tide-progress" aria-hidden="true">
        <span></span>
      </div>

      <button class="control-btn" id="nextStage" type="button" aria-label="Siguiente sección">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-right"></i>
      </button>
    </aside>

    <p class="gesture-hint">rueda · desliza · explora</p>

    <!-- --- Footer --- -->
    <footer class="site-footer">
      <small>Invitación digital tropical elegante · Experiencia de una sola página</small>
    </footer>
  </div>

  <script>
    /* =========================================================
       JS SPA · Marea de Lino
       Interacción no lineal por etapas, movimiento de brisa,
       navegación sensorial y RSVP como gesto de resolución.
       ========================================================= */

    // --- Estado Global ---
    const app = document.querySelector("#app");
    const root = document.documentElement;
    const body = document.body;
    const stages = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".stage"));
    const dots = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".stage-dot"));
    const prevBtn = document.querySelector("#prevStage");
    const nextBtn = document.querySelector("#nextStage");
    const sealArea = document.querySelector("#sealArea");
    const sunSeal = document.querySelector("#sunSeal");

    const totalStages = stages.length;
    let currentStage = 0;
    let isAnimating = false;
    let wheelMemory = 0;
    let touchStartY = 0;

    const RSVP_KEY = "marea_lino_rsvp_confirmed";

    // --- Inicialización ---
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
      const storedConfirmation = localStorage.getItem(RSVP_KEY);

      if (storedConfirmation === "true") {
        body.classList.add("confirmed");
      }

      updateStage(0, true);
      updateControls();
    });

    // --- Navegación por Etapas ---
    function updateStage(nextIndex, instant = false) {
      const safeIndex = Math.max(0, Math.min(totalStages - 1, nextIndex));

      if (safeIndex === currentStage && !instant) return;

      isAnimating = true;

      stages.forEach((stage, index) => {
        stage.classList.toggle("active", index === safeIndex);
        stage.classList.toggle("exiting", index !== safeIndex);
      });

      dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
        dot.classList.toggle("active", index === safeIndex);
      });

      currentStage = safeIndex;
      root.style.setProperty("--current-stage", currentStage);
      updateControls();

      const hashMap = ["inicio", "detalles", "itinerario", "vestimenta", "confirmacion"];
      const nextHash = hashMap[currentStage];

      if (history.replaceState && nextHash) {
        history.replaceState(null, "", `#${nextHash}`);
      }

      window.setTimeout(() => {
        isAnimating = false;
      }, instant ? 0 : 760);
    }

    function updateControls() {
      prevBtn.disabled = currentStage === 0;
      nextBtn.disabled = currentStage === totalStages - 1;
    }

    function goNext() {
      if (!isAnimating) updateStage(currentStage + 1);
    }

    function goPrev() {
      if (!isAnimating) updateStage(currentStage - 1);
    }

    prevBtn.addEventListener("click", goPrev);
    nextBtn.addEventListener("click", goNext);

    dots.forEach((dot) => {
      dot.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const target = Number(dot.dataset.stageTarget);
        updateStage(target);
      });
    });

    // --- Scroll / Wheel como Movimiento de Marea ---
    window.addEventListener("wheel", (event) => {
      if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 920px)").matches) return;

      event.preventDefault();

      if (isAnimating) return;

      wheelMemory += event.deltaY;

      if (Math.abs(wheelMemory) > 90) {
        wheelMemory > 0 ? goNext() : goPrev();
        wheelMemory = 0;
      }
    }, { passive: false });

    // --- Gestos Touch para Mobile SPA en Desktop-like ---
    window.addEventListener("touchstart", (event) => {
      touchStartY = event.touches[0].clientY;
    }, { passive: true });

    window.addEventListener("touchend", (event) => {
      if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 920px)").matches) return;

      const endY = event.changedTouches[0].clientY;
      const diff = touchStartY - endY;

      if (Math.abs(diff) > 60) {
        diff > 0 ? goNext() : goPrev();
      }
    }, { passive: true });

    // --- Teclado ---
    window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      const nextKeys = ["ArrowRight", "ArrowDown", "PageDown", " "];
      const prevKeys = ["ArrowLeft", "ArrowUp", "PageUp"];

      if (nextKeys.includes(event.key)) {
        event.preventDefault();
        goNext();
      }

      if (prevKeys.includes(event.key)) {
        event.preventDefault();
        goPrev();
      }
    });

    // --- Brisa Reactiva al Cursor ---
    window.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      const x = (event.clientX / window.innerWidth - 0.5) * 26;
      const y = (event.clientY / window.innerHeight - 0.5) * 20;

      root.style.setProperty("--wind-x", `${x}px`);
      root.style.setProperty("--wind-y", `${y}px`);
    });

    window.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
      root.style.setProperty("--wind-x", "0px");
      root.style.setProperty("--wind-y", "0px");
    });

    // --- Smooth Scroll Semántico para Hashes ---
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach((anchor) => {
      anchor.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
        const id = anchor.getAttribute("href").replace("#", "");
        const targetStage = stages.findIndex((stage) => stage.id === id);

        if (targetStage >= 0) {
          event.preventDefault();
          updateStage(targetStage);
        }
      });
    });

    // --- RSVP: Confirmación como Resolución Física ---
    let dragging = false;
    let sealRect = null;
    let activePointerId = null;

    sunSeal.addEventListener("pointerdown", (event) => {
      if (body.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      dragging = true;
      activePointerId = event.pointerId;
      sealRect = sealArea.getBoundingClientRect();

      sunSeal.setPointerCapture(activePointerId);
      sunSeal.style.transition = "none";
      moveSeal(event.clientX, event.clientY);
    });

    sunSeal.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
      if (!dragging || event.pointerId !== activePointerId) return;
      moveSeal(event.clientX, event.clientY);
    });

    sunSeal.addEventListener("pointerup", (event) => {
      if (!dragging || event.pointerId !== activePointerId) return;

      dragging = false;
      sunSeal.style.transition = "";

      const y = event.clientY - sealRect.top;
      const threshold = sealRect.height * 0.67;

      if (y >= threshold) {
        confirmAttendance();
      } else {
        root.style.setProperty("--seal-x", "0px");
        root.style.setProperty("--seal-y", "0px");
      }

      activePointerId = null;
    });

    sunSeal.addEventListener("click", () => {
      if (body.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 920px)").matches) {
        confirmAttendance();
      }
    });

    function moveSeal(clientX, clientY) {
      const centerX = sealRect.left + sealRect.width / 2;
      const centerY = sealRect.top + sealRect.height * 0.34;

      const rawX = clientX - centerX;
      const rawY = clientY - centerY;

      const maxX = sealRect.width * 0.34;
      const maxYTop = -sealRect.height * 0.20;
      const maxYBottom = sealRect.height * 0.48;

      const clampedX = Math.max(-maxX, Math.min(maxX, rawX));
      const clampedY = Math.max(maxYTop, Math.min(maxYBottom, rawY));

      root.style.setProperty("--seal-x", `${clampedX}px`);
      root.style.setProperty("--seal-y", `${clampedY}px`);
    }

    function confirmAttendance() {
      body.classList.add("confirmed");
      localStorage.setItem(RSVP_KEY, "true");

      root.style.setProperty("--seal-x", "0px");
      root.style.setProperty("--seal-y", "0px");

      createTideRipple();
      sunSeal.setAttribute("aria-label", "Asistencia confirmada");
      sunSeal.querySelector("span").textContent = "Sellado";
    }

    // --- Microinteracción de Resolución sin Partículas Genéricas ---
    function createTideRipple() {
      const ripple = document.createElement("span");
      ripple.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");

      Object.assign(ripple.style, {
        position: "absolute",
        left: "50%",
        bottom: "78px",
        width: "46px",
        height: "18px",
        borderRadius: "50%",
        transform: "translateX(-50%) scale(1)",
        border: "1px solid rgba(29,95,79,.28)",
        opacity: "0.9",
        pointerEvents: "none",
        animation: "shoreSealRipple 1400ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) forwards"
      });

      const styleId = "shore-ripple-keyframes";

      if (!document.getElementById(styleId)) {
        const style = document.createElement("style");
        style.id = styleId;
        style.textContent = `
          @keyframes shoreSealRipple {
            0% {
              transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1);
              opacity: .9;
            }
            100% {
              transform: translateX(-50%) scale(9, 3.2);
              opacity: 0;
            }
          }
        `;
        document.head.appendChild(style);
      }

      sealArea.appendChild(ripple);

      window.setTimeout(() => {
        ripple.remove();
      }, 1450);
    }

    // --- Restaurar Estado Visual Confirmado ---
    if (localStorage.getItem(RSVP_KEY) === "true") {
      body.classList.add("confirmed");
      sunSeal.setAttribute("aria-label", "Asistencia confirmada");
      sunSeal.querySelector("span").textContent = "Sellado";
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética toscana con tonos olivo, tipografía serif y mosaicos. Atmósfera de tarde dorada entre olivos.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#9f6a43">
  <title>Invitación Digital · Romance en la Toscana</title>

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    /* --- Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --terracotta: #a65f3b;
      --terracotta-dark: #6f3924;
      --olive: #72734f;
      --olive-dark: #454832;
      --cream: #f6ead6;
      --sand: #e1c7a1;
      --wine: #6c2231;
      --ink: #30261f;
      --gold: #c99b57;
      --sky: #b9d7d3;
      --white: #fffaf1;
      --shadow: rgba(55, 31, 19, .22);
      --serif: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      --sans: "Inter", sans-serif;
    }

    /* --- Reset y Base --- */
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
    }

    body {
      overflow-x: hidden;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(255,255,255,.45), transparent 26rem),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #f8eedc 0%, #e8cfa9 42%, #c58d63 100%);
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: var(--sans);
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    body.confirmed {
      --terracotta: #8a432e;
      --olive: #626e42;
      --gold: #d8ae64;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: var(--wine);
      color: var(--white);
    }

    /* --- Fondo Vivo: Fresco Mediterráneo --- */
    .fresco {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: -2;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .fresco::before,
    .fresco::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: -12%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 20%, rgba(111, 57, 36, .16), transparent 24%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 82% 18%, rgba(114, 115, 79, .18), transparent 28%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 72% 82%, rgba(108, 34, 49, .14), transparent 24%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(115deg, rgba(255,255,255,.08) 0 1px, transparent 1px 18px);
      filter: blur(.2px);
      transform: rotate(var(--fresco-rotation, 0deg)) scale(1.04);
      transition: transform .5s ease-out;
    }

    .fresco::after {
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,.08), transparent 30%, rgba(255,255,255,.08) 60%, transparent),
        repeating-radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent 0 12px, rgba(84,54,31,.035) 13px 14px);
      mix-blend-mode: multiply;
      opacity: .75;
    }

    /* --- Navegación Lateral --- */
    .nav-vine {
      position: fixed;
      right: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 2rem);
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      z-index: 20;
      display: grid;
      gap: .85rem;
    }

    .nav-vine a {
      width: .7rem;
      height: .7rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: rgba(48, 38, 31, .25);
      border: 1px solid rgba(48, 38, 31, .18);
      transition: transform .3s ease, background .3s ease;
      position: relative;
    }

    .nav-vine a:hover,
    .nav-vine a.active {
      background: var(--wine);
      transform: scale(1.55);
    }

    .nav-vine a::before {
      content: attr(data-label);
      position: absolute;
      right: 1.4rem;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(.4rem);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      white-space: nowrap;
      font-size: .72rem;
      letter-spacing: .14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
      transition: .25s ease;
    }

    .nav-vine a:hover::before {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(0);
    }

    /* --- Layout General --- */
    .section {
      min-height: 100svh;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: clamp(4rem, 7vw, 8rem) 0;
      position: relative;
    }

    .eyebrow {
      font-size: .77rem;
      letter-spacing: .38em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* --- Hero: Pergamino Solar --- */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100svh;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: 2rem 0;
      isolation: isolate;
    }

    .hero-card {
      position: relative;
      width: min(970px, 92vw);
      min-height: min(760px, 88svh);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .sun-dial {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(700px, 86vw);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        conic-gradient(from 12deg,
          rgba(166,95,59,.10),
          rgba(201,155,87,.22),
          rgba(114,115,79,.13),
          rgba(108,34,49,.12),
          rgba(166,95,59,.10)
        );
      mask:
        radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 23%, #000 23.5% 24%, transparent 24.5% 35%, #000 35.5% 36%, transparent 36.5% 48%, #000 48.5% 49%, transparent 49.5%);
      animation: sundial 24s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes sundial {
      to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }

    .amphora {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(450px, 70vw);
      height: min(600px, 78vh);
      clip-path: polygon(42% 4%, 58% 4%, 63% 15%, 78% 24%, 86% 45%, 80% 70%, 62% 91%, 38% 91%, 20% 70%, 14% 45%, 22% 24%, 37% 15%);
      background:
        linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,250,241,.52), rgba(166,95,59,.20)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(88deg, transparent 0 16px, rgba(111,57,36,.055) 17px 18px);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 80px rgba(111,57,36,.22), 0 50px 90px rgba(77, 42, 22, .18);
      transform: translateY(1rem);
    }

    .hero-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      padding: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    }

    .hero-content h1 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(4.2rem, 13vw, 12rem);
      line-height: .78;
      font-weight: 500;
      letter-spacing: -.07em;
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
    }

    .hero-content h1 span {
      display: block;
      color: var(--wine);
      font-style: italic;
      transform: translateX(.08em);
    }

    .couple-names {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 5vw, 4.5rem);
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--ink);
    }

    .hero-date {
      display: inline-grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1rem;
      margin-top: 2rem;
      font-size: clamp(.9rem, 1.4vw, 1.1rem);
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .hero-date::before,
    .hero-date::after {
      content: "";
      height: 1px;
      width: clamp(3rem, 9vw, 7rem);
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--terracotta-dark));
    }

    .hero-date::after {
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--terracotta-dark), transparent);
    }

    .scroll-cue {
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: 2rem;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      gap: .7rem;
      color: var(--olive-dark);
      font-size: .72rem;
      letter-spacing: .25em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .scroll-cue::after {
      content: "";
      width: 1px;
      height: 3.6rem;
      background: linear-gradient(var(--olive-dark), transparent);
      animation: cue 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes cue {
      50% {
        transform: scaleY(.45);
        opacity: .45;
      }
    }

    /* --- Sección Mosaico: Revelado No Lineal --- */
    .mosaic-section {
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .mosaic-stage {
      width: min(1050px, 92vw);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.1fr;
      gap: clamp(2rem, 7vw, 6rem);
      align-items: center;
    }

    .mosaic-copy {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
    }

    .mosaic-copy h2,
    .itinerary h2,
    .rsvp-panel h2 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7.4rem);
      line-height: .82;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
      letter-spacing: -.055em;
    }

    .mosaic-copy p {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.35vw, 1.18rem);
      line-height: 1.85;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.82);
      max-width: 34rem;
    }

    .mosaic-grid {
      position: relative;
      height: min(620px, 74vh);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
      grid-template-rows: repeat(9, 1fr);
      gap: .55rem;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      perspective: 900px;
    }

    .tile {
      border-radius: 44% 56% 57% 43% / 42% 38% 62% 58%;
      background: var(--tile-color);
      box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.22), 0 18px 35px rgba(62, 36, 22, .13);
      opacity: 0;
      transform:
        translate(calc(var(--x) * 1px), calc(var(--y) * 1px))
        rotate(calc(var(--r) * 1deg))
        scale(.72);
      transition:
        transform 1s cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1),
        opacity .8s ease,
        border-radius 1.2s ease;
    }

    .mosaic-section.in-view .tile {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translate(0,0) rotate(0deg) scale(1);
    }

    .tile:nth-child(3n) {
      border-radius: 63% 37% 42% 58% / 50% 55% 45% 50%;
    }

    .tile:nth-child(5n) {
      border-radius: 30% 70% 58% 42% / 46% 38% 62% 54%;
    }

    .location-card {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 16% 10%;
      background: rgba(255,250,241,.86);
      border: 1px solid rgba(111,57,36,.14);
      box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(65, 38, 20, .18);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 2rem;
      clip-path: polygon(7% 0, 100% 5%, 95% 92%, 0 100%);
      opacity: 0;
      transform: rotate(-2deg) scale(.94);
      transition: .9s cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1) .45s;
    }

    .mosaic-section.in-view .location-card {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: rotate(-2deg) scale(1);
    }

    .location-card h3 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4.8rem);
      color: var(--wine);
      line-height: .95;
    }

    .location-card p {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.7;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    /* --- Sección Itinerario: Rama de Olivo --- */
    .itinerary {
      width: min(1020px, 92vw);
    }

    .branch {
      margin-top: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
      position: relative;
      display: grid;
      gap: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    }

    .branch::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      top: -2rem;
      bottom: -2rem;
      width: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(transparent, var(--olive), transparent);
      transform: translateX(-50%) scaleY(var(--branch-growth, 0));
      transform-origin: top;
      transition: transform .4s ease-out;
    }

    .moment {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 6rem 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 1.5rem;
      opacity: .25;
      transform: translateY(1.2rem);
      transition: .7s ease;
    }

    .moment.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .moment:nth-child(even) .moment-card {
      grid-column: 3;
    }

    .moment:nth-child(even) .olive-node {
      grid-column: 2;
      grid-row: 1;
    }

    .moment:nth-child(even) .moment-time {
      grid-column: 1;
      text-align: right;
    }

    .moment-card {
      background: rgba(255,250,241,.62);
      border: 1px solid rgba(111,57,36,.13);
      padding: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
      clip-path: polygon(0 8%, 94% 0, 100% 92%, 8% 100%);
      box-shadow: 0 24px 55px rgba(68, 39, 22, .12);
    }

    .moment-card h3 {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
    }

    .moment-card p {
      margin-top: .55rem;
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.78);
    }

    .moment-time {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .olive-node {
      width: 5.2rem;
      height: 5.2rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 34% 28%, rgba(255,255,255,.46), transparent 22%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--olive), var(--olive-dark));
      box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(69,72,50,.2);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--cream);
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      z-index: 2;
      position: relative;
    }

    .olive-node::before,
    .olive-node::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 2.2rem;
      height: 1.1rem;
      background: var(--olive);
      border-radius: 100% 0 100% 0;
      transform: translate(-2.6rem, -1.6rem) rotate(-35deg);
    }

    .olive-node::after {
      transform: translate(2.6rem, 1.6rem) rotate(145deg);
    }

    /* --- Sección Detalles: Mesa Mediterránea --- */
    .details-wrap {
      width: min(1120px, 92vw);
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.8rem);
    }

    .detail {
      min-height: 390px;
      padding: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2.2rem);
      background: rgba(255,250,241,.62);
      border: 1px solid rgba(111,57,36,.13);
      box-shadow: 0 28px 70px rgba(65, 38, 20, .13);
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      transform: translateY(2rem) rotate(var(--tilt));
      opacity: 0;
      transition: .8s cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1);
    }

    .details-wrap.in-view .detail {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0) rotate(var(--tilt));
    }

    .detail::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 15rem;
      height: 15rem;
      right: -5rem;
      top: -5rem;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--accent), transparent 68%);
      opacity: .22;
    }

    .detail-number {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 5rem;
      color: rgba(111,57,36,.16);
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .detail h3 {
      margin-top: 2.5rem;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 3vw, 3rem);
      color: var(--terracotta-dark);
    }

    .detail p {
      margin-top: 1rem;
      line-height: 1.75;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.78);
    }

    .detail strong {
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    /* --- RSVP: Sellado de la Carta --- */
    .rsvp-section {
      min-height: 110svh;
    }

    .rsvp-panel {
      width: min(940px, 92vw);
      min-height: 680px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    }

    .letter {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 4%;
      background:
        linear-gradient(115deg, rgba(255,255,255,.32), transparent 32%),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(111,57,36,.035) 0 1px, transparent 1px 22px),
        var(--white);
      clip-path: polygon(4% 3%, 97% 0, 94% 96%, 0 100%);
      box-shadow: 0 40px 100px rgba(65, 38, 20, .20);
      transform-origin: center;
      transition: transform .7s cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1), filter .7s ease;
    }

    .confirmed .letter {
      transform: rotate(.8deg) scale(.985);
      filter: saturate(1.08);
