    }

    .rsvp-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
    }

    .rsvp-panel p {
      max-width: 40rem;
      margin: 1.5rem auto 0;
      line-height: 1.85;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.78);
    }

    .seal-area {
      width: min(360px, 82vw);
      height: 230px;
      margin: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem) auto 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      position: relative;
    }

    .wine-line {
      position: absolute;
      width: 100%;
      height: 7rem;
      border: 2px solid rgba(108,34,49,.22);
      border-top: 0;
      border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%;
      transform: translateY(-1rem);
    }

    .seal {
      width: 8.6rem;
      height: 8.6rem;
      border: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 36% 28%, rgba(255,255,255,.22), transparent 23%),
        radial-gradient(circle, var(--wine) 0 58%, #4f1824 59%);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 -14px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.18),
        0 28px 48px rgba(108,34,49,.26);
      color: var(--cream);
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .13em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
      transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
      user-select: none;
      touch-action: manipulation;
    }

    .seal::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: .75rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px dashed rgba(255,250,241,.42);
    }

    .seal::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 1.65rem;
      background: rgba(255,250,241,.11);
      clip-path: polygon(50% 0, 61% 35%, 98% 35%, 68% 56%, 79% 92%, 50% 70%, 21% 92%, 32% 56%, 2% 35%, 39% 35%);
    }

    .seal:active,
    .seal.pressing {
      transform: scale(.92);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 -8px 13px rgba(0,0,0,.22),
        0 14px 30px rgba(108,34,49,.22);
    }

    .press-progress {
      position: absolute;
      width: 11.2rem;
      height: 11.2rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: conic-gradient(var(--gold) calc(var(--progress, 0) * 1%), transparent 0);
      mask: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 59%, #000 60%);
      pointer-events: none;
      transform: rotate(-90deg);
    }

    .confirmation-message {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
      color: var(--olive-dark);
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(1rem);
      transition: .7s cubic-bezier(.16, 1, .3, 1);
    }

    .confirmed .confirmation-message {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .reset-confirmation {
      margin-top: 1.5rem;
      background: transparent;
      border: 0;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.5);
      text-decoration: underline;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: .85rem;
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    footer {
      padding: 3rem 1rem 4rem;
      text-align: center;
      color: rgba(48,38,31,.6);
      font-size: .86rem;
    }

    /* --- Animaciones Utilitarias --- */
    .reveal {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(1rem);
      transition: opacity .75s ease, transform .75s ease;
    }

    .reveal.in-view {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    /* --- Responsive --- */
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .nav-vine {
        right: auto;
        left: 50%;
        top: auto;
        bottom: 1rem;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        grid-auto-flow: column;
        background: rgba(246,234,214,.7);
        backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
        padding: .8rem 1rem;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(111,57,36,.12);
      }

      .nav-vine a::before {
        display: none;
      }

      .mosaic-stage,
      .details-wrap {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .mosaic-grid {
        height: 500px;
      }

      .branch::before {
        left: 2.6rem;
      }

      .moment,
      .moment:nth-child(even) {
        grid-template-columns: 5.2rem 1fr;
      }

      .moment .olive-node,
      .moment:nth-child(even) .olive-node {
        grid-column: 1;
        grid-row: 1;
      }

      .moment .moment-time,
      .moment:nth-child(even) .moment-time {
        grid-column: 2;
        text-align: left;
      }

      .moment .moment-card,
      .moment:nth-child(even) .moment-card {
        grid-column: 2;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 560px) {
      .hero-card {
        min-height: 82svh;
      }

      .hero-content h1 {
        font-size: clamp(4rem, 21vw, 6.8rem);
      }

      .couple-names {
        font-size: 2rem;
      }

      .hero-date {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: .75rem;
      }

      .hero-date::before,
      .hero-date::after {
        display: none;
      }

      .mosaic-grid {
        height: 430px;
        gap: .38rem;
      }

      .location-card {
        inset: 18% 4%;
      }

      .moment {
        gap: 1rem;
      }

      .olive-node {
        width: 4.2rem;
        height: 4.2rem;
      }

      .detail {
        min-height: 320px;
      }

      .rsvp-panel {
        min-height: 620px;
      }
    }

    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        animation: none !important;
        transition: none !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
      }

      .tile,
      .reveal,
      .moment,
      .location-card {
        opacity: 1 !important;
        transform: none !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <div class="fresco" aria-hidden="true"></div>

  <nav class="nav-vine" aria-label="Navegación de la invitación">
    <a href="#inicio" data-label="Inicio" class="active"></a>
    <a href="#lugar" data-label="Lugar"></a>
    <a href="#itinerario" data-label="Ritual"></a>
    <a href="#detalles" data-label="Detalles"></a>
    <a href="#confirmar" data-label="Confirmar"></a>
  </nav>

  <header id="inicio" class="hero">
    <div class="hero-card">
      <div class="sun-dial" aria-hidden="true"></div>
      <div class="amphora" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      <div class="hero-content">
        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="eyebrow reveal">Una tarde dorada entre olivos</p>
        <h1 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1" class="reveal">Romance <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4">Toscano</span></h1>
        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2" class="couple-names reveal">Isabella & Mateo</p>
        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="hero-date reveal">Sábado · 18 de octubre · 2026</p>
      </div>

      <div class="scroll-cue">Descubre</div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <main>
    <section id="lugar" class="section mosaic-section">
      <div class="mosaic-stage">
        <div class="mosaic-copy">
          <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-1" class="eyebrow reveal">El mapa se arma como recuerdo</p>
          <h2 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-1" class="reveal">Cada pieza revela el destino.</h2>
          <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-2" class="reveal">
            Te esperamos donde la luz cae lenta, las mesas huelen a romero y la noche comienza como una postal mediterránea escrita a mano.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div class="mosaic-grid" aria-label="Mosaico interactivo del lugar">
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#a65f3b;--x:-260;--y:80;--r:-24;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#e1c7a1;--x:190;--y:-160;--r:45;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#72734f;--x:-160;--y:230;--r:-55;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#c99b57;--x:280;--y:120;--r:34;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#6c2231;--x:-300;--y:-120;--r:72;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#b9d7d3;--x:240;--y:220;--r:-36;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#f6ead6;--x:-80;--y:-280;--r:42;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#d9aa74;--x:180;--y:260;--r:-18;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#7e8a5c;--x:-230;--y:160;--r:62;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#bf7350;--x:310;--y:-70;--r:-68;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#ecd8b9;--x:-120;--y:300;--r:14;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#905036;--x:220;--y:-240;--r:82;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#c99b57;--x:-290;--y:-20;--r:-32;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#72734f;--x:120;--y:320;--r:25;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#f0dfc6;--x:340;--y:60;--r:-45;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#a65f3b;--x:-330;--y:260;--r:28;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#6c2231;--x:80;--y:-310;--r:-80;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#b9d7d3;--x:300;--y:-180;--r:50;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#e1c7a1;--x:-210;--y:-260;--r:-25;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#7e8a5c;--x:260;--y:280;--r:38;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#c58d63;--x:-90;--y:220;--r:-42;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#f6ead6;--x:150;--y:-190;--r:76;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#a65f3b;--x:-260;--y:-190;--r:-64;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#d2b174;--x:320;--y:210;--r:18;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#72734f;--x:-170;--y:120;--r:57;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#ecd8b9;--x:70;--y:250;--r:-22;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#6c2231;--x:220;--y:-30;--r:64;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#b9d7d3;--x:-310;--y:50;--r:-12;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#c99b57;--x:30;--y:-300;--r:41;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#a65f3b;--x:-40;--y:330;--r:-77;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#f6ead6;--x:290;--y:-250;--r:29;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#72734f;--x:-280;--y:-280;--r:70;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#d9aa74;--x:170;--y:170;--r:-59;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#e1c7a1;--x:-150;--y:-80;--r:21;"></div>
          <div class="tile" style="--tile-color:#905036;--x:340;--y:310;--r:-33;"></div>

          <div class="location-card">
            <div>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-3" class="eyebrow">Villa del Sol</p>
              <h3 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-2">Jardín de Olivos</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-4">
                Camino Antiguo 24, Terraza Mediterránea<br>
                Recepción al atardecer
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="itinerario" class="section">
      <div class="itinerary">
        <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-1" class="eyebrow reveal">La tarde crece como una rama</p>
        <h2 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-1" class="reveal">Ritual de luz, vino y promesas.</h2>

        <div class="branch">
          <article class="moment">
            <div class="moment-time">16:30</div>
            <div class="olive-node">I</div>
            <div class="moment-card">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-2">Bienvenida</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-2">Aperitivo frío, cítricos, pan artesanal y una primera copa bajo sombra de olivo.</p>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="moment">
            <div class="moment-time">17:20</div>
            <div class="olive-node">II</div>
            <div class="moment-card">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-3">Ceremonia</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-3">La promesa sucede cuando el sol toca la terraza y la piedra se vuelve dorada.</p>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="moment">
            <div class="moment-time">18:15</div>
            <div class="olive-node">III</div>
            <div class="moment-card">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-4">Mesa Toscana</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-4">Cena lenta, platos al centro, aceite de oliva, hierbas frescas y conversación larga.</p>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="moment">
            <div class="moment-time">20:00</div>
            <div class="olive-node">IV</div>
            <div class="moment-card">
              <h3 data-gemini-id="itinerario-titulo-5">Baile al Patio</h3>
              <p data-gemini-id="itinerario-texto-5">La música abre la noche como una ventana frente al Mediterráneo.</p>
            </div>
          </article>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="detalles" class="section">
      <div class="details-wrap">
        <article id="inferred-vestimenta-8" class="detail" style="--tilt:-1.4deg;--accent:#a65f3b;">
          <div class="detail-number">01</div>
          <h3 data-gemini-id="vestimenta-titulo-1">Código de Vestimenta</h3>
          <p data-gemini-id="vestimenta-texto-1">
            Tonos naturales: lino, arena, oliva, vino, terracotta y crema.
            <strong>Evita blanco total.</strong>
          </p>
        </article>

        <article class="detail" style="--tilt:1deg;--accent:#72734f;">
          <div class="detail-number">02</div>
          <h3 data-gemini-id="detalles-titulo-1">Regalo</h3>
          <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-1">
            Tu presencia es el detalle principal. Si deseas acompañarnos con algo más,
            habrá una mesa de sobres discretamente señalada.
          </p>
        </article>

        <article class="detail" style="--tilt:-.7deg;--accent:#6c2231;">
          <div class="detail-number">03</div>
          <h3 data-gemini-id="detalles-titulo-2">Nota de Viaje</h3>
          <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-2">
            Te recomendamos llegar 20 minutos antes. El acceso al jardín se cierra durante la ceremonia.
          </p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="confirmar" class="section rsvp-section">
      <div class="rsvp-panel">
        <div class="letter" aria-hidden="true"></div>

        <div class="rsvp-content">
          <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="eyebrow reveal">Confirmación como sello final</p>
          <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1" class="reveal">Sella tu lugar en la mesa.</h2>
          <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2" class="reveal">
            Mantén presionado el sello hasta completar el círculo dorado. La invitación quedará marcada como confirmada en este navegador.
          </p>

          <div class="seal-area">
            <div class="wine-line" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="press-progress" aria-hidden="true"></div>

            <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="seal" id="sealButton" type="button" aria-label="Mantén presionado para confirmar asistencia">
              Sellar
            </button>
          </div>

          <div class="confirmation-message" id="confirmationMessage">
            Asistencia confirmada. Nos vemos bajo los olivos.
          </div>

          <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-2" class="reset-confirmation" id="resetConfirmation" type="button">
            Reiniciar sello
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <footer>
    Invitación digital de una sola página · Romance en la Toscana / Mediterránea
  </footer>

  <script>
    // --- Estado Inicial ---
    const body = document.body;
    const savedConfirmation = localStorage.getItem("toscana-rsvp-confirmed") === "true";

    if (savedConfirmation) {
      body.classList.add("confirmed");
    }

    // --- Revelado por Intersección ---
    const observerOptions = {
      threshold: 0.22,
      rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
    };

    const sectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((entry) => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("in-view");
        }
      });
    }, observerOptions);

    document.querySelectorAll(".reveal, .mosaic-section, .details-wrap").forEach((element) => {
      sectionObserver.observe(element);
    });

    // --- Crecimiento Orgánico del Itinerario ---
    const branch = document.querySelector(".branch");
    const moments = [...document.querySelectorAll(".moment")];

    function updateBranchGrowth() {
      if (!branch) return;

      const rect = branch.getBoundingClientRect();
      const viewport = window.innerHeight;
      const progress = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, (viewport * 0.75 - rect.top) / rect.height));

      branch.style.setProperty("--branch-growth", progress.toFixed(3));

      moments.forEach((moment, index) => {
        if (progress > (index + 1) / (moments.length + 1) - 0.08) {
          moment.classList.add("visible");
        }
      });
    }

    // --- Navegación Activa ---
    const navLinks = [...document.querySelectorAll(".nav-vine a")];
    const sections = navLinks.map((link) => document.querySelector(link.getAttribute("href")));

    function updateActiveNavigation() {
      let activeIndex = 0;

      sections.forEach((section, index) => {
        if (!section) return;

        const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();

        if (rect.top <= window.innerHeight * 0.45) {
          activeIndex = index;
        }
      });

      navLinks.forEach((link, index) => {
        link.classList.toggle("active", index === activeIndex);
      });
    }

    // --- Fresco Reactivo al Scroll ---
    function updateFrescoRotation() {
      const scrollRatio = window.scrollY / Math.max(1, document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight);
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--fresco-rotation", `${scrollRatio * 8}deg`);
    }

    // --- RSVP: Presionar para Sellar ---
    const sealButton = document.getElementById("sealButton");
    const progressRing = document.querySelector(".press-progress");
    const resetButton = document.getElementById("resetConfirmation");

    let pressStart = 0;
    let animationFrame = null;
    let isPressing = false;
    const requiredHold = 1650;

    function setProgress(value) {
      progressRing.style.setProperty("--progress", Math.round(value * 100));
    }

    function confirmAttendance() {
      body.classList.add("confirmed");
      localStorage.setItem("toscana-rsvp-confirmed", "true");
      setProgress(1);
      sealButton.textContent = "Sellado";
      sealButton.setAttribute("aria-label", "Asistencia confirmada");
    }

    function tickPress(timestamp) {
      if (!isPressing) return;

      if (!pressStart) pressStart = timestamp;

      const elapsed = timestamp - pressStart;
      const progress = Math.min(1, elapsed / requiredHold);

      setProgress(progress);

      if (progress >= 1) {
        isPressing = false;
        sealButton.classList.remove("pressing");
        confirmAttendance();
        return;
      }

      animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(tickPress);
    }

    function startPress() {
      if (body.classList.contains("confirmed")) return;

      isPressing = true;
      pressStart = 0;
      sealButton.classList.add("pressing");
      animationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(tickPress);
    }

    function cancelPress() {
      if (!isPressing) return;

      isPressing = false;
      pressStart = 0;
      sealButton.classList.remove("pressing");
      cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrame);
      setProgress(0);
    }

    sealButton.addEventListener("pointerdown", startPress);
    sealButton.addEventListener("pointerup", cancelPress);
    sealButton.addEventListener("pointerleave", cancelPress);
    sealButton.addEventListener("pointercancel", cancelPress);

    resetButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
      localStorage.removeItem("toscana-rsvp-confirmed");
      body.classList.remove("confirmed");
      sealButton.textContent = "Sellar";
      sealButton.setAttribute("aria-label", "Mantén presionado para confirmar asistencia");
      setProgress(0);
    });

    // --- Suavidad de Enlaces Internos ---
    navLinks.forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
        event.preventDefault();

        const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute("href"));

        if (target) {
          target.scrollIntoView({
            behavior: "smooth",
            block: "start"
          });
        }
      });
    });

    // --- Ciclo Principal de Scroll ---
    let ticking = false;

    function onScroll() {
      if (ticking) return;

      window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        updateBranchGrowth();
        updateActiveNavigation();
        updateFrescoRotation();
        ticking = false;
      });

      ticking = true;
    }

    window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener("resize", onScroll);

    window.addEventListener("load", () => {
      onScroll();

      document.querySelectorAll(".hero .reveal").forEach((item, index) => {
        setTimeout(() => item.classList.add("in-view"), 180 + index * 180);
      });

      if (body.classList.contains("confirmed")) {
        sealButton.textContent = "Sellado";
        setProgress(1);
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética vintage clásica con tonos sepia, tipografía serif y sellos reales. Atmósfera de crónica real.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital de boda estilo Vintage Clásico / Monograma Real.">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#1b120d">

  <title>Invitación Real | Isabella & Alejandro</title>

  <!-- CDNs externas -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600;700;900&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
      METÁFORA VISUAL:
      "Un sello real de lacre abre un mecanismo heráldico.
      La invitación no aparece en scroll lineal: se ensambla
      como un blasón antiguo, con placas, anillos y filigranas."
    ========================================================= */

    /* --- Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --ink: #1b120d;
      --ink-soft: #3b2a1f;
      --paper: #f3e7cf;
      --paper-deep: #e2ceb0;
      --gold: #b98e48;
      --gold-dark: #70501f;
      --wine: #5a1518;
      --wine-dark: #29080a;
      --sage: #70705a;
      --shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);

      --radius-xl: 34px;

      --font-display: "Cinzel", serif;
      --font-serif: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      --font-script: "Great Vibes", cursive;

      --phase: 0;
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      background: var(--ink);
    }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      font-family: var(--font-serif);
      color: var(--ink);
      overflow-x: hidden;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 8%, rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.14), transparent 36rem),
        radial-gradient(circle at 0% 46%, rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.26), transparent 34rem),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #100b08, #261710 42%, #0c0806);
    }

    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -3;
      opacity: 0.34;
      pointer-events: none;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.035) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 42px 42px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, #000 0 48%, transparent 78%);
    }

    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: -2;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0.16;
      mix-blend-mode: overlay;
      background:
        repeating-linear-gradient(
          96deg,
          rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 0,
          rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 1px,
          transparent 1px,
          transparent 7px
        );
    }

    a {
      color: inherit;
      text-decoration: none;
    }

    button,
    input,
    select,
    textarea {
      font: inherit;
    }

    button {
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 0;
      background: none;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: var(--wine);
      color: var(--paper);
    }

    /* --- Utilidades --- */
    .eyebrow {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 1.4vw, 0.86rem);
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.32em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .royal-copy {
      font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.8vw, 1.35rem);
      line-height: 1.75;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
    }

    .ornament-divider {
      width: min(320px, 70vw);
      height: 34px;
      margin: 1.2rem auto;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      color: var(--gold);
    }

    .ornament-divider svg {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      overflow: visible;
    }

    /* --- Navegación Real --- */
    .royal-nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 1rem;
      left: 50%;
      z-index: 50;
      width: min(940px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .nav-plate {
      pointer-events: auto;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.4rem;
      padding: 0.55rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.42);
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.94), rgba(226, 206, 176, 0.9)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 12px, rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.07) 12px 13px);
      box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
    }

    .nav-plate a {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      min-height: 38px;
      padding: 0.45rem 0.82rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
      transition: color 0.35s ease, background 0.35s ease, transform 0.35s ease;
    }

    .nav-plate a:hover,
    .nav-plate a.is-active {
      color: var(--paper);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 20%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent 42%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--wine), var(--wine-dark));
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    .nav-seal {
      display: none;
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--paper);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24), transparent 26%),
        radial-gradient(circle, var(--wine), var(--wine-dark));
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.5),
        0 12px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
    }

    /* --- Layout SPA --- */
    .invitation-shell {
      position: relative;
    }

    .scroll-chronicle {
      position: relative;
      height: 540vh;
    }

    .royal-stage {
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      isolation: isolate;
      padding: 5.8rem 1.2rem 2rem;
    }

    .royal-stage::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      z-index: -1;
      width: min(86vw, 860px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.18);
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 34px rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.018),
        inset 0 0 0 36px rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.08);
      transform: rotate(calc(var(--phase) * 56deg)) scale(calc(0.88 + var(--phase) * 0.08));
      transition: transform 0.08s linear;
    }

    .royal-stage::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      z-index: -2;
      width: min(92vw, 980px);
      aspect-ratio: 1.28;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.22), transparent 64%);
      filter: blur(18px);
    }

    .manuscript {
      position: relative;
      width: min(1180px, 100%);
      min-height: min(760px, calc(100vh - 8rem));
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
    }

    /* --- Hero / Monograma Real --- */
    .hero-medallion {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(620px, 86vw);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      transform:
        scale(calc(1 - var(--phase) * 0.12))
        rotate(calc(var(--phase) * -5deg));
      transform-origin: center;
      transition: transform 0.08s linear;
    }

    .filigree-ring {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      opacity: 0.9;
      background:
        conic-gradient(
          from calc(var(--phase) * 180deg),
          transparent 0 4deg,
          rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.86) 4deg 5deg,
          transparent 5deg 20deg,
          rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.36) 20deg 21deg,
          transparent 21deg 38deg
        );
      mask:
        radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 61%, #000 61.4% 62.6%, transparent 63% 100%);
    }

    .filigree-ring.second {
      inset: 7%;
      opacity: 0.55;
      transform: rotate(calc(var(--phase) * -115deg));
      mask:
        radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 68%, #000 68.3% 70%, transparent 70.4% 100%);
    }

    .crest-card {
      position: relative;
      width: 78%;
      aspect-ratio: 0.78;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      overflow: hidden;
      padding: clamp(1.3rem, 5vw, 3.4rem);
      border-radius: 46% 46% 32% 32% / 42% 42% 24% 24%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.7);
      background:
        linear-gradient(150deg, rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.96), rgba(226, 206, 176, 0.94)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 11px, rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.06) 11px 12px);
      box-shadow:
        0 34px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.34),
        inset 0 0 0 10px rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.32),
        inset 0 0 0 12px rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.18);
    }

    .crest-card::before,
    .crest-card::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      width: 54%;
      height: 54%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.42);
      border-radius: 50%;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .crest-card::before {
      top: -23%;
      left: -17%;
    }

    .crest-card::after {
      right: -19%;
      bottom: -24%;
    }

    .corner-fleur {
      position: absolute;
      width: 78px;
      height: 78px;
      color: rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.72);
    }

    .corner-fleur.tl {
      top: 20px;
      left: 20px;
    }

    .corner-fleur.tr {
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      transform: rotate(90deg);
    }

    .corner-fleur.bl {
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 20px;
      transform: rotate(-90deg);
    }

    .corner-fleur.br {
      right: 20px;
      bottom: 20px;
      transform: rotate(180deg);
    }

    /* --- Hero / Nombres Legibles --- */
    .hero-identity {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 3;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      min-height: 430px;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      padding: clamp(1.4rem, 4vw, 2.6rem);
    }

    .royal-watermark {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 50% auto auto 50%;
      width: min(330px, 72%);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      opacity: 0.08;
      color: var(--wine);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .royal-watermark span {
      position: absolute;
      font-family: var(--font-script);
      font-size: clamp(8rem, 18vw, 13rem);
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .royal-watermark span:first-child {
      transform: translateX(-0.26em) rotate(-8deg);
    }

    .royal-watermark span:last-child {
      transform: translateX(0.26em) rotate(8deg);
    }

    .names-stack {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 4;
      display: grid;
      justify-items: center;
      gap: clamp(0.2rem, 1vw, 0.6rem);
      width: 100%;
    }

    .wedding-name {
      display: block;
      max-width: 100%;
      font-family: var(--font-script);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.82;
      color: var(--wine);
      text-shadow:
        0 2px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42),
        0 10px 24px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.12);
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .name-top {
      font-size: clamp(4.2rem, 10vw, 7.4rem);
      transform: translateX(-0.08em);
    }

    .name-bottom {
      font-size: clamp(4rem, 9.4vw, 7rem);
      transform: translateX(0.06em);
    }

    .amp-medallion {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 5;
      width: clamp(66px, 12vw, 94px);
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      margin-block: clamp(-0.2rem, -0.6vw, -0.1rem);
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: var(--paper);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 35% 24%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24), transparent 32%),
        radial-gradient(circle, var(--wine), var(--wine-dark));
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.66),
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.08),
        0 16px 30px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.22);
    }

    .amp-medallion::before,
    .amp-medallion::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      width: clamp(52px, 10vw, 92px);
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.88), transparent);
    }

    .amp-medallion::before {
      right: calc(100% + 0.6rem);
    }

    .amp-medallion::after {
      left: calc(100% + 0.6rem);
    }

    .amp-medallion span {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .hero-subtitle {
      position: absolute;
      left: 50%;
      bottom: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.8rem);
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 100%;
      padding-inline: 1.2rem;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(0.7rem, 1.4vw, 0.92rem);
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.28em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .scroll-instruction {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 1.2rem;
      left: 50%;
      z-index: 6;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.75rem;
      padding: 0.7rem 0.95rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.36);
      color: var(--paper);
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      background: rgba(27, 18, 13, 0.42);
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      opacity: calc(1 - min(var(--phase) * 4, 1));
      transition: opacity 0.08s linear;
    }

    .scroll-instruction i {
      color: var(--gold);
      animation: nudgeDown 1.7s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes nudgeDown {
      0%,
      100% {
        transform: translateY(-2px);
      }

      50% {
        transform: translateY(4px);
      }
    }

    /* --- Placas de Información No Lineal --- */
    .royal-panel {
      position: absolute;
      width: min(430px, 86vw);
      min-height: 265px;
      overflow: hidden;
      padding: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2rem);
      border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.6);
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transform-origin: center;
      background:
        linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.96), rgba(226, 206, 176, 0.92)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(98deg, transparent 0 10px, rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.055) 10px 11px);
      box-shadow:
        0 26px 64px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28),
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.33),
        inset 0 0 0 9px rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.13);
      transition:
        opacity 0.7s ease,
        transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.18, 0.84, 0.2, 1),
        filter 0.7s ease;
    }

    .royal-panel::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 14px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.35);
      border-radius: calc(var(--radius-xl) - 11px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .royal-panel::after {
      content: attr(data-chapter);
      position: absolute;
      right: 1.1rem;
      bottom: 0.72rem;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.48);
    }

    .royal-panel.is-visible {
      opacity: 1;
      filter: blur(0);
      pointer-events: auto;
    }

    .royal-panel h2 {
      margin-top: 0.3rem;
      font-family: var(--font-script);
      font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 4.9rem);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.82;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .mini-rule {
      width: 86px;
      height: 1px;
      margin: 1.1rem 0;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
    }

    .panel-date {
      transform: translate(-46vw, -18vh) rotate(-9deg) scale(0.82);
    }

    .panel-place {
      transform: translate(45vw, -15vh) rotate(8deg) scale(0.82);
    }

    .panel-story {
      transform: translate(-42vw, 26vh) rotate(7deg) scale(0.82);
    }

    .panel-family {
      transform: translate(42vw, 25vh) rotate(-7deg) scale(0.82);
    }

    .panel-rsvp {
      transform: translateY(38vh) scale(0.82);
    }

    .panel-date.is-visible {
      transform: translate(-30vw, -13vh) rotate(-3deg) scale(1);
    }

    .panel-place.is-visible {
      transform: translate(30vw, -12vh) rotate(3deg) scale(1);
    }

    .panel-story.is-visible {
      transform: translate(-29vw, 21vh) rotate(2deg) scale(1);
    }

    .panel-family.is-visible {
      transform: translate(29vw, 20vh) rotate(-2deg) scale(1);
    }

    .panel-rsvp.is-visible {
      transform: translateY(10vh) rotate(0.8deg) scale(1);
    }

    /* --- Contenido de Placas --- */
    .date-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.9rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
    }

    .date-grid strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 9vw, 5.2rem);
      line-height: 0.82;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .date-grid span {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .date-side {
      text-align: center;
      padding-block: 0.55rem;
      border-block: 1px solid rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.22);
    }

    .place-card {
      display: grid;
      gap: 0.8rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .place-card p {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      line-height: 1.55;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
    }

    .dress-token {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.55rem;
      width: fit-content;
      margin-top: 1rem;
      padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.28);
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--wine);
      background: rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.14);
    }

    .itinerary-list {
      display: grid;
      gap: 0.72rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .itinerary-item {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
      gap: 0.95rem;
      align-items: center;
      padding-bottom: 0.7rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.14);
    }

    .itinerary-item:last-child {
      padding-bottom: 0;
      border-bottom: 0;
    }

    .itinerary-time {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .itinerary-item strong {
      display: block;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .itinerary-item span {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 0.1rem;
      font-size: 0.98rem;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
    }

    .family-columns {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 1rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .family-columns h3 {
      margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.74rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .family-columns p {
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.55;
      color: var(--ink-soft);
    }

    .panel-actions {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 0.7rem;
      margin-top: 1.2rem;
    }

    .royal-btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 0.55rem;
      min-height: 44px;
      padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--paper);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 30% 20%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18), transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(135deg, var(--wine), var(--wine-dark));
      box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.2);
      transition: transform 0.35s ease, box-shadow 0.35s ease;
    }

    .royal-btn:hover {
      transform: translateY(-2px) rotate(-0.4deg);
      box-shadow: 0 18px 26px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.25);
    }

    .royal-btn.secondary {
      color: var(--wine);
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.42);
      background: rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.16);
      box-shadow: none;
    }

    .seal-feedback {
      min-height: 1.2rem;
      margin-top: 0.8rem;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    /* --- Formulario RSVP --- */
    .rsvp-form {
      display: grid;
      gap: 0.78rem;
      margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .form-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 0.7rem;
    }

    .field label {
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.64rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.16em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold-dark);
    }

    .field input,
    .field select,
    .field textarea {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 0.75rem 0.85rem;
      border-radius: 18px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.24);
      outline: none;
      color: var(--ink);
      background: rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.62);
      transition: border-color 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease;
    }

    .field textarea {
      min-height: 86px;
      resize: vertical;
    }

    .field input:focus,
    .field select:focus,
    .field textarea:focus {
      border-color: rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.55);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.08);
      background: rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.9);
    }

    .field.is-error input,
    .field.is-error select,
    .field.is-error textarea {
      border-color: rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.75);
    }

    .field-error {
      display: none;
      margin-top: 0.25rem;
      font-size: 0.86rem;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .field.is-error .field-error {
      display: block;
    }

    /* --- Medidor de Capítulos --- */
    .chapter-meter {
      position: fixed;
      top: 50%;
      right: 1rem;
      z-index: 40;
      display: grid;
      gap: 0.55rem;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
    }

    .chapter-dot {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.68);
      background: rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.18);
      transition: transform 0.35s ease, background 0.35s ease;
    }

    .chapter-dot.is-active {
      transform: scale(1.55);
      background: var(--gold);
    }

    /* --- Sección Final --- */
    .closing-section {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      padding: 6rem 1.2rem;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.12), transparent 34rem),
        linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28));
    }

    .closing-card {
      position: relative;
      width: min(860px, 100%);
      overflow: hidden;
      padding: clamp(2rem, 7vw, 5rem);
      text-align: center;
      border-radius: 46px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.6);
      background:
        linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.96), rgba(226, 206, 176, 0.94)),
        repeating-linear-gradient(95deg, transparent 0 10px, rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.05) 10px 11px);
      box-shadow:
        0 36px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32),
        inset 0 0 0 12px rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.24),
        inset 0 0 0 13px rgba(112, 80, 31, 0.14);
    }

    .closing-card::before {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 24px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.38);
      border-radius: 32px;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .final-monogram {
      width: 128px;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      margin: 0 auto 1.4rem;
      border-radius: 50%;
      font-family: var(--font-script);
      font-size: 4.8rem;
      color: var(--paper);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 34% 24%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24), transparent 28%),
        radial-gradient(circle, var(--wine), var(--wine-dark));
      box-shadow:
        inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(185, 142, 72, 0.7),
        inset 0 0 0 8px rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.08),
        0 16px 34px rgba(90, 21, 24, 0.28);
    }

    .closing-card h2 {
      font-family: var(--font-script);
      font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 9vw, 7rem);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.85;
      color: var(--wine);
    }

    .closing-card p {
      width: min(610px, 100%);
      margin: 1.2rem auto 0;
    }

    /* --- Footer --- */
    .royal-footer {
      padding: 2rem 1rem 2.6rem;
      text-align: center;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(243, 231, 207, 0.72);
    }

    /* --- Animaciones --- */
    .ink-awake {
      animation: inkAwake 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 0.84, 0.2, 1) both;
    }

    @keyframes inkAwake {
      from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(14px) scale(0.96);
        filter: blur(8px);
      }

      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
        filter: blur(0);
      }
    }

    .seal-pulse {
      animation: sealPulse 0.9s ease both;
    }

    @keyframes sealPulse {
      0% {
        transform: scale(1);
      }

      38% {
        transform: scale(0.92) rotate(-2deg);
      }

      72% {
        transform: scale(1.04) rotate(1deg);
      }

      100% {
        transform: scale(1);
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Tablet --- */
    @media (max-width: 1080px) {
      .manuscript {
        min-height: calc(100vh - 7rem);
      }

      .hero-medallion {
        width: min(560px, 84vw);
        opacity: calc(1 - min(var(--phase) * 0.65, 0.36));
      }

      .royal-panel {
        width: min(390px, 86vw);
      }

      .panel-date.is-visible {
        transform: translate(-22vw, -16vh) rotate(-2deg) scale(0.98);
      }

      .panel-place.is-visible {
        transform: translate(22vw, -15vh) rotate(2deg) scale(0.98);
      }

      .panel-story.is-visible {
        transform: translate(-22vw, 18vh) rotate(1.5deg) scale(0.98);
      }

      .panel-family.is-visible {
        transform: translate(22vw, 18vh) rotate(-1.5deg) scale(0.98);
      }

      .panel-rsvp.is-visible {
        transform: translateY(12vh) scale(0.98);
      }
    }

    /* --- Responsive Móvil --- */
    @media (max-width: 760px) {
      .royal-nav {
        top: 0.8rem;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        padding-inline: 0.8rem;
      }

      .nav-seal {
        display: inline-flex;
        pointer-events: auto;
      }

      .nav-plate {
        position: absolute;
        top: 3.5rem;
        right: 1rem;
        width: min(270px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
        display: grid;
        border-radius: 24px;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.96);
        pointer-events: none;
        transition: opacity 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease;
      }

      .royal-nav.is-open .nav-plate {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
        pointer-events: auto;
      }

      .nav-plate a {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        border-radius: 16px;
      }

      .chapter-meter {
        display: none;
      }

      .scroll-chronicle {
        height: auto;
      }

      .royal-stage {
        position: relative;
        min-height: auto;
        overflow: visible;
        padding: 6.2rem 1rem 2rem;
      }

      .manuscript {
        min-height: auto;
        display: grid;
        gap: 1.2rem;
      }

      .hero-medallion {
        position: relative;
        width: min(480px, 92vw);
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
        transform: none;
      }

      .crest-card {
        width: 86%;
      }

      .hero-identity {
        min-height: 380px;
      }

      .name-top {
        font-size: clamp(3.8rem, 17vw, 5.8rem);
      }

      .name-bottom {
        font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 16vw, 5.6rem);
      }

      .amp-medallion::before,
      .amp-medallion::after {
        width: 44px;
      }

      .scroll-instruction {
        display: none;
      }

      .royal-panel,
      .royal-panel.is-visible,
      .panel-date,
      .panel-place,
      .panel-story,
      .panel-family,
      .panel-rsvp {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        min-height: unset;
        opacity: 1;
        filter: none;
        transform: none;
        pointer-events: auto;
      }

      .date-grid,
      .form-row,
      .family-columns {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      .date-grid strong {
        font-size: 4.4rem;
        text-align: center;
      }

      .closing-section {
        min-height: auto;
        padding: 2rem 1rem 4rem;
      }

      .closing-card {
        border-radius: 30px;
      }

      .closing-card::before {
        inset: 15px;
        border-radius: 22px;
      }
    }

    @media (max-width: 420px) {
      .royal-stage {
        padding-top: 5.6rem;
      }

      .corner-fleur {
        width: 54px;
        height: 54px;
      }

      .corner-fleur.tl {
        top: 14px;
        left: 14px;
      }

      .corner-fleur.tr {
        top: 14px;
        right: 14px;
      }

      .corner-fleur.bl {
        bottom: 14px;
        left: 14px;
      }

      .corner-fleur.br {
        right: 14px;
        bottom: 14px;
      }

      .hero-identity {
        min-height: 340px;
      }

      .wedding-name {
        white-space: normal;
      }

      .name-top,
      .name-bottom {
        font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 18vw, 4.8rem);
      }

      .amp-medallion {
        width: 62px;
      }

      .hero-subtitle {
        font-size: 0.62rem;
        letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      }

      .royal-panel {
        padding: 1.25rem;
      }
    }

    /* --- Accesibilidad: Movimiento Reducido --- */
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;
        animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
        scroll-behavior: auto !important;
        transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;
      }

      .royal-stage,
      .hero-medallion,
      .filigree-ring {
        transform: none !important;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <header class="royal-nav" id="royalNav" aria-label="Navegación principal">
    <button class="nav-seal" id="navToggle" type="button" aria-label="Abrir menú">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i>
    </button>

    <nav class="nav-plate">
      <a href="#inicio" class="is-active">Inicio</a>
      <a href="#fecha">Fecha</a>
      <a href="#lugar">Lugar</a>
      <a href="#historia">Historia</a>
      <a href="#familia">Familia</a>
      <a href="#rsvp">RSVP</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <main class="invitation-shell">
    <div class="chapter-meter" aria-hidden="true">
      <span class="chapter-dot is-active"></span>
      <span class="chapter-dot"></span>
      <span class="chapter-dot"></span>
      <span class="chapter-dot"></span>
      <span class="chapter-dot"></span>
      <span class="chapter-dot"></span>
    </div>

    <section class="scroll-chronicle" id="inicio" aria-label="Invitación de boda">
      <div class="royal-stage">
        <div class="manuscript">
          <article class="hero-medallion ink-awake" aria-label="Monograma de Isabella y Alejandro">
            <div class="filigree-ring"></div>
            <div class="filigree-ring second"></div>

            <div class="crest-card">
              <svg class="corner-fleur tl" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M18 82 C34 72 35 54 24 46 C45 50 50 31 50 18 C50 31 55 50 76 46 C65 54 66 72 82 82 C64 77 54 82 50 92 C46 82 36 77 18 82Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" />
                <path d="M50 18 V92 M18 82 H82" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" />
              </svg>

              <svg class="corner-fleur tr" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M18 82 C34 72 35 54 24 46 C45 50 50 31 50 18 C50 31 55 50 76 46 C65 54 66 72 82 82 C64 77 54 82 50 92 C46 82 36 77 18 82Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" />
                <path d="M50 18 V92 M18 82 H82" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" />
              </svg>

              <svg class="corner-fleur bl" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M18 82 C34 72 35 54 24 46 C45 50 50 31 50 18 C50 31 55 50 76 46 C65 54 66 72 82 82 C64 77 54 82 50 92 C46 82 36 77 18 82Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" />
                <path d="M50 18 V92 M18 82 H82" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" />
              </svg>

              <svg class="corner-fleur br" viewBox="0 0 100 100" aria-hidden="true">
                <path d="M18 82 C34 72 35 54 24 46 C45 50 50 31 50 18 C50 31 55 50 76 46 C65 54 66 72 82 82 C64 77 54 82 50 92 C46 82 36 77 18 82Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" />
                <path d="M50 18 V92 M18 82 H82" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" />
              </svg>

              <div class="hero-identity">
                <div class="royal-watermark" aria-hidden="true">
                  <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-4">I</span>
                  <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-5">A</span>
                </div>

                <div class="names-stack">
                  <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-6" class="wedding-name name-top">Isabella</span>

                  <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-7" class="amp-medallion">
                    <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-8">&</span>
                  </span>

                  <span data-gemini-id="portada-texto-9" class="wedding-name name-bottom">Alejandro</span>
                </div>

                <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-1" class="hero-subtitle">Uniremos nuestras vidas</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="royal-panel panel-date" id="fecha" data-chapter="Capítulo I">
            <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Ceremonia nupcial</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="detalles-titulo-1">La fecha</h2>
            <div class="mini-rule"></div>

            <div class="date-grid">
              <div class="date-side">
                <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-3">Sábado</span>
              </div>

              <strong>18</strong>

              <div class="date-side">
                <span data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-4">Octubre · 2026</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="detalles-texto-2" class="royal-copy" style="margin-top: 1rem;">
              A las <strong>17:30 horas</strong>, cuando la tarde tome color de oro antiguo,
              celebraremos el inicio de nuestra historia.
            </p>
          </article>

          <article class="royal-panel panel-place" id="lugar" data-chapter="Capítulo II">
            <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Lugar de honor</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="ubicacion-titulo-1">El recinto</h2>
            <div class="mini-rule"></div>

            <div class="place-card">
              <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-2">
                <strong>Hacienda San Gabriel</strong><br>
                Salón de los Arcos, Jardín Principal<br>
                Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas
              </p>

              <span data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-4" class="dress-token">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-gem"></i>
                Código de vestimenta: Etiqueta formal
              </span>
            </div>

            <div class="panel-actions">
              <button data-gemini-id="ubicacion-boton-1" class="royal-btn secondary" type="button" id="copyAddress">
                <i class="fa-regular fa-copy"></i>
                Copiar dirección
              </button>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="ubicacion-texto-3" class="seal-feedback" id="addressFeedback" aria-live="polite"></p>
          </article>

          <article class="royal-panel panel-story" id="historia" data-chapter="Capítulo III">
            <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Nuestro linaje emocional</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-1">La historia</h2>
            <div class="mini-rule"></div>

            <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-2" class="royal-copy">
              No fue un instante, sino una sucesión de pequeños gestos:
              miradas que encontraron casa, conversaciones que se volvieron refugio
              y días ordinarios que aprendieron a sentirse eternos.
            </p>

            <div class="itinerary-list" aria-label="Itinerario del evento">
              <div class="itinerary-item">
                <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-7" class="itinerary-time">17:30</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Ceremonia</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-8">Jardín principal</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="itinerary-item">
                <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-9" class="itinerary-time">19:00</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Recepción</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-10">Brindis y cena</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="itinerary-item">
                <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-11" class="itinerary-time">21:00</span>
                <div>
                  <strong>Baile</strong>
                  <span data-gemini-id="padres-texto-12">Salón de los Arcos</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </article>

          <article class="royal-panel panel-family" id="familia" data-chapter="Capítulo IV">
            <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-3" class="eyebrow">Con la bendición de</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-2">Familia</h2>
            <div class="mini-rule"></div>

            <div class="family-columns">
              <div>
                <h3 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-3">Padres de la novia</h3>
                <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-4">
                  Mariana Velasco<br>
                  Eduardo Rivera
                </p>
              </div>

              <div>
                <h3 data-gemini-id="padres-titulo-4">Padres del novio</h3>
                <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-5">
                  Catalina Montes<br>
                  Fernando Larios
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="ornament-divider" aria-hidden="true">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 320 34">
                <path d="M8 17 H116 C132 17 137 6 150 6 C157 6 160 13 160 17 C160 13 163 6 170 6 C183 6 188 17 204 17 H312" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" />
                <circle cx="160" cy="17" r="4" fill="currentColor" />
              </svg>
            </div>

            <p data-gemini-id="padres-texto-6" class="royal-copy">
              Gracias por acompañarnos en este capítulo que escribiremos con quienes más amamos.
            </p>
          </article>

          <article class="royal-panel panel-rsvp" id="rsvp" data-chapter="Capítulo V">
            <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-1" class="eyebrow">Confirmación real</p>
            <h2 data-gemini-id="confirmacion-titulo-1">RSVP</h2>
            <div class="mini-rule"></div>

            <form class="rsvp-form" id="rsvpForm" novalidate>
              <div class="field">
                <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-1" for="guestName">Nombre completo</label>
                <input data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-2" id="guestName" name="guestName" type="text" autocomplete="name" placeholder="Escribe tu nombre">
                <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-3" class="field-error">Por favor escribe tu nombre.</span>
              </div>

              <div class="form-row">
                <div class="field">
                  <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-2" for="attendance">Asistencia</label>
                  <select id="attendance" name="attendance">
                    <option value="">Seleccionar</option>
                    <option value="si">Sí asistiré</option>
                    <option value="no">No podré asistir</option>
                  </select>
                  <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-4" class="field-error">Selecciona una opción.</span>
                </div>

                <div class="field">
                  <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-3" for="guests">Invitados</label>
                  <select id="guests" name="guests">
                    <option value="">Seleccionar</option>
                    <option value="1">1 persona</option>
                    <option value="2">2 personas</option>
                    <option value="3">3 personas</option>
                  </select>
                  <span data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-5" class="field-error">Indica el número de invitados.</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="field">
                <label data-gemini-id="confirmacion-etiqueta-4" for="message">Mensaje para los novios</label>
                <textarea data-gemini-id="confirmacion-campo-1" id="message" name="message" placeholder="Deja un mensaje breve"></textarea>
              </div>

              <div class="panel-actions">
                <button data-gemini-id="confirmacion-boton-1" class="royal-btn" type="submit">
                  <i class="fa-solid fa-feather"></i>
                  Sellar confirmación
                </button>
              </div>

              <p data-gemini-id="confirmacion-texto-2" class="seal-feedback" id="rsvpFeedback" aria-live="polite"></p>
            </form>
          </article>
        </div>

        <div class="scroll-instruction" aria-hidden="true">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i>
          Desliza para abrir el blasón
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section id="inferred-portada-7" class="closing-section" aria-label="Mensaje final">
      <article id="inferred-portada-8" class="closing-card">
        <div class="final-monogram" aria-hidden="true">I&A</div>

        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-2" class="eyebrow">El honor de tu presencia</p>
        <h2 data-gemini-id="portada-titulo-1">Será nuestro regalo</h2>

        <div class="ornament-divider" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 320 34">
            <path d="M10 17 C58 17 58 8 90 8 C126 8 124 26 160 26 C196 26 194 8 230 8 C262 8 262 17 310 17" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" />
            <path d="M142 17 C150 8 170 8 178 17 C170 26 150 26 142 17Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" />
          </svg>
        </div>

        <p data-gemini-id="portada-texto-3" class="royal-copy">
          Con gratitud y alegría, te esperamos para brindar por el amor,
          la familia y el comienzo de una nueva tradición.
        </p>

        <div class="panel-actions" style="justify-content: center;">
          <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-1" class="royal-btn" href="#rsvp">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope-open-text"></i>
            Confirmar asistencia
          </a>

          <a data-gemini-id="portada-enlace-2" class="royal-btn secondary" href="#inicio">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-crown"></i>
            Volver al inicio
          </a>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>
  </main>

  <footer class="royal-footer">
    Invitación digital · Isabella & Alejandro · 2026
  </footer>

  <script>
    // =========================================================
    // --- Estado Global del Pergamino ---
    // =========================================================
    const root = document.documentElement;
    const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".royal-panel"));
    const navLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".nav-plate a"));
    const chapterDots = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".chapter-dot"));
    const chronicle = document.querySelector(".scroll-chronicle");
    const nav = document.getElementById("royalNav");
    const navToggle = document.getElementById("navToggle");

    let ticking = false;

    // =========================================================
    // --- Lógica del Menú ---
    // =========================================================
    navToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
      nav.classList.toggle("is-open");
      navToggle.classList.add("seal-pulse");

      setTimeout(() => {
        navToggle.classList.remove("seal-pulse");
      }, 900);
    });

    navLinks.forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener("click", () => {
        nav.classList.remove("is-open");
      });
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Utilidades JS ---
    // =========================================================
    function clamp(value, min, max) {
      return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
    }

    function getScrollPhase() {
      if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 760px)").matches) {
        return 1;
      }

      const rect = chronicle.getBoundingClientRect();
      const scrollable = chronicle.offsetHeight - window.innerHeight;
      const traveled = clamp(-rect.top, 0, scrollable);

      return scrollable > 0 ? traveled / scrollable : 0;
    }

    // =========================================================
    // --- Scroll Heráldico No Lineal ---
    // =========================================================
    function updateRoyalMechanism() {
      const phase = getScrollPhase();

      root.style.setProperty("--phase", phase.toFixed(4));

      const thresholds = [0.08, 0.21, 0.37, 0.54, 0.71];

      panels.forEach((panel, index) => {
        const shouldReveal =
          window.matchMedia("(max-width: 760px)").matches ||
          phase >= thresholds[index];

        panel.classList.toggle("is-visible", shouldReveal);
      });

      const activeIndex = phase < 0.08
        ? 0
        : clamp(thresholds.findIndex((threshold) => phase < threshold), 0, thresholds.length);

      const currentIndex = phase >= thresholds[thresholds.length - 1]
        ? 5
        : activeIndex;

      chapterDots.forEach((dot, index) => {
        dot.classList.toggle("is-active", index === currentIndex);
      });

      const ids = ["inicio", "fecha", "lugar", "historia", "familia", "rsvp"];

      navLinks.forEach((link) => {
        link.classList.toggle(
          "is-active",
          link.getAttribute("href") === `#${ids[currentIndex]}`
        );
      });

      ticking = false;
    }

    function requestRoyalTick() {
      if (!ticking) {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(updateRoyalMechanism);
        ticking = true;
      }
    }

    window.addEventListener("scroll", requestRoyalTick, { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener("resize", requestRoyalTick);
    window.addEventListener("load", updateRoyalMechanism);

    // =========================================================
    // --- Navegación por Anclas con Ensamblaje ---
    // =========================================================
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach((anchor) => {
      anchor.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
        const target = document.querySelector(anchor.getAttribute("href"));

        if (!target) return;

        if (
          !window.matchMedia("(max-width: 760px)").matches &&
          target.classList.contains("royal-panel")
        ) {
          event.preventDefault();

          const panelIndex = panels.indexOf(target);
          const thresholds = [0.09, 0.23, 0.39, 0.57, 0.74];
          const chronicleTop = chronicle.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;
          const scrollable = chronicle.offsetHeight - window.innerHeight;
          const destination = chronicleTop + scrollable * thresholds[panelIndex];

          window.scrollTo({
            top: destination,
            behavior: "smooth"
          });
        }
      });
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Copiar Dirección ---
    // =========================================================
    const copyAddressButton = document.getElementById("copyAddress");
    const addressFeedback = document.getElementById("addressFeedback");

    const addressText =
      "Hacienda San Gabriel, Salón de los Arcos, Jardín Principal, Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas";

    copyAddressButton.addEventListener("click", async () => {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(addressText);
        addressFeedback.textContent = "Dirección copiada con elegancia.";
      } catch (error) {
        addressFeedback.textContent =
          "No se pudo copiar automáticamente. Selecciona la dirección manualmente.";
      }

      copyAddressButton.classList.add("seal-pulse");

      setTimeout(() => {
        copyAddressButton.classList.remove("seal-pulse");
      }, 900);
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Validación RSVP ---
    // =========================================================
    const rsvpForm = document.getElementById("rsvpForm");
    const rsvpFeedback = document.getElementById("rsvpFeedback");

    function setFieldError(field, hasError) {
      field.closest(".field").classList.toggle("is-error", hasError);
    }

    rsvpForm.addEventListener("submit", (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();

      const guestName = document.getElementById("guestName");
      const attendance = document.getElementById("attendance");
      const guests = document.getElementById("guests");
      const submitButton = rsvpForm.querySelector(".royal-btn");

      const validations = [
        [guestName, guestName.value.trim().length < 2],
        [attendance, attendance.value === ""],
        [guests, guests.value === ""]
      ];

      validations.forEach(([field, hasError]) => {
        setFieldError(field, hasError);
      });

      const hasErrors = validations.some(([, hasError]) => hasError);

      if (hasErrors) {
        rsvpFeedback.textContent =
          "Revisa los campos marcados antes de sellar tu confirmación.";
        return;
      }

      const attendanceText =
        attendance.value === "si"
          ? "asistencia confirmada"
          : "ausencia registrada";

      rsvpFeedback.textContent =
        `Gracias, ${guestName.value.trim()}. Tu ${attendanceText} ha quedado sellada.`;

      submitButton.classList.add("seal-pulse");

      setTimeout(() => {
        submitButton.classList.remove("seal-pulse");
      }, 900);

      rsvpForm.reset();
    });

    // =========================================================
    // --- Limpieza de Errores al Escribir ---
    // =========================================================
    rsvpForm.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea").forEach((field) => {
      field.addEventListener("input", () => {
        setFieldError(field, false);
        rsvpFeedback.textContent = "";
      });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

knowledge_base.description: Estética vintage clásica tradicional con tonos sepia, tipografía serif y ornamentos. Atmósfera de decreto del amor.
knowledge_base.html_content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="Invitación digital vintage clásico con monograma real">
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#211712">

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin="">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Great+Vibes&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <title>Invitación Real | Alejandro & Isabella</title>

  <style>
    /* =========================================================
       METÁFORA VISUAL:
       "Un acta nobiliaria que se ensambla como un sello real".
       La invitación no aparece como página tradicional: se revela
       por medallones, pliegues, grabados y un lacre final.
    ========================================================= */

    /* --- Reset y Variables Globales --- */
    :root {
      --ink: #211712;
      --wine: #4a1218;
      --wine-dark: #26080c;
      --gold: #b98d45;
      --gold-soft: #dfbf76;
      --paper: #f6ecd4;
      --paper-dark: #d8bf8d;
      --line: rgba(185, 141, 69, 0.52);
      --shadow: rgba(33, 23, 18, 0.28);
      --ease: cubic-bezier(.19, 1, .22, 1);
      --safe: clamp(18px, 3.5vw, 54px);
    }

    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html {
      scroll-behavior: smooth;
      background: var(--ink);
    }

    body {
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% -10%, rgba(255,255,255,.42), transparent 36rem),
        radial-gradient(circle at 15% 85%, rgba(185,141,69,.18), transparent 34rem),
        linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f0dc, #d9c28f 52%, #efe1bd);
    }

    body::before {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: .28;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(33,23,18,.045) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(rgba(33,23,18,.045) 1px, transparent 1px),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent, rgba(33,23,18,.16));
      background-size: 42px 42px, 42px 42px, 100% 100%;
      mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    }

    body::after {
      content: "";
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
      background:
        linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(33,23,18,.18), transparent 13%, transparent 87%, rgba(33,23,18,.18)),
        linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(33,23,18,.16), transparent 18%, transparent 82%, rgba(33,23,18,.16));
    }

    a,
    button {
      font: inherit;
    }

    button {
      border: 0;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    ::selection {
      background: var(--wine);
      color: var(--paper);
    }

    /* --- Marco Heráldico Fijo --- */
    .page-shell {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      min-height: 100vh;
      isolation: isolate;
    }

    .royal-frame {
      position: fixed;
      inset: var(--safe);
      z-index: 10;
      pointer-events: none;
      border: 1px solid rgba(185,141,69,.55);
    }

    .royal-frame::before,
    .royal-frame::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 8px;
